name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: We just did the hot springs and slides for the day. The water slides are crazy awesome, even the kids toilet bowl slide was more extreme than we get in the States. Laying in the top hot spring during a downpour was amazing.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
I read a lot of negative reviews a few days before we arrived, and I was outside the cancelation window, so we had to make the best of it.
This place is amazing! We stayed 3 nights 6/1-6/4. The resort is very well maintained and clean. The check in process was very easy. They accepted.credit card (did not require bank transfer) and allowed us to call our credit card and authorize international charges. They were patient and accommodating.  Everyone we met was friendly and helpful. The rooms are huge and nice! They had robes, shaving kit, dental kit, sewing kit, lotion, shampoo, and conditioner. The room had coffee! Great patio area! We booked 2 and had connecting rooms.
The hot springs were not busy or over crowded. It rained every day, sometimes showers or torrential downpour. The breakfast was okay, not a huge selection but enough to satisfy everyone in our party. We got a couple burgers one night ($14.50 each) they were decent. The last night we got some dishes to take back to the room. (Fettuccine alfredo, nachos, Mediterranean salad). The salad with grilled chicken, candied nuts, fresh vegetables was delicious. My 7 year old barely let me get a bite.
There is a small market if you walk outside to the right, you can grab alcohol, snacks, candy etc. Soda Typical is also there we got chicken quesadillas ($8) and an amazing hamburger for $9.
Check out was simple, we called and asked to send the cart at 10:30 as we had transportation picking us up at 11. The front desk was friendly and told us to wait a few minutes while they checked the room. (We travel often and this is normal so we were prepared, I read they care about towels, robes, and umbrellas, so I had everything laying out in piles). It took 5 minutes max! They cut off the bands printed our bill and there were not any extra or hidden charges.
They do sell alcohol and it ranges from $11-20 a drink. You can put it on a card or pay cash. Expect normal American prices at the resort. The workers glady accept tips but the new credit card software does not allow you to tip (just as an fyi). The slides-watch people go down them and ask about their experience before allowing your children or self to try. There were 2 that I Did not allow my 7 year old on (the blue and yellow one near kids area and the middle one (serpentine) with the group of slides. All others they loved.
Overall amazing experience.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: This resort was amazing. We had two different rooms in different buildings. To check in was very easy. The hot springs were incredible and so many to try. The grounds were beyond lush. Great location near town. Very helpful and friendly staff. Luxury linens in the rooms including pooll towels. The breakfast buffet was included with our room and was delicious every morning. Great experience.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
Price is the major factor,  One drink here is 20-25 USD! !  Let alone 50 a person to enter.
Pros. Probably the best water slides out of all (27mph)! Great variety, hot to warm with a couple cool pools. A fun younger child section. Great vibe & natural feel for Great photos. Lockers cost you but not really needed if you carry a water bag around and move it along as you go. can rent towels for a returned deposit.  More a fashion statement place.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Great place.. it's wonderful

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
Don’t you dare go to this rip off facility. I’m a lawyer, and the fact that they have not shut down the middle slide or modified it after the years of massive amounts of serious injuries is deplorable.
They’ve been on notice for many years about the amount of serious injuries that have occurred, and they have done nothing. It’s a disgrace.
They should literally be arrested: as they make a massive amount of money, are on formal notice of a serious defect at their property, and do nothing.
Do not support this business at all.
They are despicable.
And also, it’s always crowded as hell and the place is generally not worth it at all.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
We recently went to Baldi on a day pass while on a family trip in Costa Rica. We are a family of 4 with 2 kids (ages 9 and 12) and 2 adults. We pre-purchased our passes because we had heard it could be really busy and wanted to avoid lines- however we were shocked that there was no line or wait at all. It was actually shockingly not busy at all or at least didn't seem to be to us!

We arrived for around 9:00 a.m. (or whenever it opened) and stayed until about 7:00 p.m. We had an absolute blast exploring Baldi and all it had to offer. We visited every single hot spring and feature it had to offer. The kids didn't get bored for a single second and really loved the little hidden nooks, waterfalls and pools. Of course they LOVED the kid's area, especially the extreme waterslides and went on these for the majority of the day.

I will say, we are a very adventurous family who loves roller coasters and waterslides more than most and the waterslides at Baldi are no joke. The 3 more extreme slides are very intense especially the one middle one- so take the warnings with caution and beware. That said- I could sit in the pool at the bottom of that slide and be entertained for days on end watching people shoot out of it and their reaction!!

There is a Baldi kid section as well that would be suitable for younger children- it wasn't as big but definitely fun for the little ones! I did find however that for the fun kids stuff it's sort of little-kid ish or very extreme!! Not much in between- although you do have endless pools to explore as well.

We had lunch at Baldi and ordered in the pool towards the front entrance. It was easy and very delicious. The kids were very happy with the food as well. We also had drinks throughout the day too and they were also yummy!

I would highly recommend checking out Baldi for the day, especially if you have children or like water slides! You can also change your towels for fresh ones whenever needed which is really helpful when you are there for the day, especially if it's rainy like when we were there!

Oh- and speaking of the rain... we weren't bothered at all by the fact that it was a pretty rainy day since we were wet and in pools all day. That said, there are some pools and large areas that are well covered too- so you can get some reprieve from the weather if you like!

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Not the best experience that I  was expecting. If your pool towel gets stolen, which it likely will,  they will charge you $30 per towel. No exceptions. It causes undo stress because you have to always be vigilant. They want you to confront the person and chase them down and make a scene if you happen to see your towel being stolen. Tabacon resort is much better and I highly recommend it for a more relaxed and superior atmosphere.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: I visited there last Monday on a tour for my birthday. I had an amazing time exploring all the beautiful pools. The dinner was not that good as far as their buffet style. However, the cherry on top was a chocolate massage from Caroline. She was absolutely amazing. Her hands were everything. The best massage I've ever had, and I've had several in my lifetime. I would definitely recommend this place if people visit Costa Rica.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Todo muy bonito! Realmente me quedo sin palabras con tan semejante lugar!

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
¡Una experiencia relajante e imperdible en Costa Rica! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Si visitas la zona del Arenal, Baldí Hot Springs es una parada obligatoria. Lo que más me fascinó de este lugar es la gran variedad de piscinas termales que ofrece; cada una tiene su propia temperatura y, como regla general, entre más cerca estés del volcán, más caliente se siente el agua. Esto te permite explorar y encontrar el punto exacto de calor que más te guste.

En nuestro caso, decidimos pasar la mayor parte del tiempo en la tercera piscina, y fue una excelente elección. Tiene un ambiente increíble porque ahí mismo se encuentran los toboganes, un restaurante y un wet bar (bar dentro de la piscina), lo que hace que la experiencia sea súper cómoda y divertida sin tener que salir del agua.

El horario me pareció perfecto para disfrutarlo por la tarde. Nosotros llegamos a las 5:00 p.m. y el lugar cierra hasta las 10:00 p.m. Esas 5 horas son el tiempo ideal para sumergirse, relajarse por completo y no sentir el paso del tiempo. Además de las piscinas, el sauna me gustó muchísimo, está muy bien logrado y complementa perfecto el circuito de relajación.

Para cerrar la noche con broche de oro, al salir de las piscinas nos relajamos comiendo una buena pizza acompañada de una cerveza bien fría. Sin duda, considero que son de las mejores aguas termales de Costa Rica. ¡Totalmente recomendado para ir a relajarse y pasar un rato inolvidable!

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Buena experiencia, nos habían recomendado en gran parte del viaje este lugar por lo que decidimos pasar la tarde de nuestra llegada a La Fortuna en el area de termas. Cuentan con una amplia variedad de piscinas con agua de diferentes temperaturas, algunas con cascadas, otras con bares en el interior de la piscina y otras con toboganes. El espacio está muy bien cuidado, la vegetación es abundante y hay facil acceso a duchas, baños y camarines, todo muy limpio. El trato de todos quienes nos atendieron fue muy amable. La única nota baja fue la alimentación,  se ofrece tipo buffet pero la verdad, la variedad y la calidad deja bastante que desear, habriamos estado dispuestos a pagar un poco más incluso de saber como sería. Es un lugar bastante concurrido por lo que quizás no es lo óptimo para relajarse totalmente, pero de todas formas lo recomiendo.

Very relaxing not busy tons of space I love they only have 30 rooms so at night the place is empty and we had the springs to ourselves very romantic
Staying a 2nd time got the double room fantastic have the springs to ourselves went down the water slide they say to put your hands behind your head so if you kid doesn't do that that's why they are breaking bones 😂 also we accidentally booked 3 rooms instead of 2 not a problem at all making the change probably depends of the season but they are great here we love it
Also as of May 2026 they had the liquor license renewed and the bar was open
As this was my 3rd time staying here I can't wait to be back 🥰 baldi is my happy place

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: We really enjoyed Baldi. It is the start of low season so it wasn't very crowded. Staff were friendly. We had the deluxe room on the fourth floor which was directly across from the Roman Bath and the giant jacuzzi. The Roman bath was very quiet and relaxing. Breakfast was okay. Dinner was excellent. Spinach ravioli and sea bass. The only two downfalls are, #1 deluxe room sleeps 4 you get 4 bath towels, 4 pool towels, 4 robes, but only 1 facecloth and 1 hand towel and you cannot get an extra one, but you can 'exchange it as many times as you want' which is ridiculous. #2 I asked front desk for milk for coffee, they said they don't have that. I then asked if the restaurant had a glass of milk I could buy. I asked in Spanish also. The front desk clerk said that they 'don't have anything like that here'. Went for breakfast the next morning and I was offered milk for my coffee.

review_text:
Overall a good stay, but not quite what we expected for a relaxing getaway. The property is a bit run down in areas and feels more busy and commercial than peaceful, so it wasn’t as tranquil as we had hoped.

That said, the service was excellent—staff were incredibly friendly and helpful throughout our stay, which really stood out. The breakfast was also very good with lots of options.

For the price, it offers solid value, especially if you’re looking to enjoy the hot springs without spending a premium. Just don’t expect a quiet, luxury spa experience.

review_text: We were a bit hesitant to pay $51 per person for a day pass but ended up having a great time. There were so many different pools and areas. I will say, a big part of why we loved it is because it was a monday and basically empty. If it were packed, especially with kids since a lot of the area is kid invovled, we probably would have choosen a different hot spring. If you have kids though this place has a playground, slides, and bunch for them to do! Drinks were $14 each at the 2 lower bars and $20 each at the premium bar up top.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa

review_text:
Wir waren hier als Tagesgast und haben für die Eintritte mit Mittagessen 240 USD bezahlt Für 3 Erwachsene und ein Kind, was wirklich eher teuer war.
Der Empfang war sehr angenehm und sie haben uns alles erklärt. Die Bäder waren ok, nur die Temperaturen von den Kühlen Becken waren nie so kühl wie angegeben, also Wechselbad war nicht möglich. In der Sportbar war in einem kühlen Becken sogar Kot, eventuell von der Vorabendparty.
Ansonsten haben sie alles sauber gehalten und es waren sehr viele Leute am Reinigen.
Bei uns war nur die Sportbar und die bei der Rezeption offen, die anderen waren alle geschlossen. Das Essen war gut am Mittag, es hatte nicht so viel auswahl, aber das Meiste war lecker.
In der Bar waren die Preise eher im oberen Bereich aber die Drinks waren gut

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: What and amazing experience! My girlfriend and I are both big water people. You could spend DAYS here and never get bored! Wear goggles down the slide, 10/10 experience will definitely go back!

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
We recently stayed at Baldi Hot Springs Resort and unfortunately had a very difficult experience.

Our 6-year-old son was injured on the kiddie water slide and hit his mouth badly enough that we had to leave the property to seek emergency dental care. We were away from the resort for several hours and the situation ultimately resulted in two tooth extractions.

After returning home, our son required an additional surgical procedure under anesthesia to remove a remaining broken root, which added further cost and stress to an already difficult situation.

This incident significantly disrupted our stay, including the loss of most of that evening and the following morning, as well as planned activities we had to cancel.

We were told at the time that the resort would assist with covering the initial doctor consultation at Unimed, but this was never followed up on. In addition, we have sent multiple emails and attempted to contact management by phone, but have not received any response.

While the property itself is beautiful, we are very disappointed in the lack of communication and follow-through after an incident involving a child. We would have expected a much higher level of care and responsiveness from a resort of this caliber.

We would still welcome the opportunity to resolve this directly with management.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: We did the day pass to soak in the hot springs and felt it was a great experience. There are a ton of different soaking pools of varying temperatures. The hottest ones are in the back higher up. Several of the pools have swim up bars, waterfalls, caves, and cold plunge pools. There are a few pretty intense water slides in one area and then a kiddie pool with a water playground for the little tykes. There are multiple restaurants but we don’t try them. The bathrooms and changing rooms were clean. It wasn’t nearly as crowded as I thought it would be. I’d go again if I were in the area.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: We stayed a few days at this hotel. This place is large and luxurious, but it's also unsafe and not worth the price. Specifically, the water slides are unsafe. My kids got shocked by something electrical under a waterfall. The staff are wonderful, but the prices for the quality of food for breakfast, for example, does not add up at all. We would not go back to stay as guests. The location is nice. The pools are incredible and plentiful. It's just expensive and doesn't add up.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: The hot spring pools were really good we spent a few hours here. They all had a different kind of vibe and different temperatures, so something for everyone. Unfortunately the food we had included as a package was a buffet which was a pretty limited but still looked like there was something for everyone. The food was okay the pasta was cold and chewy so clearly over cooked. The plantain was really nice as were the ribs. So maybe we just hit unlucky this is why I think 4 stars is fair.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
The positives: This place is very cool with many different pools and water slides. It is a great option for a day pass, particularly if you have a family or group that would enjoy the waterslides for something different. The rooms were fine and clean, and the WiFi worked well.

The negatives: We do not recommend at all actually staying here overnight or if you’re looking for a place to relax or have drinks. From the moment we arrived to check in, this place clearly catered to day passes and tour busses filled with tourists over actual guests (we waited forever in line with hardly anyone working while there were 4 workers pumping people through the day pass line). We arrived an hour early before check-in and our room wasn’t ready, which is fine, but they told us we had to pay $30 for towels to enjoy the hot springs and didn’t offer to take our luggage.

Then you’ll pay $20 for a cocktail here (at the much more upscale resort across the street we started at, we paid $14 for the same drink). Service at the bar in the middle was so slow and they never acknowledge you and were rude when we asked for a cocktail list. We had cold showers that turned barely warm after about 10 mins. What you can expect? Screaming kids jumping off the barstools getting water in your drinks everywhere and literal hoards of people coming in on tours. We paid the same price at Royal Corin across the street and the experience was night and day.

Suggestions for the hotel would be to offer a discount on the overpriced drinks for your guests with the hotel wristbands and consider making one of the many pools with a swim up bar adult only (or even hotel guest only).

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: I wasn't a big fan but my family enjoyed it so 4 stars. The pro is that it's huge and there are many pools. No pool is actually too hot or too cold for comfort so kids have a lot of choices. On the flip side, the infrastructure feels cheap, the slides are borderline unsafe, the food is terrible and the service is lukewarm at best. We spent a whole day here from 9am and the morning and noon hours were actually rather quiet and enjoyable. But at 3-4pm big tour groups start to show up and the noise level clearly increases. So plan accordingly.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Great hotspring/pool location for adults and kids. We paid for the day about 50$ U.S. per person.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Scrivo questa recensione perchè le recensioni che avevo letto a proposito dell'hotel prima della partenza mi avevano molto fuorviata. La struttura è bellissima. La nostra junior suite era veramente grande e lussuosa. Includeva un letto king size comodissimo, un grande divano letto, una grandissima vasca da bagno e una grande doccia con acqua termale. Inoltre avevamo a disposizione un terrazzo arredato tutto per noi per rilassarci. Le sorgenti termali sono un paradiso e, nostante abbiamo visitato l'hotel in altissima stagione, le strutture non erano mai affolate. Il ristorante dove si fa colazione è molto bello e la varietà molto ampia e di buona qualità. Una sera abbiamo anche cenato in hotel presso il ristorante alla carta e il cibo era ottimo con porzioni generose. Servivano alcolici e ho bevuto un ottimo margarita al maracuya. All'arrivo in hotel ci sono state date due semplici indicazioni: 1- evitare di utilizzare gli scivoli; 2- portare con noi contanti o carta di credito per pagare direttamente i servizi extra in quanto il sistema non è centralizzato. Abbiamo seguito le indicazioni e non abbiamo avuto nessun inconveniente. L'unico inconveniente ci è stato dato da una vicina di camera maleducata che pretendeva di tenere acceso un apparecchio per il white noise tutta la notte, che si sentiva anche attraverso la parete delle camera (che altrimenti era silenziosissima). Alla fine l'hotel ci ha mandato un addetto alla manutenzione e insieme a lui siamo riusciti a scoprire la provenienza del rumore e a far spegnere l'apparecchio ai nostri vicini.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Didn't know until after buying drinks that AMEX was not accepted. Bartender was working alone so very slow service.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
The first impression is absolutely terrible and unprofessional, and it’s not enjoyable at all.
The reception literally sends you in circles. To begin with, it takes so long that you can only really start swimming about an hour later. You’re not told where to get the towels or that you have to purchase a locker in a different location, so you end up wasting a lot of time.
The staff is very unprofessional, quite unfriendly, and poorly trained, which significantly diminishes the overall guest experience. The facility itself is nicely designed, and the food is average. However, about five hours later my four-year-old son developed severe vomiting and diarrhea, along with intense stomach pain and cramps.
Overall, the experience was disappointing, and given the high price, the value for money is poor. This place is not recommended.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
Es un lugar muy bonito, las piscinas son amplias así que no estás tan cerca de otras personas. La comida estuvo bien, no deliciosa, pero bien. Quise almorzar y cenar pero solamente había espacio para el almuerzo, por lo que recomiendo reservar con anterioridad.
Hay precio especial para costarricenses.
Los toboganes tienen un horario diferente al de las piscinas, no ví rótulos pero si me dí cuenta que cierran muchísimo antes que el resto del establecimiento.
Los cócteles están bien también, nada especial para los $12 de valor que tienen.
No hay área de fumado, supongo que por la ley, pero entonces mandan a la gente a fumar a la par del hotel, en la vía pública, deberían poner un cenicero para que no dejen las colillas (altamente contaminante) en el suelo.
Es la primera vez que visito el lugar y tengo la sensación de que había un mal olor, qué no es de las termales porque eran olores a aguas residuales en lugares muy específicos, principalmente en las piscinas de 20°C, casualmente las que tienen más gente. No sé a qué se debe, pero con la cantidad de gente que utiliza las instalaciones, quiero creer que no era olor de las aguas residuales de baldi.
Cómo sugerencia al lugar, deberían sembrar plantas nativas o especies frutales para atraer aves al lugar, es muy bonito pero el paisajismo es de puras plantas ornamentales que no atraen aves.

review_text: This hot spring experience was a fantasy, (we had to go to town to use the ATM because they are only taking cash at the moment idk) we paid $183 for a day pass: 12-year-old a 6-year-old and two adults. We started around 11am-2pm, it was amazing, then left for a late lunch in town, and came back around 3-6pm, left again for dinner and came back from 7-9pm. My kids said it was the best day of our vacation. Highlight was the different hot pools and a few cool pools and water slides and the other kids area.  Definitely recommend.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: AVOID THIS PLACE LIKE THE PLAUGE. I’ve never experienced such terrible customer service in my life. I traveled with my 2 year old son all day and when I arrived it was complete chaos. The hotel prioritizes people with daypasses over the actual people staying there. I had to send money to another card since they don’t accept a card without tap or Amex. After this they denied me and my family to stay. I asked to speak to the manager as we had nowhere else to go, I made a reservation in advance, and now had acceptable form of payment. The manager was not on the floor and the gentleman wouldn’t provide me his name who told me we couldn’t stay there anymore. I tried to get contact information|for the manager and was denied. I come to find out there is ongoing issues with the heirs of this hotel and that is why it’s so chaotic with staff, payment method, and it’s full of cops and security guards because issues with the hotel family will go there and make problems. I found a room and Tabacon and it was a completely different experience, it was calm, tranquil and the best customer service compared to what we experienced at Baldi. I would avoid Baldi at all costs and try ANYWHERE else

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
Truly awful experience. My stay was nothing like the older positive reviews suggested. We waited 28 minutes for a drink at the bar, and the buffet was comparable to a bad roadside cafeteria: long lines, rigid seating times, overcooked chicken, undercooked pork, and piles of low-quality pasta.
What concerned me even more was safety. The stone surfaces make the pool decks extremely slick. An adult can manage that risk, but this is not a place for kids. Beyond that, there appeared to be little meaningful security inside the property. There was visible security at the lobby entrance, but I did not see a single patrol within the fenced area during my stay.
On the positive side, the pools are plentiful, and the rooms are tired but passable.  The employees themselves seemed to be trying, but they were clearly trapped inside a broken system. This did not feel like a one-off bad night. It felt like a place being run badly at a systemic level.
We abandoned our six-night reservation after just three nights and accepted the loss. I wanted my kids out of there. There are better options nearby. Use them.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
Die Baldi Hot Springs in La Fortuna sind definitiv einen Besuch wert – besonders, wenn man zum ersten Mal hier ist. Die Anlage ist beeindruckend gestaltet, mit üppiger, tropischer Vegetation, viel Bambus und einer insgesamt sehr gepflegten Atmosphäre. Man merkt sofort, wie viel Mühe in die Gestaltung geflossen ist – das macht das Erlebnis besonders.

Die verschiedenen Pools sind schön angelegt, und es gibt viele Möglichkeiten, sich zu entspannen. Die Bar und das gesamte Ambiente wirken hochwertig, was gut zum 5-Sterne-Charakter passt. Entsprechend sind auch die Preise eher im oberen Bereich.

Ein kleiner Punkt: Das Wasser ist größtenteils recht warm (über 30°C), was an sehr heißen Tagen etwas intensiv sein kann. Wer Hitze gut verträgt, wird es lieben – ansonsten kann es schnell zu warm werden.

Insgesamt aber ein sehr schönes Erlebnis inmitten der Natur – ideal zum Abschalten und Genießen.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: No existe en todo Costa Rica unas termales mas hermosas que Baldi. No hay comparación con ninguna otra, simplemente lo mejor !

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: We recently stayed at Baldi Hot Springs Resort and had a very difficult experience that significantly impacted our trip.||Our 6-year-old son was injured on the kiddie water slide and hit his mouth badly enough that we had to leave the resort to seek emergency dental care. We were gone for several hours that evening, and the situation resulted in two tooth extractions.||After returning home, our son required an additional surgical procedure under anesthesia to remove a remaining broken root, which added further cost and stress for our family.||As a result, we lost most of that evening, the following morning, and had to cancel planned activities.||We were also told at the time that the resort would assist with covering the initial doctor consultation at Unimed, but this was never followed up on. In addition, we made multiple attempts to contact the resort afterward by email and phone and have not received any response.||The property itself is very nice, which makes this even more disappointing. We simply expected better communication and support following an incident involving a child at a resort of this level.||We would still welcome the opportunity to resolve this directly with management.

Iguanas joined us.|Had an issue paying in dollars with a Visa credit card ( reception had only a tap mobile phone and weren't trying to help make payment easy)|The hot springs were varied in style, and temperature changed in different pools.|The geothermal waters were delightful, and cascades the walking surfaces around the pools less so.|Self service buffet dinner was fresh, plentiful.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Honestly there’s better places to stay for the money near Arenal. They messed up our reservation, so as a family of 5 we were separated across the resort and they did nothing to help us resolve the issue. Staff is surprisingly less friendly than the rest of Costa Rica, it’s almost like they are annoyed you are there. You share the pools with a ton of “day users”. Dinner buffet was like a mediocre military chow hall. Beer selection was weak. Charges $4 for an extra coffee pod even when housekeeping didn’t refill them, then charged a $30 towel fee for a missing room towel.  I’d love to visit the Fortuna area again, but I won’t be staying at Baldi.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
I’ve visited Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa before, and one of the best conveniences used to be the ability to charge food and drinks directly to your wristband.

Unfortunately, that is no longer the case. Now you are required to carry a credit card and open an account before making any purchases. This completely takes away from the relaxing, carefree experience a hot springs resort should provide.

What’s disappointing is that this change was not clearly communicated in advance. Guests expect a seamless experience, not having to worry about carrying cards around pools and thermal areas.

For a resort of this level, this feels like a step backward in service and guest convenience. I hope management either reconsiders this policy or is at least transparent about it before guests arrive.

review_text: So we had an amazing room. Farthest away from any action, jr suite. 2201.  Balcony porch was the best.  East walk to premium thermal pools and bar. I would say they could make a quick turn around with friendlier more outgoing staff and could double revenue at swim up bars with a more active staff. If Baldi doesn’t change I would not recommend this place. The biggest chafe for me was charging me for the daily in room coffee pods.  A lot of money for a small coffee.

review_text: Estuvimos hospedados 3 noches en el hotel en una habitación junior suite , desde el día 11 hasta el sábado 14 de marzo de 2026 . ( he ido en 4 ocasiones en los últimos años ) El hotel como desde la primera vez que me hospedé , no invierten nada cada vez más dejado , el desayuno cutrisimo y los empleados del bufet con muy pocas ganas de trabajar pendientes constantemente de si le dejan propina . Los baños de hombre de al lado del restaurante un pestazo  en lo urinarios masculinos los tres días que fui a desayunar . Las piscinas y toboganes dejadísimos y los toboganes super peligrosos que no me abrí la cabeza de milagro . Los bares de las piscinas ( sport bar ) super cutre casi vacíos y no tiene cerveza IMPERIAL Y encima cerveza mala a 8  dólares . La limpieza en la habitación la limpiadora fue de 3 días 1 y por qué se lo dijimos, dejamos la bolsa de basura en la puerta y no la recogía nadie . Eso si , el sobre de la limpiadora para las propinas ahí preparado . Y ya el colmo cuando nos vamos nos dice la chica que estaba en el check out . Que tenemos que pagar una cápsula de café 😂 , 4 dólares , le digo pero si en todos los hoteles el café es gratis y no pone nada en el listado de precios de lo que valen las cápsulas y me saca la chica de recepción un folio de no sé dónde y me dice que las 4 primeras son gratis y que a partir de ahí a 4 dólares , es para reírse mi pregunta fue pero son 4 cápsulas por día o por hospedaje ???? No supo responder …. Bueno pague 3000 colones y me marche bastante decepcionado.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
For a resort at this price point, I was extremely disappointed with the service at the hot springs and the quality of the drinks. We ordered multiple cocktails that were around $15 each, and every single one tasted noticeably watered down. The alcohol was barely detectable. We even mentioned it to one of the bartenders, and instead of addressing the concern, he didn’t deny that the drinks were diluted.

When you’re paying premium prices at a resort, you expect quality and honesty in what you’re being served. Unfortunately, that was not our experience here, and it left us feeling like guests were being taken advantage of. Very disappointing.

Je zit gewoon midden in het jungle te relaxen in één van de vele baden. Veel baden hebben ook een poolbar en de service is meer dan uitstekend! De sanitaire voorzieningen zijn hartstikke schoon. Je komt hier echt tot rust en het is tot 22:00 uur geopend. Unieke ervaring die wat betreft hotsprings waarschijnlijk niet te overtreffen is. Dit is echt het beste van het beste!

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: Wir haben drei Nächte im Baldi gebucht und können es nicht weiterempfehlen. Kaffee im Zimmer gibt es nur ein Mal! Im gesamten Hotel inkl Bar wird kein Alkohol ausgeschenkt. Das Personal ist sichtlich frustriert und demotiviert. Es werden Verhaltensregeln ausgegeben, die an eine Jugendherberge erinnern. Bei jeder Gelegenheit wird daran erinnert, dass für ein Handtuch, das fehlt (warum sollte es ?) $30.- zu zahlen sind. Das Zimmer wird beim check out genau kontrolliert. Ebenso wird ua. darauf hingewiesen, dass bei verspätetem Check out $100.- pro Stunde  als Strafe fällig werden. Die Führung des Hotels ist sich offensichtlich nicht darüber einig ob es weitergeführt oder verkauft werden soll. Diese Unsicherheit hat die  Belegschaft offenbar auch erfasst und dementsprechend verhält sie sich auch. Wir haben uns dort nicht willkommen und daher nicht wohl gefühlt.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
Fuimos alrededor de las 5:00 PM y fue un excelente horario para disfrutar el lugar con tranquilidad. Desde la recepción, el personal explica todo de forma muy clara y detallada, lo cual se agradece mucho.

Recomiendo sacar la entrada simple (sin cena), ya que es más que suficiente para una buena experiencia. El alquiler del locker cuesta USD 7 y entra perfectamente una mochila grande o dos pequeñas. También te dan toallas con un depósito de USD 10, que se devuelve una vez que las entregás al salir.

Una estadía de unas 3 horas como máximo es ideal, más tiempo puede resultar excesivo. Se pueden comprar drinks en el bar húmedo, están regulares.

En cuanto a las termas, recomiendo especialmente la que incluye sauna, sin dudas la mejor del complejo. Además, al fondo del predio están las termas llamadas “premium”, que también valen mucho la pena y son más tranquilas.

Un lugar muy bien organizado, ideal para relajarse después de un día activo en La Fortuna

We were looking forward to this place. The woman at the front was no help. She was quite rude and gave no solutions when her tap to her phone wouldn’t work.

We have money in our accounts but when we couldn’t tap she had no solution… a place of this magnitude should have an option to insert with two limits. We had been doing tours all day and thought we could sneak it in.

review_text: We went for a day trip to enjoy the hot springs. Took the kids (8, 11, 14). Had an excellent time. Slides for the kids and a huge variety of hot springs pools with various temperatures for everyone to enjoy. Towel service with a $10 cash deposit and lockers for a non refundable $7. name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
PLEASE DO NOT GO ON THE SLIDES!!!!

I wish I read the google AND trip advisor reviews of these slides before because it sounds like it’s been a problem for over 10 years and they have not fixed it.

I went on the faster slide and due to the poor engineering of this design, ended up smashing my head so hard on the side I came out with an instant black eye. Please don’t underestimate it and think it’s just because it’s a fast slide, regardless of the speed you go at you get slammed into the sides. Just take 2 minutes to look back at previous reviews, they say about broken ribs, hospital visits, stitches in eyes etc.

It is SO irresponsible to have these slides still open at a 5 start resort especially!

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
My family and I got a day pass to the Baldi Hot Springs. VERY family friendly. !! IMPORTANT - either bring towels or BRING $10 USD for on-site towels, per towel. You will get the money back upon returning the towels, but they only take cash deposits for the towels.

On-site check in was very easy. We were able to set up our wrist bands with a tab tied to a credit card, so my family was able to pick up snacks whenever they wanted to. The food and drinks was exceptional, and well priced too! (Make sure to get the mint lemonade! Picture enclosed.) You can rent lockers, but if you have a car, there is tons of security and an on-site parking lot, so we used our vehicle as our locker!

My wife and eldest daughter got great massages at the on-site spa. There are ten pool groups with multiple pools in each group, ranging from "cold" (~68 degrees F) to "VERY hot" (over 150 degrees F!!). Baldi Hot Springs are on a hill with easy walking paths and exceptional wheelchair rampage everywhere. (Wheelchair ramps go into every pool as well.) Generally speaking, the pools get hotter the higher up the hill you go, but there are some VERY hot mini pools sprinkled throughout the property. Some of the super hot pools are very shallow with built-in partially submerged recliners (to allow you to stick your back in without submerging too much of your body.) There is a lot of variation in depths throughout each pool system. You can mix and match your pool exploration to your heart's content, and every pool system is worth exploring. (My kids favorite pool was the Giant Jacuzzi. It's truly giant.) There were never terrible crowds at any pool that we visited.

A couple of the pool groups have roofs for the rain-adverse, but I will tell you from personal experience, it is a REALLY AWESOME EXPERIENCE to be in one of the exterior pools during an intense rainstorm. I'm not kidding. Your body stays warm as the standard temperature rain hits your head. It's wild! For smaller kids, there is a great water park with its own water slide. For adults, the water slides are....REALLY fast. Like, really really fast.

So, overall, the day pass to this property was well worth the price.

So after eating we spent 40 minutes walking around looking for towels, which should’ve been at the front but isn’t which is so inconvenient, we were told it was cash only only at the towel stand mind you we should have been told it was cash only from when we paid for entry WITH A CREDIT CARD very ironic…. so I asked for a refund because who wants to do a waterpark all day with no towel ? the guy who sold me the ticket lied to my face and told me that he told me already It was cash only like think about it if I was told that, why would I proceed to pay $150 knowing that I would be all day in a water activity with no towel on top of refusing to give me a refund, he called security on me and having me escorted out after paying $150 and being there 40 minutes and never get into the water!!! would never go again would actually go to where I was first recommended eco termanles, which is on the same block and everybody says it this way better!!!!

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
My stay at Baldi Hot Springs Hotel had both positive and disappointing aspects.
The pools are excellent and offer a genuinely hot thermal spring experience. The rooms were clean, and the balcony was spacious and pleasant. Service overall was mostly good. Breakfast was acceptable; however, the vegetarian options at the dinner buffet were quite limited. The pizza and cream of mushroom soup were enjoyable, but overall the food quality was average.
It was also surprising that the hotel does not serve alcohol, which may be relevant information for future guests.
Unfortunately, the most disappointing part of our stay involved a server named Jason at the bar in front of reception. I clearly ordered a single item: “chicken fingers with fries.” However, he assumed that the fries were an additional order and brought two extra bowls. When I pointed out the mistake, he refused to take the extra items back and attempted to pressure me into accepting them. Eventually, he said, “It is okay if you do not want to pay,” before finally removing the extra plates.
This interaction felt unnecessary and unprofessional. A simple acknowledgment of the misunderstanding and correction would have sufficed. Guests spend a significant amount of money to travel and stay at this hotel, and respectful service should be standard.
I asked to speak with the manager but was told, somewhat reluctantly, that the manager was not available. I left a written complaint with a staff member named Jesus at reception, but I have not received any response so far.

A relaxing family/kid friendly hot springs location in LA Fortuna that is affordable and has flexible hours. Many pools to be enjoyed including a kids play/splash area. We especially loved the cave pool!

Dont get the food ticket for Baldi- the restaurant meal was awful and flavorless.

It was a rainy day and there isn't one dry place to put your stuff, we had to put our towels under benches - but The ground was wet... I can't imagine that there is just one rainy day a year, so I would have expected a solution for this. There water slides are not safe and there is not information about using them. The service people were nice, but I cannot recommend this location for this price.

My review is just about the day pass for the hot springs.
Lots of people have posted about the slides, so I wanted to say that my 9 yr old loved all the slides and did all of them over and over, even the intense "middle one". They are harder on adults but lots of teens were also doing the slides and adults too and we didn't see anyone hurt.
The whole area is beautiful. We went with our three kids and they loved it, had 4 hours of fun!

I will say we had trouble with their tap/credit card machine and ended up having to pay USD cash for entry which was unfortunate but they said they're getting a new card Reader in the next month.
The staff was super helpful in trying to troubleshoot this.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
We received an invitation from the Costa Rican embassy. While we had been informed about the hot springs near the volcanoes, we were genuinely surprised by their remarkable impressiveness.

The area features over 15 hot springs, alongside two or three cold ones. Situated on a hillside, the temperature of the springs progressively increases with elevation.

This destination offers an unforgettable experience, and we highly recommend a visit should the opportunity arise.

It is truly exceptional.

The entire region, including the mountains and the scenic views encountered en route, is simply breathtaking.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
This place is very spread out and can be confusing to navigate. We went on a cold day. Big mistake. The pools are far apart, often big and shallow, and so lose heat rapidly. Indicated temperatures don't seem to be related to the actual water temp. Even at the top where the water comes in, it was not what I would call a hot spring, more a warm bath.
It might be OK for a hot day, but I would avoid it if it's cooler.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text: We have come here a handful of times in the past 10 years that we’ve visited Costa Rica. It used to feel magical and clean. Our most recent visit was met with a foul smell throughout the entire park. Smelling of fecal matter and quite frankly- pee. The steam from the waterfalls smelled like urine heavily. There was trash throughout the bushes. The quality has definitely gone down. It’s unfortunate because it used to be one of our favorite places but we just felt absolutely dirty. Apart from that it still offers an abundance of thermal pools. They were not offering alcoholic beverages at the swim up bars which is also a fun experience that we felt robbed of.

name: Baldi Hot Springs Hotel Resort & Spa
review_text:
El lugar por sí solo es hermoso, las habitaciones y la comida están muy bien.
Me parece que su personal está completamente desenfocado del servicio, resolver las necesidades del cliente y de hacerlo sentir confortable, posiblemente por la disputa legal que tienen, parece que han han forzado el hecho de seguir operando a toda costa, sin embargo, no han tomado en cuenta la satisfacción de los clientes, por ejemplo el que no tengan patente para venta de bebidas alcohólicas lo cual no te lo advierten al momento de la reservación, te llevas la sorpresa en el check in, tienen muchos bares fuera de funcionamiento y los q están solo venden bebidas sin licor.
La gran cantidad de personal de seguridad desde el ingreso y la desconfianza con que tratan a las personas realmente es muy desagradable y te hace sentir que no estás en un lugar seguro y que por eso tienen tanta seguridad, por lo que en cualquier momento puede pasar algo.
No puede ser que en pleno 2026 te pidan dejar la tarjeta física si quieres tener cuenta abierta o que para un solicitar un paño tengas que dejar 5 mil colones en efectivo, cuando ahora nadie anda efectivo, y no dan ninguna otra solución. Realmente deberían replantear algunas de las políticas en virtud de brindarle al cliente una excelente experiencia de servicio, todo esto deja mucho que desear.

name: Barceló Tambor
review_text:
Our experience at this resort was extremely disappointing due to a lack of customer service and several concerning issues during our stay.

Throughout the evenings, we were never offered beverages with dinner, and it was often difficult to get staff members to acknowledge us. The level of service consistently fell below expectations for a resort.

The condition of our room was also unacceptable. The bathroom ceiling was covered in black mold, which raised serious cleanliness and maintenance concerns.

Additionally, we had an unpleasant experience at the pool. After placing our towels and shirts on lounge chairs and entering the pool, we watched our belongings being tossed on the ground, and taking our chairs for other guests without any communication or explanation.

During our stay, several local guest informed us that the resort primarily caters to local visitors. We felt unwelcome as American guests throughout our visit.

As a result of these issues, we chose to leave the resort early. Although we had paid for a six-night stay, we departed after four nights and incurred an additional $500 in airfare costs to return home ahead of schedule.

The one positive aspect of our experience was the food, which was consistently very good. Unfortunately, the quality of the dining experience was not enough to offset the numerous service and accommodation concerns we encountered. Americans are definitely not welcome at Barcelo.

review_text: Muy excelente servicio atención y la comida muy buena

name: Furca
review_text: El lugar es estéticamente ideal y el mobiliario cómodo. La comida no está tan bien lograda para sus precios, pedimos un pato lejano a su punto, los cocteles tenían todos el mismo sabor y la pasta estaba levemente sobrecocida. Se supone que debiese ser una experiencia gastronómica expecional según su propia descripción pero deja mucho que desear. Si está de turista en San José es mejor ahorrar esta parada e ir a explorar alguna Soda local al centro.

name: Furca
review_text: We had a wonderful dining experience here, both yhe food and service were exemplary, the atmosphere and dining room were very comfortable I would recommend this restaurant to anyone visiting San Jose

name: Furca
review_text:
Lamento decir que para mi y mi pareja fuè una mala experiencia gastronomica empezando desde la llegada.
Nos recibiò una chica con lentes,nosotros no teniamos reserva,ella fuè a verificar que hubiera una mesa disponible,llegò diciendo que solo la barra,cuando a simple vista habian 6 mesas libres…nos miramos y le dijimos que no quieriamos comer a la barra, entonces nos llevò a una de las mesas libres,que por cierto se quedaron libres basta el cierre porque fuè el tiempo que durò nuestra cena
(llegamos a las 9.00pm).
Sentí todo muy raro casi discriminatorio porque tal vez estábamos vestidos casuales o por no tener reserva.
1. El pan de la casa fué terrible..la servilleta de tela que envolvía el pan estaba lavada y el calor del pan desprendió el jabón de ropa,el camarero apenado me dijo que no sabía que había pasado y que perdón..lo iba a cambiar y ese pan duró toda la noche en nuestra mesa y nunca lo cambiaron ni se lo llevaron.
2. Aperol Spritz…era básicamente vino con hielo,tomamos dos tragos nada más porque estaba completamente aguado
3. Carpaccio de Pulpo con kalamata y alcaparras,seco y salado que no pude comer más de tres bocados,mientras que
el plato vegetariano muy bueno,vegetales frescos y deliciosos…por dicha pude comer algo por la suma de 85 mil colones…botados en el basurero!
Soy Chef desde 27 años,italiana,vivo en costa Rica desde 22 años tengo tres restaurantes y me encanta comer bien y me gusta que valga la pena pagar por una buena cena,lamento mi experiencia,seguros a otras personas le fué mejor,pero empezando del trato,un consejo no todos aparentan ser quien realmente son,el cliente se chinea más cuando es la primera vez que entra en un lugar para que vuelva.
El restaurante es hermoso!

name: Furca
review_text:
Not a good experience
So called Rissoto, supposed to be almost 600 years old recipe destroyed with Tico version of Mexican origin Gourd
Bartender did a great job with cocktails
Servers are well trained to sell and insist instead of recommendations
Loud music makes impossible to talk
Supposed to be a fine restaurant, but felt an American Diner copy

name: Furca
review_text:
Best steak I’ve ever tried!
We came from Texas to visit San Jose.
This is absolutely delicious!!
Highly recommended !
Service is 10/10
Atmosphere 10/10
Many thanks to Jonathan, he is very kind.

name: Furca
review_text:
The guys at the bar are very cool and professional perfect for the atmosphere
Thanks guys ✌️

name: Furca
review_text:
Muy buen restaurante ubicado en San José en Costa Rica.
Tiene un ambiente muy agradable y un menú variado y bastante bueno.
Los postres y el menú de bebidas acompañan la comida como un perfecto maridaje.
De los mejores restaurantes que he conocido en San José.

name: Furca
review_text: Almoço perfeito e serviço impecável.

name: Furca
review_text:
This place has it all, ambience, fantastic drinks and amazing food!

Highly recommend!

name: Furca
review_text: Prepare your wallet. Not cheap!

name: Furca
review_text: Comida bien

name: Furca
review_text:
I’m very dissapointed. It seems Furca doesn’t like Babies. They sent us through the backyard to the backyard of the next Restaurant. Without telling or asking! The lady at the reception was too friendly to realize it in the first moment. Retroperspective a bit suspiciously friendly….
When we realized what just happened we went back to ask. And they simply said, that We don’t recommend this restaurat to anyone…

name: Furca
review_text: Excelente ambiente de amigos, familia, parejas, muy buenos platos, super bien atendidos. Lo recomiendo

name: Furca
review_text:
We had a delightful 3-course lunch at Furca. Service is attentive, food is great and nicely decorated.

The place is quiet full on a weekday lunch time, better book in advance.

A great restaurant to end our trip in Costa Rica before flying out.

name: Furca
review_text: "Let's go to dinner," they said. Hours later I reveled in the post dinner bliss of appetizers, wine, amazing aged beef, flavored salts, and exquisite wine, and fine company. Furca is fabulous from the parking spot to the guest bill. Memorable and marvelous.

name: Furca
review_text: We got into town late and this place is open until ten, a little later than others. We were walking in at 9:30 which I hate to do but they were kind enough to let us know kitchen is closing but if we hurry to order it won’t be a problem. I appreciated it and they were very nice about it. We tried to be quick and ordered a steak and truffle fries (amazing). I’d love to go back for a proper dinner and highly recommend it.

name: Furca
review_text: Heerlijk gegeten! Keuze uit meerdere vleessoorten waarvan ze geen standaard gewicht hebben. Het is dus afhankelijk van het gewicht hoeveel en wat je wilt eten. Wel heel mals! Pasta’s zijn heel lekker. Ook een lekkere cocktail op.

name: Furca
review_text: Excelente servicio y comida, Wilberth nos atendió increíble y estamos muy agradecidos con el. Excelente experiencia culinaria. El tour de la huerta fue muy interesante

name: Furca
review_text: This was easily one of the best meals, if not the absolute best, that I had while in San Jose. The cocktail program, and the bartender Luis, was outstanding, especially the smoky Negroni (definitely ask to see their cocktail booklet, because the photography in it is incredible). For the main course, I had the picanha steak, which was perfectly seasoned and paired beautifully with the chimichurri. The Gorgonzola mashed potatoes were a standout side, and the selection of homemade bread was a fantastic way to start the meal.

name: Furca
review_text: excelente servicio, ambiente agradable y comida con buen sabor. Buenas porciones

name: Furca
review_text: Gorgeous!! Must go.

name: Furca
review_text:
Excelente lugar, excelente comida, excelente atención.

Recomiendo los cortes de carne, la mayoría son para compartir entre unas 3 personas.

name: Furca
review_text: Excelente lugar, buenísima atención, comida fabulosa, hermosa atmósfera del lugar, súper recomendado

name: Furca
review_text: Buena experiencia gastronómica. La comida excelente y además un buen servicio.

name: Furca
review_text: Comida exquisita, siempre nos deleitamos con los platillos de este restaurante. La porción de los alimentos es muy onerosa. El servicio excelente y el lugar es muy acogedor. Como recomendación podrían poner lámparas mejor iluminadas en las mesas grandes, porque no se logra apreciar la presentación de los platillos.

name: Furca
review_text:
My wife and I rarely go out to really fancy restaurants. This was truly an experience off of the Food Network channel. The dry aged steak was incredible. They grow they mushrooms and have them on display in the restaurant. The garnishes in the sides were incredible as well.
More importantly and what we enjoyed the most was the great service. Furca is right next to its sister restaurant Nuca. Both Restaurants are owned by the same father son team. Marco, the lead chef and owner, was very accommodating and went out of his way to talk to us.
If you go, make sure to get the tour of the fresh herb garden and greenhouse between the two restaurants. We were thoroughly impressed and will be visiting again. The next time we return to San Jose.

name: Furca
review_text: Awesome experience, food was excellent and and service was incredible.   We highly recommend Furca for a 5 star night out.

name: Furca
review_text: De mis favoritos! Super ambiente, super servicio!

name: Furca
review_text: Loved every bite. Great vibe, delicious food , and great service.

name: Furca
review_text: Probably the best dinning experience we had in San Jose. Thank you, food was great. Hosts were very kind. Wish you all the best.

name: Furca
review_text:
I’m giving Furca four stars for a very enjoyable dining experience. The service was exceptionally warm and attentive, which immediately set a welcoming tone for the evening. The steak was outstanding, easily one of the best I’ve had, perfectly cooked and full of flavor. The mushroom tomato rice was a true standout and an absolute must try when visiting.

The shrimp, while well prepared, was fairly average compared to the other dishes. The smashed potatoes were slightly under seasoned and lacked the depth of flavor I was expecting.

Although the pricing leans toward the higher side, the overall experience was still refined and satisfying. I would certainly return, particularly for the steak and the attentive service.

name: Furca
review_text:
Exquisite steakhouse. Amazing cuts, top flavors & incredible mash.

really nice, classy and fine dining steakhouse, the presentation of the dishes and drinks is top notch and the flavors of the majority of entreees and appetizers we tried, were absolutely amazing. their mashed potatoes in both truffled and regular versions are a must try , and then you have a variety of cuts of meat that you can choose from that is worth the visit.

name: Furca
review_text: Not sure if it’s a culture thing but the staff here has horrible attitude apart from the horrible food wouldn’t recommend this restaurant

name: Furca
review_text: Furca is the restaurant that you go to for a special business dinner or to impress friends and family. You would assume service would be on par with the quality of the food. However this time, the waiter actually accused my date of lying about a wrong side dish and that he will speak to his manager to sort it out. Seriously? Make an issue over side dish? After I had ordered a $270 bottle of wine? My last point isn’t about entitlement rather I could have easily ordered another side dish and I have no need to make an excuse to correct the order. Setting aside the waiter, the food was very good, ambiance was relaxed-upscale, over-priced but appropriately priced if service was up to the task.

name: Furca
review_text: 10/10 Desde el servicio hasta la comida se nota la excelencia de sus colaboradores

name: Furca
review_text: Espectacular restaurante, el ambiente el servicio y las canes! Vale la pena conocer el proceso de madurado y los cultivos de setas.

name: Furca
review_text:
Incredible!!! I'm Mexican and they didn't let me enter!!! How sad that we continue to be racist in this century
Huge strike!!! He lost my Mexican pesos!!! I was with a group of 4 people, there were more than 10 tables available and they simply did not allow us entry,
How sad that we continue to live like this!

name: Furca
review_text: Excellent lamb chops and truffle mashed potatoes. Great service too. A couple of issues: the mashed potatos arrive almost cold. Twice already. The quantity of lamb shops is inconsistent: once 4 large chops, the second time 2 small ones. Also was served very rare when I ordered medium rare.

name: Furca
review_text:
C'était froid et sec.
Manquait de sauce et de fraîcheur dans l'assiette avec la pieuvre. Très déçue...

name: Furca
review_text: Excelente atención y servicio. La comida de alta calidad y mucha es cosechada en el local. Se recomienda solicitar el tour para conocer mas. La ubicación es cómoda. Las bebidas son muy buenas.

name: Furca
review_text: El servicio fue malo por mucho en comparación con otras ocasiones, los meseros nos apuraron como si ocuparan que nos fuéramos, el postre nos lo dieron con la cuenta prácticamente

name: Furca
review_text: Un lugar muy elegante, con un ambiente muy agradable. El servicio es de altísima calidad, la comida tiene un sabor espectacular y los cócteles son de otro nivel. Los precios si bien son elevados, se compensa con la experiencia culinaria.

name: Furca
review_text: If you are visiting from another country, always check the price in U.S. currency or the currency from where you come from before you order. Sometimes they raise the price when they realize you are from the U.S. or another country. This happened to me and my friends in Costa Rica when we went on vacation. . We went to this restaurant, and they overcharged us, thinking we wouldn’t notice. Be careful ! always check the price of each item you choose, not the total they will bring to you . In those countries, there are no strict rules or laws to protect you if they lie about the price.

name: Furca
review_text:
Es la segunda vez en Furca,nada que decir de la comida, la coctelería,excelente calidad. Sólo tengo dos observaciones,la primera esque al llegar el mesero muy amable te ofrece agua gasificada o mineral,escogemos mineral y nos trae un botella. Después de un rato regresa con una bandeja de panes y dice "cortesía del chef",por lo cual decimos que sí.
Al final cuando se pagó la cuenta notamos que nos cobraron la botella con agua mineral (o sea de tubo) y la bandeja de panes que se ofreció como cortesía. Entiendo que al ser de cierta gama el restaurante uno asume que hay un rango de precios,pero me parece que cobrar por agua de tubo y una cortesía,no es lo correcto y direccionar el servicio del staff del restaurante a ello,tampoco.

name: Furca
review_text:
Best restaurant in San Jose
Rumor is they are opening a location in Guanacaste I hope it’s true

name: Furca
review_text:
De verdad. No hay como
No ir a Costa Rica y no passar un almuerzo en ese
Restaurant. Perfecto

name: Furca
review_text: Smoke and mirrors. The restaurant was super beautiful, all the food was mediocre. Have had better food from street vendors that understand flavor and balance better than this smoke show restaurant. Don’t get the short ribs, everyone agreed the sauce was weird tasting, too sweet , and the meat was pure fat. Go back to cooking class furca

name: Furca
review_text:
Great potential but, in general the food was very heavy and overly dependent on fats, even the baby vegetables were swimming in oil.  The seasoning on the puréed camote was overpowering also.

The service was nice but information on the items placed on the table could have been better and would have added to the experience.  The wine was good but expensive considering the shallow pour!

name: Furca
review_text:
I used to really enjoy coming here. But the everything has gone downhill. The lates was that my friend and I ordered a ribeye 800 gram steak and ask for it to be medium rare, but emphasized that we wanted it to be cooked. It came out blue and cold.

When the waiter saw we were disappointed, his solution was to bring out a hot plate for us to cook our own meat. We paid 267 for a meal that was so under rated.

I used to recommend out of town friends to come here, but that will not longer be the case.

Too much money for low quality.

name: Furca
review_text: Esta vez tuvimos una mala experiencia. Impensable pero así fue. Nos dejaron sin atender, el corte de carne de cocción regular, grasosa (a la parrilla?). Lo informamos pero nos ignoraron. Concluimos una baja de categoría. Quedaron por debajo de la línea de regresar.

name: Furca
review_text: This restaurant has the best steak and tiramisu I’ve ver had. The ingredients are extremely fresh and high quality. The menu items are creative. The service and atmosphere are super. Highly recommend!!

name: Furca
review_text: La comida es increíble. Tienen una gran selección de vinos. El servicio impecable

name: Furca
review_text: Very expensive and didn't like the food

name: Furca
review_text: Amazing tasty experience. Excellent service. Great atmosphere.

name: Furca
review_text: Great dining experience

name: Furca
review_text: Un elegante lugar, con un menú excelente!

name: Furca
review_text: El día de ayer fue mi primera vez en Furca y desde que llegué me recibieron con una copa de vino espumante demasiado amables y atentos desde inicio a fin, la comida que les digo no se pueden ir sin probar los pancitos, las carnes, los camarones demasiado deliciosos, al final caminamos para ver alrededor nos explicaron los diferentes tipos de hongos que habían al igual con las carnes todos una atención excepcional chineada me sentí 👌

name: Furca
review_text: Actualización, volví 6 años después, la comida nada sorprendente, la atención muy lenta o diría extremadamente lenta por ejemplo 25 minutos para una bebida, la carne como un chicle, los acompañamientos para nada sorprendentes, EN RESUMEN: EL PEOR BALANCE ENTRE PRECIO Y CALIDAD.

name: Furca
review_text: Excelente restaurante, un ambiente muy acogedor, el servicio es demasiado bueno, te recomiendan platillos y te explican. Las carnes son de muy buena calidad y las traen en los términos requeridos. Sin lugar a dudas, un lugar para repetir.

name: Furca
review_text: Wow. Most unique experience

name: Furca
review_text:
Loved everything, food was great and the Service was excellent.
The exquisite cocktails are amazing with great presentation. Smoked negroni, furca sensual, vodka y piña, kefir drop.

name: Furca
review_text: They veganized some of the vegetarian options and it was delicious!!!

name: Furca
review_text: well organized. loved everything we ordered

name: Furca
review_text:
This place is extremely good! Everything was perfect: the atmosphere, the decorations, the service, the live music...
I wanted to celebrate a special occasion with my business partners so I invited them here because I had heard of this place multiple times but never got the chance to come. I'm happy I chose this place, the food is INCREDIBLE! starting with the presentation, which is phenomenal, with every small detail carefully planned. And then the food is a different level, the meat cooked to perfection, the bread, desserts, cocktails... I'm salivating just by writing this review.
I HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS PLACE!
Can't wait to go back, it's worth every penny.

name: Furca
review_text: Arrived without a reservation on a Tuesday night. Seated immediately and greeted by bartender Luis. Very cool atmosphere and decor. Open kitchen and even visible mushroom grow op going on. The sensual drink was the first thing I tasted and it immediately set the tone. Extremely unique. The best dish by far was the marinated octopus. I also highly recommend spending the extra few colones for the chefs bread tasting. All around I couldn't have asked for more. I will remember Furca.

name: Furca
review_text: Impecable el servicio, más bien exageradamente bueno! El dominio, el conocimiento, la atención y el esmero de los camareros es algo de admirar y disfrutar! El sitio 10/10 la comida 10/10 las instalaciones 10/10 (el madurador de carnes, el de los hongos, la huerta) una experiencia muy buena y repetible ! Recomendado !!

name: Furca
review_text: Tout simplement l’un des meilleurs restos que nous avons eu la chance d’essayer. Ambiance exceptionnelle, personnel courtois et attentionné. La nourriture est remarquable. Un resto chic mais décontracté à la fois. Nous recommandons à 100 %!

name: Furca
review_text: Fantastic rooftop in good area of Guatemala City. The service was great. Food was fresh but not to my taste

name: Furca
review_text: Siempre es un robusto 10 🙌🏻👏🏻

name: Furca
review_text: If you want some of the best steak and food in CR, this is one of the places to spend money at.  Service, food, and atmosphere is top!  You will pay for it but it will be worth every dime!

name: Furca
review_text: Todo delicioso!!!!

name: Furca
review_text: Exquisito restaurante

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: I had the absolute perfect experience during my stay! All the staff (checkin, kitchen and dining room, concierge, and housekeeping) were elite. 10/10.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text:
Muy lindo hotel histórico con buen servicio.
Las habitaciones muy espaciosas y super limpio en todas las areas.
El buffet estaba variado y Rico, la fruta muy fresca.
La ubicación es conveniente para moverte fácil si deseas explorar San José.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Such a beautiful hotel.  The staff was fantastic!

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: The hotel was centrally located, walking distance to several areas of interest. I was also single female solo traveler and walked around at night and felt completely safe around the hotel and other areas, there were security people everywhere. The hotel was clean, the restaurant was nice, food was good. Breakfast had large assortment of different foods so it would be difficult to not find something for every taste bud. I also saw comments about no privacy for bathroom, Although I was alone, it was not as dramatic as people said. Yes it is frosted glass for shower and toilet area, but seems you would have to be pressed right up against it to actually see anything. Does it make sense to have frosted glass? No, but its not a deal breaker. I also read comments that 5th floor was cold in restaurant,  temp seemed fine to me. And I never experienced any problems with WIFI/Internet connections inside/outside room,  or anywhere around the city.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Great location. Disappointing showers and lack of robes but very friendly staff and walkable to many sites. Definitely check out the National Theatre!

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: We stayed here for our honeymoon! it was an incredible experience! they upgraded us to a honeymoon suite and we were greeted by chocolate covered strawberries! the service is incredible, the hotel is beautiful and with lovely amenities, and the location is perfect. and the breakfast buffet is incredible!

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Marcela was great. She was always available to help us.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Wenceslao Pérez is great. His attention to detail and Customer Service is top notch

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Hotel is very nice with all the usual amenities, restaurant for breakfast is very good, excellent views of the city.|Had the chance to interact with Wenceslao during breakfast, very helpful and pleasant.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Uninterested in a solo traveler looking to dine at the hotel. Terrible customer service!

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Excellent service, and attention

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Fantastic welcome from Daniel and wonderful recommendations. We travel a lot and it is really refreshing when you are recommended things that really exceed your expectations.||Daniel really did this -   thanks so much

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: No hay spa, los empleados son muy atentos. Hay gimnasio.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Excelente servicio del señor Wenceslao muy atento en todo👍.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Wenceslao at Curio 5 provided outstanding service during our visit. He was attentive, welcoming, and made sure we had everything we needed the entire time. The food was amazing and full of flavor, making the experience even better. Thank you, Wenceslao, for the excellent hospitality , highly recommend!

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Very bad reception on May 8, 2026 by the two male attendants in the lobby. Walking with friends through downtown San José. Stopped by the hotel and asked the attedants a question (in Spanish) about its history. They completely ignored us. As if we were not there. They were totally rude to a potential guest. Perhaps we did not look the part.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Our stay at Gran Hotel Costa Rica was absolutely incredible from start to finish. The hotel has the perfect combination of elegance, comfort, and authentic Costa Rican hospitality. The location is unbeatable, right in the heart of San José and within walking distance of so many attractions.

A very special thank you to Juan Carlos, the manager, for making our experience truly memorable. His professionalism, attention to detail, and genuine care for guests really stand out. You can tell he leads an amazing team, because every single staff member we interacted with was friendly, attentive, and always willing to help with a smile.

We also loved the tour desk experience. The team there helped us organize amazing tours and activities, making everything super easy and stress-free. Their recommendations were excellent and helped us experience the best of Costa Rica.

Highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting San José. We will definitely be back! 🇨🇷✨

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: I’m torn on this hotel. The customer service was A+. We arrived and were quickly ushered to the 5th floor where their check-in desk is located. The hotel itself is beautiful and the lobby area on the 5th floor has views of the city from all around. However, the hotel itself gives me mixed feelings. Let’s sum it up for my friends with ADHD. ||Likes: ||- The exterior and interior decorations are beautiful. Lots of history here - JFK stayed here when he visited the country in the 60’s and there are pieces of memorabilia everywhere. It’s pretty cool!||- Customer service is top notch. Everyone we ran into was extremely friendly and courteous. ||- The breakfast buffet is great and has lots of options. The folks working in the bar area and buffet were some of the friendliest people we ran into there. ||Dislikes: ||- This hotel is for those who want to spend their day outdoors in the city. There is *nothing* to do here. The restaurant is insanely overpriced (30 dollars for a cocktail CAD) and their meal prices are just as bad. However, ALL of Costa Rica is overpriced regardless of where you go so I can’t lay full blame on the hotel but it is highway robbery regardless of how you look at it. ||- Why do I want to watch my spouse have a visit to the toilet? The room is set up with a frosted toilet room, sink, and a frosted shower that abuts the bed. They both leave *nothing* to the imagination. I like privacy when I’m in the toilet. You don’t get that here. It’s weird. I do not recommend this hotel for anyone that is not a couple (or at least this room style) because if you weren’t friends before, you’ll be close friends after. ||- You can’t go out at night. Don’t do it. So you’re left to your own devices for, sundown until sun up. There’s nothing to do at the hotel other than the overpriced bar and restaurant. ||I’m giving this 4 stars because the staff do what they can with what they have. I personally would never stay here again.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Es una de las experiencias más bonitas, acogedoras y alimentos deliciosos.|Siempre hay variedad y la atención de Marcela, Mauricio y Wenceslao impecable

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Buen servicio y amabilidad del personal del restaurante con mucha variedad de comida.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Tuvimos una experiencia magnífica en el desayuno buffet de este hotel. La variedad de alimentos fue excelente, todo fresco, delicioso y muy bien presentado. El ambiente fue agradable y el servicio impecable. Queremos destacar especialmente la atención de Marcela y Wenceslao, quienes fueron sumamente amables, atentos y profesionales, haciendo que nuestra mañana fuera aún más especial. Sin duda, una experiencia que recomendamos y que nos encantaría repetir.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Ambiente tranquilo y silencioso. Fui con mi hijo de 6 años y la pasamos bien.|En el restaurante Wenceslao nos atendió de maravilla

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text: Our recent weekend conference at this venue was a positive experience. We understand that this establishment, dating back to 1930, is among San Jose's oldest hotels. While its age is apparent, it remains a perfectly suitable option for accommodation. Its proximity to key attractions and various dining establishments is a notable advantage, offering convenient pedestrian access. The guest rooms are well-maintained and satisfactory.

name: Gran Hotel Costa Rica, Curio Collection by Hilton
review_text:
Overall, this has been a disappointing Curio stay.

While I didn’t have much with me when I checked in, there was no offer to help bring anything to my room. Perhaps the caliber of service for San Jose is different than that of properties in other cities, I was a bit surprised by this detail.

Next, the TV in my room was broken. When I reached out regarding the issue, someone came to review it quickly, which was great. He asked me what time he could come the next day to replace it and I said midday would be great. However, I came back to the room and he didn’t actually replace it. I had to take even more time to reach out to the front desk and have a second person come to actually replace it. Kevin replaced it quickly and was quite helpful thankfully. A small detail, but once it was replaced I came to learn that the TV didn’t have any apps loaded to it aside from a web browser. It seems a bit odd that there wouldn’t be any options like Netflix or Youtube.

Third, for any Amex Platinum cardholders, this property offers a $100 credit to be used at the property, but it can only be used at their one restaurant. It would be nice to have some flexibility here, like being able to apply it to room service.

Last, I’m begging hotels to bring back real bathroom doors. While nobody accompanied me on this stay, it would be ideal to have more of a separation than a thin wall of glass.
