review_text: Para visitar este Parque Nacional y poder ver el cráter despejado solo es cuestión de suerte, he visitado este lugar varias veces y en ocasiones no lo he podido ver despejado, pero esta vez pudimos ver el cráter y la laguna. Al ser un volcán tan activo recomiendo visitarlo apenas tengan la oportunidad, siempre es una experiencia muy tranquila y bonita.

name: Poás Volcano

Aunque dice que tiene aforo limitado nunca se llena por lo que es conveniente reservar el mismo día asegurándose que no esté nublado el día de la visita. Solo se compran entradas por la página web. El lugar muy bonito, cuidado y con olor a azufre.

name: Poás Volcano
review_text:
Este volcán es todo un espectáculo natural e impresionante. Es un lugar de fácil acceso, con parqueo y seguridad.
Recomendado comprar entradas con anticipación en la página del SINAC, y calcular ir temprano para evitar que a media mañana se nuble.

name: Poás Volcano
review_text: Volcán Poás es una visita muy recomendable en Costa Rica. El acceso es fácil y bien organizado, y el cráter es impresionante, con vistas espectaculares cuando el clima lo permite. Además, la vista del lago es muy bonita. La experiencia es corta pero muy impactante, ideal para combinar con otros planes en la zona.

review_text: Un privilegio que tenemos los costarricenses de tener un volcán activo que se puede visitar durante casi todo el año y que siempre se puede admirar su imponente cráter, uno de los más grandes del mundo

name: Poás Volcano
review_text: It's a great experience to visit the Poas volcano. It would be recommended to buy your tickets online before getting there. There is plenty of parking space. The tourist center have a lot of souvenirs, snacks, food and beverages. I would recommend to bring a good sweater and something to cover from the rain. There are a few trails to visit the active crater and the extinct one, which has a lagoon now. I hope you are lucky to have a clear view, it gets easily couldy here. This a great option for one day tour close to the airport.

name: Poás Volcano

name: Poás Volcano
review_text:
Phantastisch bei schönen Wetter!
Wir hatten Glück, mit Sonne und blauen Himmel konnte man den Krater wunderbar sehen!
Tickets muss man im voraus online bestellen, zahlen vor Ort nicht möglich!
Parkgebühr kann man aber bar oder mit Karte zahlen!
Vom Parkplatz aus ist ein ein kurzer Spaziergang bis zum Krater! Es gibt weitere Wanderwege, z. B. zum Lagunensee, der auch sehr schön und sehenswert ist!

name: Poás Volcano
review_text: Vstopnico sva kupila vnaprej, saj jo lahko le preko neta, če je nimaš ne moreš vstopiti. To je čisti nateg in poneumljanje ljudi, saj če je vreme oblačno in deževno vidiš le meglo. Denarja za nič ti ne vrne nihče. Ker tam ni signala, je tudi ne moreš kupiti pred vstopom. Midva sva za par sekund sicer videla vulkan, a veliko ljudi za nama in tudi prej ni videlo nič. Slab sistem, kjer je precej očitno le pobiranje denarja tako za vstopnino kot parkirnino. Zelo slabo, tudi ob nični vidljivosti in dežju laziš na rob kraterja kjer se počutiš kot idiot. Pišete popotniki, da dobiš čelado, a midva je nisva in tudi drugi je niso imeli. Na robu kraterja  nisva imela omejitve časa na 20 minut. Bila pa sva v lastni režiji.  Ne priporočam- če bi lahko dala manj kot eno zvezdico, bi dala manj.

name: Poás Volcano
review_text: Es toda una suerte lograr ver el cráter del volcán pero si lo logras valdrá la pena. Hay un sitio web para ver en vivo el estado del volcán y así calcular si las nubes te dejarán verlo.

name: Poás Volcano
review_text: Spectacular crater views!! Very easy trail with kids and stroller friendly. Must visit being so close from San Jose.

name: Poás Volcano
review_text: Amazing and awe-inspiring views. Only a short walk from the car park. Worth waiting as when the clouds clear, the view is stunning. A lovely coffee shop, perfect for a stop off to warm up after and also a fifty shop. There is a really great museum under the coffee shop too. Very interesting.

name: Poás Volcano
review_text: Worth the hype 100%

name: Poás Volcano
review_text: Not really worth the money.

name: Poás Volcano
review_text:
Spectacular view🌋 It was rainy and foggy when I visited, but I got really lucky that the sky cleared up after waiting for a while :)

I see comments complaining about waiting at the entrance, tickets not available, or not being able to see the volcano due to the weather. I understand the disappointment after a long way to get here but please do some research before visiting! It’s a very touristy national park, of course it’s crowded, so highly recommended to book tickets beforehand. The local climate is just very rainy, and no one can precisely predict the weather. So please check the weather in advance and be patient if nothing’s visible at first. Best of luck to everyone who's going to visit!

name: Poás Volcano
review_text:
Lo recomiendo, la entrada cuesta $15 más IVA ( se debe de comprar en línea)
Se camina para el cráter unos 15 min, o menos.
Tiene senderos de dificultad media, para ir a ver su segundo cráter convertido en laguna.

El clima es agradable, tiene una sala de exposicion a cerca del Volcán y una tienda de souvenirs.

Puede llegar todo tipo de automóvil, se cancela 3,000 o 6000 colones (no recuerdo muy bien) de parqueo.

review_text: 포아스 화산은 코스타리카 중부에 위치한 활화산입니다. 수도 산호세에서 북서쪽으로 약 50km 떨어져 있어 접근성이 좋습니다. 해발 약 2,697~2,708m에 달하며, 세계에서 가장 큰 활화산 분화구 중 하나입니다. 분화구에는 매우 산성이 강한 화산 호수가 있습니다. 1828년 이후 40번 넘게 분화했으며, 코스타리카에서 가장 활발한 화산 중 하나입니다. 2017년 4월과 2025년 4월에 강력한 분화가 발생하여 대피령이 내려지기도 했습니다.

review_text: I've had a lot of empanadas around the world and this was the best ive ever had! Coffee and service were excellent as well. The owner and his staff made a lasting impression with their generosity and conversation. Look forward to returning on a future visit.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Our favorite place in La Fortuna! Best breakfast and coffee we had during our stay. Dinner was incredible too! Highly recommend.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Food coffee, limited choices for food and none of the things in those pics were available to us.  Not on a package or anything like that, we paid for our order.  It seems most of these places have the same thing on the menu to the item, it's very strange.  I wonder if you have to ask or flash the signal or know the handshake to get the good stuff.  The place was ok just nothing special.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Red Frog Coffee Roasters quickly became our go-to breakfast spot in La Fortuna. We had the Gallo Pinto Completo, and it was hands down one of the best breakfasts we had during our trip, fresh, flavorful, and perfectly done.

What really stood out was how accommodating they were with my friend’s allergies. The staff took it seriously, made adjustments without hesitation, and made us feel completely comfortable dining there.

We tried a few other breakfast spots earlier in our stay, but after coming here once, we didn’t go anywhere else for the rest of the trip. That says everything.

Highly recommend if you’re looking for great coffee, authentic flavors, and genuinely attentive service.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
Hands down, 10/10, best food we had in La Fortuna. We came here twice for breakfast (and wanted to go a third but didn't realize they close on Wednesdays)! Their fruit is so fresh, they had the best mango I've ever eaten, still dreaming about it. Service was great, smoothies were amazing, everything was 10/10.

No notes — this place is the BEST!!!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Good food, great location, fun atmosphere.  One complaint: Cost Rica is 100% known for its amazing coffee.  I ordered coffee, black with no sugar.  It was warm like bath water.  Notified our server and she simply said that's the way it is there.  No offer to heat it up or try and correct the situation.  Also, we speak spanish so there was no communications issues.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Food was good (though pricey). Owner needs to take some customer service lessons.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: So good we didnt get a picture before the food and drinks were cleared. Solid amount of seating, plenty of options, and friendly staff!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
The food overall was good, and the quality met expectations. However, the pricing was somewhat inconsistent. The traditional “soda-style” dishes were reasonably priced and offered good value for money, especially considering the portion sizes and authenticity. It was also helpful that there was a clearly marked section on the menu dedicated specifically to these soda dishes.

That said, the prices for many of the other menu items were disproportionately high and did not seem justified compared to what was offered. This created a noticeable imbalance and made the overall dining experience feel less fair from a value perspective.

The biggest downside, however, was the service. Unfortunately, we encountered a staff member who came across as extremely unfriendly and unmotivated. There was little sense of hospitality or willingness to engage, which significantly affected the atmosphere and left a negative impression. Good service can elevate even an average meal, but in this case, it had the opposite effect.

Overall, while the food itself was enjoyable, the pricing structure and especially the poor service detract from what could have been a much better experience.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: We came here every day during our stay in La Fortuna. Authentic food and genuinely the best coffee I have ever had in my life. Ask Roy for an espreso doble machado and you will not be disappointed. Great options for everyone in my group.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Just want to say these people are really kind, helpful & willing to assist in directing you to other businesses as well. Beautiful café & beautiful environment. Thank you my brother for helping us!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Great food, and it has a gift shop that is alot more affordable then most places in that area.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Loved our breakfast here. We had gallo pinto platter with smoothies. The food was fresh and yum!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Tuve una mala experiencia en su local, el ambiente era bueno, tranquilo y relajante, mencionar que la actitud del gerente fue de respeto y buena atención hacia mi persona. Sin embargo, la atención que obtuvimos por parte de mesero fue mala, grosera, apresurada, se sintio ese constante "Coma rapido", mi pareja tuvo una situación con esta persona a la hora de retirar los platos, ya que el mio fue el primero en retirar, luego los de nuestros amigos. Ella tuvo que recalcar "yo como despacio", para que dejara la necedad, posteriormente, agarro el bolso de mi pareja sin su consentimiento y lo puso en otro lado. Ya cuando todos habiamos finalizado de comer, de la manera mas grotesca, se mete en la conversación con la cuenta a cobrarme, cuando ni siquiera habia pasado 2 minutos de finalizar la cena, a uno de mis amigos le hizo arrebatado el plato de la boca, sin preguntar, la actitud del mesero siempre fue apresurado. Puedo llegar a entender que ya querian cerrar, primero que nada era a las 6:30 pm que llegamos a su local, despues siento que hubiese sido mejor que sean honestos y digan "No podemos atenderlos, porque ya es tarde y estamos proximos a cerrar". Antes de dar ese pesimo servicio.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Staff were nice and friendly. The cocktails were really nice and reasonably priced and it has a great little gift shop inside too.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Great spot to start your day in the area! Coffee was fantastic as well as our breakfast. The beans being roasted right there was definitely an added bonus.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Honestly one of the worst restaurant experiences We’ve had in Costa Rica. The service was very disappointing. Overall, the experience was poor and not what we expected. I would not recommend this place.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Very good coffee

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
Comida exquisita. Muy amables.
El cafe con hielo estaba buenísimo.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
Don't go if vegan. Saw reviews showing vegan breakfast, got seated then given really poor attitude from waitress when asking for vegan breakfast burrito and fruit plate.
Go to Organico La Fortuna instead- expensive but very good!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: The house coffee, roasted fresh was absolutely exceptional. The food was also fantastic and reasonably priced.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Best drip coffee I’ve ever had and a very welcoming barista.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Bardzo dobry burger! Polecam!😃

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Overrated and I don't see the hype. We were so excited to try due to the good reviews, but we're highly disappointed. The food was dry and flavorless, and the service was almost non existent. It might have been an off day for them,  but this was definitely our least favorite meal during our week stay in La Fortuna.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Un día pedimos unos burritos para desayunar y estaba bien, aunque carísimos’ Al día siguiente volvimos porque por la zona no había mucho más abierto temprano y  pedimos desayuno americano y para vomitar, las tortitas mojadas y malísimas, el bacon podía ser lo que fuera menos bacon y el precio desorbitado. Complicado comer más días aquí.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
Petit restaurant en bord de route.
Nous avons vu un peu de tout en commentaires.
Nous avons très bien mangé, les empanadas étaient délicieux et très copieux. Le café excellent et le service très sympathique.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: I’ve been here a few times and loved it every time. Great friendly service and yummy food.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Delicious and affordable food! 🍲 came here because of all the positive reviews, and was very content. The chicken fried rice was a huge portion! Actually loved the fries+rice+salad combo. The mango juice was good🤭 service was ok

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Coffee is good! Vibes fantastic.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: The food here is amazing for breakfast. I would highly recommend the hashbrowns and banana bread. While you have your traditional plates that in my opinion use high quality ingredients here. The most tasty things on the menu for me were the sides of hashbrowns and banana bread. As well they sell really great coffee beans.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: The food is delicious and the coffee is even better! We went back for a second visit to order coffee and buy beans to take home. It’s some of the best coffee I have had and far better than what I can get in the stores at home.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Wir waren zum frühstücken hier, die Portionen sind groß und die Preise in Ordnung. Das Gallo Pinto war sehr gut, das American breakfast war okay, allerdings haben die Pancakes nicht sehr gut geschmeckt und waren trocken (eher wie eine Backmischung). Der Kaffee war gut, aber nichts außergewöhnliches. Der Service war je nach Mitarbeiter freundlich und es gibt einen kleinen Souvenirshop im Restaurant.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: My family dined here for lunch on our first day in La Fortuna.  We picked it largely because of the name (I like frogs) but I'm so glad we did.  The food was great, they had a kid's menu and had coffee drinks which were wonderful.  There's even a little gift shop in the back.  I'd recommend Monkey iced coffee.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Great place for iced coffee! You can eat & drink here or get coffee to go. The staff speak excellent English. Also a cute souvenir shop in the back. Good prices too. I highly recommend it.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Both the food & service was great. HIGHLY recommend ordering the shrimp tacos and the banana flan. The coffee was amazing too!!! Some of the best food I had in costa rica

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: This is the best place to get authentic coffee. They roast the beans right there (see the photo), which makes it even better. It’s my favourite coffee spot in the area. I also had a really nice conversation during my visit. Thank you! I’ll definitely be back!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Practical place but quite cold service and food wasn't anything better than most sodas.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Loved the vibe as soon as we entered! They had a ton of menu options and loved the quality of the food! There was a mistake with my order and they fixed it right away! Coffee was fantastic!! and love the little gift shop within the restaurant!! Great vibe and service! I highly reccommend!!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Interesting restaurant.  Great setting.  Fantastic coffee (med or strength strength).  Restaurant is absolutely a tourist trap though.  My breakfast came with salsa and jalapeno.  I recvd 2 tablespoons of salsa 1 ONE SLICE RING OF JALAPENO PEPPER .  Just 1 thin slice of jalapeno amazed me.    Service was just ok.  Saw our waitress at order then delivery.  Had to ask another waiter for more coffee.  2nd waiter was on point.  La Fortuna if full of restaurants,  we will go somewhere else for the week.  But only for coffee is the best.  They roast their own beans...you can watch in the bar area.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Very average service and food. Really slow, we waited for 30 minutes. And the cashier argued with us about service fee and 16 cents. We will never recommend it.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: We had a great breakfast here. Special thanks to Roy and David to suprise our friend on her birthday with a piece of cheesecake 😍 Muchas gracias

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: The food was okay, not great.  The waitress was fine, not overly kind.  I'd recommend Soda Rodriguez, Saffron, Empanadas Argentinas instead.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Nice breakfast! We had the gallo pinto with eggs and it was very good. Also liked the drink options for breakfast.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
Red Frog Coffee Roaster was an excellent find. The food was delicious, very filling, and generously portioned — especially considering how reasonable the prices are. The quality you receive for the cost truly stands out.

The service was friendly and efficient, and everything was prepared quickly without sacrificing flavor. The coffee was amazing, and the natural fresh juices were just as impressive. It was so good that I came back the very next day.

I also loved that they have a small shop inside the restaurant with souvenirs and useful items for travelers. It’s such a thoughtful touch and very convenient for guests during their trip.

Overall, I would gladly return. Highly recommended for great food, excellent coffee, and a welcoming atmosphere.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Wonderful food, reasonable prices and an intentive staff. The owner Roy was very kind and eager to get to know his clients. Would definitely return!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Guter Kaffee und sehr leckerer Kuchen

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Great food and ambiance. Reasonable pricing for the area. Shrimp taco was a special and unique style of making a taco and hueco rachero was better more even flavor. The juices were good the pithaya was def our fav it's also a local fruit.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Excellent

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Awesome food and coffee, lovely staff - local prices

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: great service, delicious food & the pina colada was fantastic

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: The coffee and traditional Costa Rican breakfast were delicious. The owner is also very kind and personable, he made us feel extremely welcomed. I would recommend this place to other travellers.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Excellent breakfast and coffee. Coffee roasted onsite , what a way to start the day! The eggs are the best and always the freshest fruit! Staff is wonderful!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: J’ai adoré cet endroit! J’y suis allé pour déjeuner car je trouvais que c’est celui qui offrait le plus de choix et options qui se rapprochaient le plus de déjeuner « américains ». J’ai adoré l’endroit et le service je le recommande à tout le monde.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Oubliez le café à cet endroit. Allez plutôt chez Vita.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Patacones are to die for!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Perfect stop for a quick and tasty breakfast or lunch too. Incredible coffee you can’t also purchase beans if you’d like! Our hotel breakfast wasn’t great so we made a quick stop and I’m grateful we did.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Our favorite spot in the area during our 3 night stay - we came here twice. Coffee was great (you can see them roasting beans onsite) and the Gallo Pinto breakfasts were amazing. They were also able to easily accommodate my partner who is vegan. Servers were lovely as well. If you need breakfast and coffee in La Fortuna, this is the spot.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Very good place for breakfast!  If you enjoy good bold coffee, do not miss the strong coffee.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: We had a great visit while staying in La Fortuna. The fresh juices and coffee were amazing. I also highly recommend the quesadillas if you’re looking for a lunch option.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Bad vibes and scammy. Got charged 6000 for a black coffee instead of 1800 which was the price listed on the menu, making the coffee more expensive than my main dish which was 4000. When I questioned it they just said ‘you had an Americano right?’ Implying it was correct. I didn’t question further but I got the impression it was just opportunistic given I was a solo female

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: The only place we ate that the food arrived fast. The Gallo pinto was good, the coffee wasn't for my taste

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Stopped in to grab coffee hostess was kind of rude. Made us re-park the car a few times which I understand because parking is tight there is no one else in the store not sure if she was expecting us to sit down, but it seemed like we were always in the way. Coffee was quite acidic. Not sure if it was just the one latte that we received but a few bags of coffee let’s see how they are once we get home. Others have had a great experience here. It just didn’t hit us the same.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Good food, good presentation,  great options for vegetarians. The servers are overwhelmed with the outdated processes. Many unique coffee options. Took us 90 minutes to get lunch, but it was worth it!

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
Service antipathique et erreur dans la commande, nous avons reçu un plat au lieu de deux. Pas d’excuse de la part de la serveuse et elle nous dit qu’il aurait fallu attendre à nouveau longtemps pour recevoir le second plat.
Cuisine moyenne, un peu fade.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: Very slow service. Waiter mixed up orders constantly.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text:
Hashbrown Breakfast - simple what you’d expect.

Burrito breakfast - hearty with great sauce.

Coffee was burnt.

name: Red Frog Coffee Roasters
review_text: This place did not live up to it's rating. I ordered a bacon breakfast burrito and it didn't have one piece of bacon it in. It was mostly rice and beans with a tiny bit of egg and an even smaller bit of cheese. The coffee was disappointing from a "roaster", and the smoothie was watered down. The service was pretty slow as well. Costa Rica is beautiful and seems safe, but the food absolutely sucks compared to Mexico.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Very good quality food!!!! Awesome service

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Even with a hiccup with the food, the staff made up for it. Eddie was amazing. Recommended!

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: The food is very good, a bit expensive but is good

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Finalmente una steakhouse que hace las cosas bien.

El New York steak estaba cocido correctamente, en el término solicitado, con buen sabor y buena textura. Servicio sólido y consistente.

Buen detalle el pan con mantequilla, los acompañamientos completos (incluido balsámico), una ensalada fresca que realmente vale la pena comer, y un puré de papa bien hecho como acompañamiento.

En general, una experiencia muy buena y coherente: carne bien preparada, buenos acompañamientos y servicio correcto. Una verdadera steakhouse bien ejecutada.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Really good steaks.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: ¡Excelente para celebrar cumpleaños!

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Si gustas o eres una persona amantes de comer buenas 🍖   este es el lugar para ti.

Dos personas  un gasto no menor a 50 mil

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Todo bien, aunque el servicio es algo lento y olvidaron un platillo

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: 100% recomendado la comida es muy rica!

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: It is good for special occasions but expensive, not so good for just a regular meal. Decent food, nice atmosphere.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Excelente cortes de carne a la parrilla. La calidad, el servicio y el ambiente son de primera.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Excellent. Love the tomahawk.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: La carne es excelente nada que envidiarle a restaurantes del doble de caros cerca de la zona.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: I went for a work dinner and the food was very simple for the price. Also the dessert, an apple pancake was ugly

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Excelente

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: 1ST time in Costa Rica Our Hotel the Hilton Garden Sugested.  I can said enough,Alexandria took care of our table and she was  awesome, very friendly, honest. The food oh Was delicious. Everything was so good and I am picky 🤭we order the Lomito Mar Y Tierra plates come with  two side. And I can't said  enough. Also the Flan Was delicious very nice presentation. the atmosphere you can eat out side or inside is very garden style. Love it!

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: After sending the steak back orderd med, came well done. Came back again in a rare. Really not sure what to say. But the bread basket was good.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Savoury but cold. Everything is about 2 levels more rare than you would like. Service cold as the food. It is great for Instagram though.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Very bad meat

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Muy buena comida y servicio. Lo recomiendo.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Good dinner and fast service.  I recommend.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Materia prima de primera calidad. Javier se ha portado genial. Muy recomendable!!

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: De los mejores cortes de carne que he probado!!!

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Lugar para disfrutar con amigos y familia

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Mala atención. Los meseros son clásicas.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Bien

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Recomendado 👍🤗😋

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Cumplió con las expectativas que llevaba del lugar,  me encantó el servicio,  son muy atentos y amables 😊.
Lo recomiendo si quieren un ambiente acogedor y tranquilo. Felicidades 👏

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: The service was good but the NY Steak was very tough to eat and the restaurant is expensive.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Me encanta 😍😊.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
El restaurante es precioso

Pedí el corte recomendado en término medio. Llegó 3/4 y la verdad para ese precio esperaba una mejor carne. Si regreso sería para café pero no para carnes.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: I came here for dinner and ordered the Asado de Tira. The meat was really tender and delicious! It was also plenty to eat, which made me happy I didn’t order an appetizer since I was unable to finish it all. Our server was very kind and attentive. I’ll definitely be back when I visit San Jose again

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: This is a very beautiful restaurant, the food is delicious. There are a lot of people, and perhaps that's why the waiters are not very friendly. We spent about $120 on dinner for two.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
El bife no estaba en el término solicitado.
No vale la pena, se volvió muy comercial

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Amé, súper recomendado a ojos cerrados

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Steakhouse. Schneller Service, mittlerer bis hoher Preis. Das Brot war trocken, die Kartoffel mit Butter war mäßig gut, das Steak sehr gut gebraten, man schmeckte den Holzkohlegrill. Das Fleisch war o.k. aber nicht besonders, für den Preis eher schlecht. Das Ambiente ist nett. Vorsicht: Getränke bestehen schon mal zu 2/3 aus Eis - kann man aber mit wenig Eis bestellen.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Las carnes de este restaurante son de muy buena calidad, con el termino tal cuál los solicito.
Los saloneros muy capacitados y serviciales. El lugar a veces de hace muy pequeño en horas pico, por lo que es mejor reservar a esas horas.
Los postres deliciosos.
Recomiendo este restaurante argentino.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Great Argentinian food, variety of drinks and a good service. Recommended

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Ignoraron que era alérgica al tomate.
Me atendió un señor que aunque me recibió la orden de ensalada  y le dije que era alérgica al tomate, cuando ordene el plato fuerte que era un lomito mar y tierra no me dijo que era con salsa de tomate. Me atendió de mala manera Wao fue a una semana y todavía tengo alergia y la atención  de ese señor en general no fue buena.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Súper delicioso y los meseros son bien amables

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Marvellous steak. Great service, super location and a really nice restaurant with a relaxing atmosphere. Recommended.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Had the medium sirloin steak — cooked just right! Juicy, flavorful, and perfectly tender. Great service and cozy vibe too.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: La comida está muy rica, el servicio es bueno pero podrían ser más amables los meseros.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
El novillo Alegre es una cadena de restaurantes especializadas en carnes, de temática argentina, he comido en todos, sin embargo el de la Sábana se caracteriza por tener mejor calidad en la preparación de la comida y siento que la calidad de las carnes es superior.

Los platillos están realizados con ingredientes frescos, tienen buena presentación y porciones adecuadas. Tienen excelente variedad de vinos y otros licores finos para acompañar las carnes, que es en lo que se especializan. El ambiente es cálido y familiar.

Lo mejor que tiene el restaurante, es el personal, les doy un 100 en atención al cliente, trabajan con dedicación y alegría, y se encargan de hacernos sentir como en casa, todo bajo la cultura tica del pura vida.

El lugar se llena mucho, recomiendo realizar una reservación si van a comer con su familia o compañeros de trabajo.

Es un lugar que todavía es grato visitar y si uno es nacional, le aplican descuentos considerables con ciertas tarjetas bancarias.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: El restaurante me lo recomendaron mis amistades, al entrar al local el ambiente es bastante agradable. El personal te atiende de inmediato y son muy amables. Vi la carta y solicité un Chorizo argentino de entrada y un bife como plato fuerte. El corte lo pedí termino medio y fue entregado tal cual lo solicité (eso fue excelente). De bebida me dieron una de que no se encontraba en el menú y la verdad me gustó. Consulten por los sides algunos no están indicados en el menú y están muy buenos.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: La zona de la entrada es muy bonita. En la parte de atrás por el patio en mi opinión necesita una remodelacion. Los alimentos siempre están super deliciosos y ni hablar de los postres. Solo deberían tener más personal para no tener que estar llamándolos constantemente y también constantemente olvidan lo que uno pidió. En general este Novillo Sabana es mi Novillo favorito.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Tenia bastante tiempo sin ir al Novillo alegre y ayer fuí acompañado porque teniamos ganas de comer buena carne.

Definitivamente ir al Novillo es garantía de satisfacción y vamos a ir punto por punto.

Las instalaciones nos parecen demasiado limpias, se nota mucho esmero en eso.

En cuanto al servicio, nos atendió Javier, nos dió muchas sugerencias que demuestra que conoce muy bien su trabajo, fue muy educado y gentil, el se ganó las 5 estrellas sin ninguna duda.

En cuando a las bebidas bastante grandes, con muchas frutas y muy buen sabor, sin exceso de hielo que la echara a perder.

El plato que pedí es algo inusual, porque pedí puré de papá con papas fritas para acompañar la carne, no es lo mas correcto, pero tienen esa flexibilidad de elegir los acompañamientos para complacer al cliente, en cuanto a la carne pedimos un bife  de chorizo cada uno, en término medio y el otro 3/4s y venían en un término perfecto ambos cortes, algo que es bastante difícil de conseguir en este tipo de restaurantes, pero en eso el Novillo Alegre no falla nunca tampoco.

En cuanto al postre, no recuerdo el nombre, pero estuvo delicioso, perfecto para compartir y sin llegar a empalagar.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Demasiado caro por una comida que no estan buena

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Últimamente el precio elevado es ridículo para lo que recibes. Inflan los precios para luego aplicarte un 50% de descuento con el BAC

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Fui por una promoción con el BAC, donde había 50 % de descuento con las tarjetas Mastercard, la comida deliciosa, pedimos un tomahawk, un chorizo argentino y una ensalada. La comida estuvo deliciosa, y el personal sumamente atento, mi madre tiene la enfermedad celíaca, por lo cual el gluten es un problema, y los mismos meseros pudieron recomendarle opciones gluten free, y modificación de la ensala para que llegara sin crutones. Definitivamente volveremos pronto.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Un lugar demasiado hermoso ademas de su atención que es un 100 y su comida que es exquisita super recomendado
No pierdan la oportunidad de comer super y con precios increíbles

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Service was out standing and I really enjoyed the appetizers and the dessert.

However, I did not love the main course as much as I would have hoped.  For my personal taste, the rice and beans were too plain and in need of more seasoning.   The quality of beef was medium compared to steaks I have had in the United States, but it was perfectly cooked and well seasoned.

The biggest problem to me was that the dishes were extremely over priced, and I do not like that the prices of the specials were not disclosed to us.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Excelente lugar!!

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: This place was so so delicious. Im insure whether because I was tipsy or starving, but everything we ordered was on point! Service was a tad slow but the delicious food made up for it.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Siempre pido la entraña que es mi corte favorito, y bueno, delicioso. La atención muy buena por parte de los meseros y el restaurante es muy lindo. Lo recomiendo mucho.

Tienen parqueo pero es muy pequeño. La gente normalmente debe dejar el carro en la calle, o se debe buscar un parqueo cercano.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Demasiado caro para lo que sirven.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text:
Como todo restaurante argentino son principalmente carnes pero encontrarás pasta, pollo y pescado también.
La comida está deliciosa y el trato que te dan es genial.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Buenos cortes de carne de res

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: Excelente atención.

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana
review_text: El mejor restaurante de parrilla argentina!! Nos atendieron de manera excepcional y toda la comida que pedimos estuvo deliciosa

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana

name: El Novillo Alegre Sabana

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Very cuutteeee and modern looking brewery& restaurant!!! The staff was friendly and attentive. My tuna salad was all the good things you wished for in a salad. The tuna was seasoned to perfectiioooonnnn 😍😍 Hubby was delighted and surprised by how well his tagliatelle pasta dish was cooked. He said "It reminded him of Italy!" High praise indeed from the Italian food snob.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: We really liked this place. The server was very friendly and helpful. The cocktails and beer were very delicious. The drinks we tried had smoldering cinnamon sticks in them which added a lovely smokiness. We ordered the empanadas and the yuca sticks and both were very tasty! Definitely get the yuca sticks if you come here! 4 Star rating only because we would've liked more local cuisine.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Food was absolutely fantastic. The local beers were delicious. Staff was friendly and extremely helpful.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: We ate here several times during our stay.  The service and ambiance are great as is the food.  I went back just to have the seafood stew which was my favorite, and the stuffed chicken and empanadas are great too.  I enjoyed Numu’s beer as well, particularly the Liberiana (Kolsch style).

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Cocktails are amazing and very original. Food is very tasty with sought-after spices and flavors! Incredible place! It was such a good address to enjoy our last night in Costa Rica! Bravo to the French chef and all his extremely attentive staff!

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: I just stopped in for a Porter and some rum but the ambiance of this place is really well done. The staff was also very kind and a pleasure to interact with.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Caro, carissimo

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
Wow!!
The food was incredible!!
Best food we had while in Costa Rica.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: The staff was incredibly kind! Foster and Lucia took great care of us, making our experience even more enjoyable. We saw a post about a mocktail, and since our family doesn’t drink, we had to try the virgin mojitos—passion fruit, mango, regular, and pineapple—all of which were fantastic! We also do not eat onion and garlic, and Lucia went out of her way to provide us with delicious options that met our dietary needs. Such a wonderful experience!

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Try the herbal Margarita here. One of the best margaritas I've had in my life.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Comfortable clean and delicious..

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Une cuisine exceptionnelle et raffinée dans un décor décontracté. Le personnel est sympathique et attentionné.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Foster is none like any other waiter. He gives phenomenal service wonderful recommendations and has a spectacular personality can tell he really loves what he does! Everything we ordered was incredible. The drinks here are over the top. Highly highly recommend it.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Good selection of tasty craft beers

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Taproom in Playas del Coco, Guanacaste, is a laid-back spot for beer enthusiasts and casual diners alike. Located near the heart of town, it offers an inviting atmosphere where visitors can sample a rotating selection of craft beers—both local and international—while enjoying simple but satisfying pub fare. The open layout and friendly staff create a welcoming environment, perfect for striking up conversations or just unwinding after a day at the beach. Service is generally prompt, though it can get busier during peak tourist season, so arriving early or reserving a table is advisable. Overall, Taproom provides a pleasant blend of coastal relaxation and craft brew culture, making it a worthwhile stop for anyone exploring Playas del Coco.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Great food and great brews.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Bill was a great server! Excellent suggestions on appetizers. We had the raw tuna app, seafood ravioli, empanadas and soba noodles with shrimp. All excellent! Definitely try the passion fruit crème brûlée and passion fruit cheesecake.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: By far the best food in el coco. Up class restaurant but value for money. Bistro style. Super fresh food. Totally worth it. Love this place ❤️

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Had dinner there last night and had absolutely the best Sea Bass I have ever had. My dining partner had the ribs and wanted to lick the plate they were so good. Prices were great. Our server was the sweetest as well. This place should be full of diners every night it is so good

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
Unexpected detour to Coco Beach for one night…where to get a delicious dinner? I found it! Numu Taproom and Bistro, you could have dinner elsewhere for less money, and coming from New York it could’ve been more money,  you can’t put a price tag on serious good food.
They have an abundance pf beautiful  cocktails, I had a hibiscus gin drink to die for, Food-wise, pf coirse the special ceviche,
OMG YUM, decided to have a second drink and have another appetizer which was seared tuna that was thoughtfully displayed with a little salad, yuka chips and some kind of crazy awesome hot condiment on the side.
you can’t go along here, they also have artisanal small pizzas and burgers etc  but I stuck with  seafood. . Chris, my bartender was a perfect companion with just enough talk for a single woman traveler.Deliciosa!

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
Nice ambiance with warm & friendly service, but unfortunately food is quite lacking.

- Ceviche: Very good, I eat a lot of ceviche and this one was very fresh, flavorful, and tender

- Stuffed portobello mushroom: This appetizer was a bit of a mess, there was no binding in the mushroom filling, just some loose chopped vegetables topped with a thin layer of overcooked cheese.

- Seafood “special”: the special that day was a seafood combo with snapper, shrimp, and mussels. The dish was average in taste, the fish slightly salty and the shrimp with almost no flavor at all, but it was terribly overpriced for what it was. Two shrimp, two mussels, and two pieces of snapper for $43 + tax + service. You can get much better seafood for this price in the area or even anywhere in the U.S.

The beers are decent, the Kölsch especially was quite enjoyable.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
Lovely dinner for two, tried most of their in-house beer selection (including a couple of off menu), along with great cocktails for my partner.

The seafood risotto was STUFFED with seafood and was very good. The steamed fish in banana leaf was succulent and tasty.

The staff was very friendly and helpful. I just wish we had discovered this place earlier in our stay.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Numu is a classy place, with great atmosphere, beautiful drinks and food. It’s a must see on your stay in Coco for sure! Chris our wonderful mixologist, was friendly, with lots of great recommendations! Chris made me and my significant other feel the pura vida; also very helpful with his knowledge on Costa Rica, for the rest of our trip.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: An awesome craft brewery on the main strip in Coco Beach. Just 5 blocks from the ocean, this clean and plentiful taproom offers everything from craft beer to delicious cocktails. There is also a pool table! Our bartender was Chris and he was the most kind, knowledgeable and friendly bartender we met on our trip. If you are in Coco Beach and you love craft beer you should definitely take the short walk up to this wonderful taproom. The beers all have local indigenous names and I loved their Saison beer! Thank you Chris and thank you everyone at Numu. What a great evening we had here.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
Came for the food, enjoy the art work

Had the tuna tiradito and blackened mahi mahi. The marinated tuna was surprisingly good. Rivals some of the best omakase pieces I had in Asia.

The mahi mahi delivers in both of the grill fish and risotto departments. All in all, and excellent meal. I also tried to pair this dinner with their craft beer selections and it worked out great.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Numu Taproom is a gem! They have a fantastic selection of beers and top-notch service that always makes you feel welcome. It’s the perfect place to escape the chaos of the local spots during the high season and just relax. My all-time favorite was the sliders—they were incredible—but sadly, they’ve been taken off the menu 💔. Despite that, the overall vibe and quality make it a spot I’ll keep coming back to. Highly recommend for beer lovers and anyone looking for a chill atmosphere! 🍻

The portions were also quite small. For about 40 usd a person, we expected a lot better quality. There are restaurants in the vicinity that I would sooner recommend.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Had dinner here last night and everything was delicious and beautifully plated. I loved the vibe and music. The artwork around the restaurant is stunning and vibrant. We had the surf and turf and it was excellent. My son had the mini pizza and loved it. The ceviche was light and less tart than most I’ve had, it was served with warm tostones - again, delicious. The shrimp cesar had four large prawns grilled to perfection. We are staying at Pacifico for the week and plan to come back. Oh and I had a refreshing mocktail which was basically a mojito blended.  If you don’t drink alcohol, I highly recommend it.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
Nos trataron de forma despectiva como tiquillos, cuando todos los saloneros son ticos ( de costa rica)
Y no nos siguieron atendiendo por ser ticos y teniendo con que pagar

Aparte pedimos 2 bebidas más y nunca nos llegaron

Y el menú nunca nos llegó
They treated us contemptuously like tiquillos, when all the waiters are ticos (from Costa Rica)
And he didn't continue serving us because we were Costa Ricans and had enough to pay.

We also ordered 2 more drinks and they never arrived.

And the menu never arrived

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Incredible service, beautiful atmosphere, amazing food! What more could you ask? We ordered a mojito, lobster ravioli, and the tagliatelle! Everything we had we LOVED! If we had more time in CoCo we honestly would have loved another meal here! ❤️oh and we did take a lava cake Para Llevar, that ice cream was sooooo yummy!

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Muy agradable sitio

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
We weren't quite sure what to expect going to this place, but it was right next to where we were staying and the menu had choices both of us could eat. We sat inside to get away from the oppressive heat, but the place wasn't really well air-conditioned. Luckily we had a fan blowing on us (which wasn't a problem at all).

The place is kind of weird in its layout, reminded me of a nightclub or something repurposed as a restaurant. There's a fairly large stage along one wall in the dining room that has a couch on it. There is both indoor and outdoor seating available.

The food was way beyond what either of us was expecting. My signature snapper dish was wrapped and cooked in a banana leaf and was tender and delicious! Really amazing flavors and textures. My wife's chicken breast was similarly delicious and well-seasoned.

Service was pretty attentive all night and the only hiccup is when they brought out my wife's dish it wasn't what she ordered, because apparently the server confused the tables. Our order came out minutes later, which was a welcome relief. Otherwise everyone was very friendly and helpful.

I would highly recommend this place if you're nearby and looking for a very good, delicious meal.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: It is a place identified by the fine attention to detail, the flavor of its food, and a visual spectacle, which left me admired; by far, it is a place that invites you to return many times!

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Absolutely amazing meal with spectacular service!!! Cristian quite literally anticipated our every need including a fan he delivered to our table side  A definite must when you are in Coco. A++++++++++

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: In Pacífico Village as you enter Coco, Numu’s Taproom and Bistro is in a modern, casual and comfortable space with indoor and outdoor seating.  I really enjoy eating here - usually pulling myself up at the outside counter where the bartender service is always super friendly and attentive (as are all the staff).  The food is great and I should branch out more but I tend to get locked in on my usual: ceviche followed by the fish & chips (with the Kölsch-style Liberiana or 3).  We also make it a point to bring in family and friends when they visit. Their beers, brewed by the airport, are delicious and you’ll appreciate (and deserve) the upgrade if you’ve been living off Imperials and Pilsens for a while!  Grab a couple of 4-packs as you head out (although they’ll set you back a bit).

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
I wouldn't give this place a 3-star rating if I was the only person who had a subpar experience here. However, despite myself not feeling well when we came in 2 others in our party of 4 couldn't eat their meal. They couldn't because they didn't care for it.

All I ordered was a beer and the Caesar salad. The two women in our party tried to order a wine that worked for them but they couldn't find one that worked and ended up being unhappy with either option provided. They both ordered the pork belly fettuccine, had one bite, and couldn't finish it. Now for the last person in our party, he ordered the empanadas and a few beers and loved everything.

I would not be opposed to trying this place out another time and trying some other dishes. It had a great atmosphere and we would love to come back and see a show on the stage they have. Unfortunately for us, this wasn't the best experience.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: El lugar super hermoso, la atención excelente, la comida de lo mejor !!! Realmente uno de los mejores lugares para ir y degustar platillos no solo presentados de manera elegante, sino deliciosos. Yo soy alérgica a los mariscos y realmente se nota la calidad del lugar porque ni el olor a mariscos me afectó.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
Food was ok for the price, if you're gunna charge top dollar the food needs to be there too.
Entertainment was great with a live 2 person feature.
Great atmosphere, looks and service.
There chairs could be better to sit on.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Great place, just a few minutes' walk from Coco Beach ⛱️

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Exquisita comida me encantó, el servicio de lo mejor y super rápido. Platillos variados. Y muy buen ambiente.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Good burger and chicken sandwich. Fresh food but limited beer selection, they need to up their game in that department.  Clean, good atmosphere with relaxed environment.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text: Good food and service, but Coco beach area is more expensive than other areas of Costa Rica. Food could've used a little more salt to bring out the flavors.

name: Numu Taproom and Bistro by Chef Nicolas Devenelle
review_text:
This was a nice place to stop for lunch.  We were the first ones in and we realized they were seeing up for the Superbowl.  Definitely a place that caters to tourists but it was nice to have some local specialties and flavors in the menu.
The beers are solid with the best bring the Belgian style and IPA.  I was particularly grateful that the IPA was balanced and not too heavy on the hops.  Being from there PNW in the U.S. it was nice to have an IPA that was not a mouth full of bitterness.
The food was well prepared and was not the usual uninspired brewery fare you find in the U.S.  Three staff were very friendly and the service was spot on.  They were very accommodating with my lack of Spanish but seemed to appreciate us practicing the little we knew.  We had a great time and meal.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Una experiencia culinaria única, excelente servicio y temática original en cada platillo. Los licores de la casa son increíbles!  y sin duda la cereza del pastel" fue y será el mejor postre con temática típica costarricense que he probado en la vida🩷

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Increibleeeeee todo !!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: wonderful tasting menus that takes you on a journey through Costa Rica. Had the pleasure of being served by Karla 10/10 would recommend

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Celebrated my birthday here. Very unique experience. We had the tasting menu and paired it with the drink tasting menu as well. Would highly recommend,  I didn't need to make any decisions all meal! Not a quick meal, but the meal was the event for the evening.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: El servicio excelente y los platos abundantes y exquisitos (pedí Tamal de pejibaye y royal de ayote). El cóctel Colodomiro picado también fue un acierto

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Excelente restaurante, los platillos y la atención son acordes a la experiencia que se espera de un restaurante de gama alta.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: It was our anniversary, and they gave us complimentary drinks and made our day very special! The food was well thought out and pretty unique, which we loved. They were really sweet and opened up parking early for us, which we really appreciated. However, we felt other parts of the service could do with a little bit of work. For example, for some of the dishes, the food arrived before the server was available to explain what the dish was. One of the waiters was being scolded publicly, which we did not appreciated. In terms of thre dishes, some of the desserts i felt was too sweet and not balanced. I loved the shrimp ham but felt the tomato sauce felt like pasta sauce and overpowered it. Other than that, really good food!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Amazing food, great atmosphere, attentive staff and the whole experience was very fun, cultural, Costa rica food with a Michelin star twist

name: Restaurante Silvestre
