name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Recomendado a ojos cerrados. Fuimos para celebrar mi cumpleaños y probamos el menú de degustación y fue una experiencia increíble en todos los sentidos: los sabores, el emplatado, la historia detrás de cada plato y la creatividad del menú hicieron que todo se sintiera muy especial.

Además, nos atendió Paloma y el servicio fue un 20/10. Súper amable, atenta y simpática durante toda la experiencia.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Comida espectacular, gran servicio y una experiencia inolvidable

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: El personal es excepcionalmente amable pero la comida es sin palabras ! Una experiencia única e inolvidable

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Muy bien servicio y comida deliciosa

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: La comida, ambiente y sobretodo el trato del personal fueron increíbles. El menú “Óptica” se sintió por un momento como estar en casa de Tita comiendo con toda mi familia. Unos genios!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Great service.  Fun atmosphere in a remodeled home.  Presentation of the food was creative and interesting, but for the price point the food was decent but underwhelming.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
What a special experience! This wasn’t just a meal but a full sensory experience and Karla was an exceptional guide.
There were so many special touches and surprises throughout the meal - it was truly one of a kind! And couldn’t recommend more the silvestre wine pairing- will remember that forever!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Mi esposo y yo fuimos a celebrar nuestro aniversario. Todo excelente, el menú de degustación espectacular. Solamente tuvimos al inicio una experiencia no muy agradable con una chica que se llamada Paloma, nos recibió muy mal. Nosotros veníamos desde muy lejos, 4 horas de viaje y no sabíamos que aún no estaba abierto, nosotros entramos y esta chica se molestó mucho, nos trató bastante feo y ya entramos un poco indispuestos. Sin embargo creo que sus compañeros y ella misma notaron nuestra decepción y nos atendieron muchos otros chicos menos ella. La atención de todos los demás impecable, en especial de Yancel (no se si así se escribe). Nos hizo sentir muy cómodos, con la apertura para que preguntáramos y demás. Aunque su precio es elevado, Creo que es una experiencia que debe vivirse.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Excelente servicio, el personal es muy amable, sociable y el ambiente del lugar es acogedor, 100% recomendable..

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Un experiencia increíble, la comida deliciosa llena de historia y los maridajes Silvestres son magníficos. Es una manera diferente de conocer la verdadera comida tica.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Una experiencia totalmente diferente y única.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Espectacular service and one of the most incredible food in Costa Rica.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Cada plato es una experiencia gastronómica insuperable, ingredientes tratados con mucho respeto y cariño, productos locales y técnicas propias e internacionales. Gracias por hacer nuestro aniversario, más especial. Gracias Enzo por llevarnos por la historia y la experiencia. Gracias chef y equipo!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Amazing experience with the tasting menu. Such a unique presentation with an interesting story. The food was sublime.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: every traveler should visit

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Hola, en abril sufrí una intoxicación alimentaria muy, muy grave después de comer aquí. Nunca me había encontrado tan mal. Mi novio escribió una reseña y el restaurante respondió con una dirección de correo electrónico a la que podíamos escribir para solucionar el problema, pero antes de que pudiéramos hacerlo, parece que la reseña fue eliminada. Llevo diez años trabajando en restaurantes y entiendo que esto pasa a veces, pero me puse muy enferma y estamos seguros de que fue por culpa del Restaurante Silvestre (fue la única comida en varios días en la que mi novio y yo no habíamos compartido todos los entrantes, y yo fui la única que se puso enferma. Además, me puse enferma nada más despertarme a la mañana siguiente y seguí así. Así que, por la coincidencia temporal y los platos que sí y no compartimos, tenemos claro lo que pasó). He enviado un correo electrónico a la dirección que encontré en la página web del Restaurante Silvestre, y estaré encantada de retirar esta reseña si pueden solucionar la situación.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Silvestre estaba en mi lista de lugares por visitar desde hace mucho tiempo y definitivamente la espera valió la pena. Desde el primer momento nos atendieron con el mejor servicio y el menú de degustación se ganó mi corazón, disfrutamos cada bocado.

Soy de Costa Rica y fui con mi novio que es Mexicano, vivimos en el extranjero y cada sabor fue recordar un momento específico de historia, al mismo tiempo fue la oportunidad perfecta para que mi pareja experimentara cosas que antes no sabía cómo explicarle y le encantó todo.

Espero con ansias el próximo menú de degustación, sin duda cuando vayamos de visita, esta será una parada obligatoria.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Beautiful and original presentation, outstanding service, and delicious desserts. The food was good overall, though some dishes felt a bit overcomplicated, with too many ingredients taking attention away from the main element. My lamb dish was slightly too salty, but the starter salad was excellent. Cocktails were good, though lacking a bit of personality in presentation. Overall, a creative and enjoyable experience that I would recommend.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: The food and service were amazing! Aaron was a fantastic server. The reason for 4 stars for Atmosphere is that the room we were eating in was hot and stuffy.  We had the Óptica tasting menu and almost everything was delicious and fresh. The tasting itself had a great element of whimsy that I won’t spoil :) Our least favorite dish was the last savory course, a smoked pork cheek dish. The pork wasn’t really rendered so it was a piece of pretty solid fat and the dish was overly smoky. My favorite course was the first seafood course with the shrimp ham - delectable!! Would absolutely come back.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Easily the finest restaurant I have ever been to.   The 8 course local pairing with distilled spirits was exceptional.   Our waitresses Paloma spoke great English and was exceptional.   Each course was unique and delicious beyond exception.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Absolutely epic!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Lo mejor que he probado!!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Muy buena experiencia aunque me pareció elevado el precio!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Simplemente espectacular, sin duda alguna el mejor restaurante de Costa Rica

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Experiencia que te cambian el panorama de lo tradicional.
Un sabores que te llevan a otro momento, simplemente inexplicable.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Just awesome! Great cocktails.
If you love bold flavours: do it!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
We did the 7-course tasting menu and had a great experience. The food was excellent but what really stood out was the service.bOur waitress, Paloma, went above and beyond: she made the effort to speak in Portuguese and explained every dish in our native language, which we deeply appreciated. Her attention to detail and warmth elevated the entire experience.

We are a fairly demanding couple when it comes to dining, and Silvestre exceeded our expectations.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: La comida es una experiencia que debemos vivir alguna vez en nuestra vida, Silvestre es la representación de que la comida costarricense es un mangar gastronómico, gracias al personal, a la atención de Karla y al chef por tan hermosa representación.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Estoy sorprendido. Fui a ciegas. Sin saber nada porque no uso redes sociales. Soy súper restaurantero y estoy seguro que es el mejor lugar al que he ido en muchísimo tiempo. La atención es increíble! Necesito regresar y llevar a todos los que conozco

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Yo probé el menú secreto del Chef inspirado en la comida costarricense y Es una experiencia increíble se los recomiendo !!! Un viaje gastronómico impresionante.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Amazing food and service! Karla made it a fun experience with the story and presentation. A memorable experience!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Una experiencia única que le deseo a cada persona conocer. Karla se comportó de una forma demasiado profesional y única en conocimiento

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: La atención de Karla fue espectacular el ambiente la comida todo fue excelente, Karla nos dio un recorrido por el restaurante

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Experiencia muy bien diseñada, personal con excelente atención y  naturalidad. Comida muy muy buena,

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: La experiencia vale totalmente, es muy lindo aprender todo lo que se puede hacer con ingredientes costarricenses. Y la comida en general es muy rica, muy subjetivo eso si.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: De los 2 mejores restaurantes de Costa Rica, sin lugar a dudas!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Muy deliiii aunque algunos platos estaban muy salados para mi gusto (: y el plato que traía cerdo no fui para nada fan pero creo que es cuestión de gustos(?). Los postres amazing :)).

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
We recently dined at this restaurant for an 8-course tasting menu and left feeling underwhelmed. The evening stretched to 3.5 hours, well beyond what a meal of this size should require and the slow flow between courses made it feel more like an endurance test than a culinary journey.
The first course set the tone early when bread arrived cold, a basic misstep that signaled the kitchen wasn't quite ready for the night. Unfortunately, that lack of finesse carried through most of the savory courses. While the presentation of each dish was visually appealing, the execution didn't match the ambition on the plate.
The saving grace came toward the end.The desserts were genuinely enjoyable, and the after dinner drink send off was a lovely touch that showed what this restaurant is capable of when it gets things right.
To the restaurant's credit, staff listened attentively when we expressed our disappointment and took our feedback seriously. We hope they act on it, because the potential is clearly there.
For the point of a tasting menu experience, the bar is high. Right now, this kitchen isn't quite clearing it.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Excelente experiencia. Probamos el menú de degustación de ocho tiempos y fue impresionante cómo lograron elevar sabores típicos costarricenses a un nivel de alta cocina, sin perder su esencia. Todo estuvo muy cuidado: presentación, ambiente y detalles. Como observación muy puntual, en algunos momentos la explicación de los platillos se percibía con un ligero cansancio, probablemente por la repetición constante a lo largo del día. Es algo totalmente comprensible, pero afinar ese detalle podría hacer la experiencia aún más especial.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Su menú de degustación de 8 tiempos y el maridaje que tienen es simplemente perfecto. Restaurante digno de una estrella Michelin por saber, experiencia y servicio!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Visitar Silvestre fue una experiencia gastronómica increíble: para mí y para mi esposa fue un placer venir a degustar una versión tan refinada de la cocina costarricense que tanto nos caracteriza.

El servicio fue increíble, son personas encantadoras y demasiado amables.

¡100% seguro que volveremos a visitarlos!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Vale mil por ciento la experiencia del menú degustación, excelente en todos los sentidos

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Una experiencia espectacular, la atención fue una maravilla y la comida todo un viaje. Definitivamente volvería.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Jesús delivered an experience we will never forget.  Not only does he give amazing food recommendations  but he is also very knowledgeable on the Costa Rican Culture. I can’t wait to tell my friends and family about Silvestre!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Todo súper delicioso y la atención de Heiner
Los maridajes espectaculares

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Visité Restaurante Silvestre para celebrar mi cumpleaños y la experiencia fue simplemente excepcional.

Optamos por el menú de degustación “Óptica” acompañado del maridaje sin alcohol, y debo decir que este último fue una sorpresa total. No esperábamos un nivel de creatividad tan alto; cada bebida estaba cuidadosamente pensada para complementar los platos y elevar aún más la experiencia.

La comida fue sobresaliente. Cada plato no solo destacaba por su sabor, sino también por la historia que lo acompañaba, lo que convierte la cena en algo mucho más profundo que solo comer: es una experiencia sensorial completa.

Un punto clave fue la atención. Jesús, nuestro mesero, hizo un trabajo impecable. Explicó cada plato con detalle, demostrando un gran conocimiento tanto de la historia detrás de cada creación como de las técnicas utilizadas. Su servicio marcó una gran diferencia en la experiencia general.

Sin duda, una noche memorable y un lugar al que vale totalmente la pena regresar.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Un menú especial e innovador con ingredientes ticos, agradezco y recomiendo tanto esta experiencia.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Cada detalle desde el servicio al plato ha estado de nunca olvidar. Todo muy completo, sabroso y saciador. Recomiendo mucho el menú de desgustación, toco mi corazón costarricense, volveré!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Me encantó la primera experiencia, fue única gracias a la explicación detallada de Jesús, quien fue nuestro anfitrión esta noche.  Súper recomendado el menú de degustación.

Pd: venir con hambre XD

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: This food was an absolute delicacy. The ambiance was warm, rich, and inviting. The people were so kind and easy to converse with. I want to travel back to Costa Rica just so I can come here again!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Wir hatten ein sehr origibelles Essen in einer tollen Stimmung. Besonders ist der Kellner zu belobigen, der sein Job mit Liebe macht und uns nicht bloß das servierte Essen, sondern die Kulinarik des Landes erklärte. Eine absolute Bereicherung.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Muy buena atención!
Excelente comida!

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Si les gusta las experiencias gastronómicas recomendado al 100%

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Un menú que reta y deleita al paladar. Cada componente por separado de un plato es espectacular y todos combinados producen una experiencia gastronómica sin igual.
Un ambiente muy tranquilo. El servicio es muy bueno, con colaboradores que saben explicar con detalle el origen y formación de cada plato.
Muy recomendado

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Love the interior and the food is great. I absolutely loved the cacao tamarind soda.

Service could use improvement, especially for a higher end establishment.

Areas of Improvement:

I had an empty glass of wine on the table when my main dish arrived. I was not offered another glass.. had to ask for a wine menu, & then I sat for 10 minutes while my dish got cold, nobody came to ask about my wine selection.. eventually I gave in and just ate my meal without a glass of wine.. quite sad as it was a very strong beef dish and I did desperately want to enjoy it with a wine. Throughout my entire dish, nobody came to ask if I wanted wine… despite clearly having asked for the wine menu (which insinuates I did want another glass, of course).

I also had to pour my own water, while seated, from a quite heavy bottle. It’s not about whether I’m able to pour my own water or need someone to pour it for me but it’s quite awkward to maneuver such a heavy bottle while seated.

Also there were no coasters for any of the glasses so both the cold water bottle and my cold water glass created large pools of condensation all over the table which made the table feel cold and wet and slippery and had my glasses sliding around.

I did enjoy my experience overall… the food was good. I would return again despite the wine situation. Maybe it was my fault for not speaking up better. I did dine alone though, and I simply don’t like to have to call attention to myself.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Increíble, todo estuvo de la mejor calidad! la atención, la comida y lo acogedor del lugar hizo que tuviéramos una experiencia maravillosa.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: El mejor lugar de todo San José

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Son unos genios!
La experiencia es un deleite. Combinan muchos elementos de la gastronomía tradicional costarricense con fusiones que la llevan a otro nivel. Nos atendió Jesus, que tenía mucha pasión por los platillos y servicio muy ameno. El menú es pequeño, todo delicioso. Hay que probar la esfera de Osa de postre. Uno tema a mejorar: iluminación en el salón

Espero volver

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text:
Me quedé con muy mal sabor de boca. Las reseñas me hicieron insistir en ir y la verdad he tenido mejores experiencias en otros restaurantes. El precio de la comida, a mi parecer, es excesivo de acuerdo con la calidad de los alimentos. Me parece que estoy pagando un concepto y no una buena comida.
Fuimos con un amigo vegano y no hay UNA sola opción para personas con este tipo de alimentación y tampoco hubo apertura para ofrecerle algo más que pan ¿Qué pasa si tienes alergia? Supongo que ajustarnos a lo único que ofrecen. Eso sí, el pequeño pan llegó con una presentación “exquisita” (y todavía se lo cobraron).
No me parece la mejor comida en San Jose :(

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: El menú de degustación es una experiencia 100% recomendada.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: We tasted the Menú de Degustación, 8 plate course to try several dishes, food was excellent, tasty and respectful of local ingredients, highly recommended.

name: Restaurante Silvestre
review_text: Fuimos a celebrar nuestro aniversario de bodas y vivimos una experiencia inolvidable, probamos la degustación óptica con el maridaje silvestre y nos encantó, no en cualquier lado se prueban platillos qué me llevan a mi infancia y me recuerdan mis raíces costarricenses y con una experiencia de licores con sabores completamente ticos y elevados a otro nivel. Definitivamente queremos volver.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: The wonderful staff here made my family feel very welcome on our first trip to Costa Rica. It is a beautiful country with very kind people. Anderson was delightful, the entertainment staff great, and Andrey was attentive at the pool. Jose, Andrey, and Christian at Seaside Grill were really amazing and so kind! The shuttle drivers were respectful and eager to help. I would caution anyone with limited mobility from staying here as it is a sprawling, very steep, hilly and spread out resort making it very difficult to walk and reliant on the shuttles. Lots of small groups and couples and it seems to cater to an older crowd. Overall it was a quiet and peaceful stay, apart from the too loud music at the main pool, although they have a quiet pool as well. It is a small pool area with limited number of loungers. The beach is a black sand beach with only a few loungers, although people don’t spend much time on the beach. While I do feel it was too expensive of a stay for the resort, that is not the fault of the kind and accommodating staff who want you to have a good experience.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
Not 5*
If you’ve given this place 5/5 then you’ve obvs never experienced a real 5* hotel.
If you’re reading this post to check out whether you should book and are determined to stay with secrets. I’d really suggest going to Jamaica instead. Everyone we spoke to at the pool agreed. A simple thing, but I couldn’t even order Disaronno without being premium club! My favourite drink. (hands in head emoji)!!! It really is the little things with this hotel. The advertisements promise you everything but they don’t deliver. They will pour the local drink without hesitation first. And they close up at 2300 and basically tell you to go to bed!
Such a shame, the venue setting and scenery are without a doubt beautiful but unfortunately this resort just doesn’t cut the mustard, In comparison to Secrets St James in Jamaica, especially. It doesn’t have any of the 5* quality you expect When paying the money we all know it costs to stay in a5* resort.
The accom doors have about an inch gap at the bottom allowing all the creepy crawlies in. Including little scorpions, centipedes, spiders etc!!!...
The rooms are very small. You are given a 45 minute wait for the restaurants and handed a “frankie and benny” style buzzer in the case that any Premium club member walks in. We were told to wait 40 mins outside of the seaside grill whilst 5 tables there sat unused... this is not what you expect from an all inclusive. Also instead of being told nicely, “sorry breakfast and lunch in the seaside grill are for premium members only” the waiter frustratedly tapped his pen at the sign in front of him that stated PREMUIM MEMBERS. Making us feel about as big as the scorpion that bedded down with us the previous night! You’re also offered the “posh menu” from all restaurants but again you need to pay extra!!!!.... Secrets Papagayo you really need to take a leaf from the other secrets resorts because you’ll soon find yourselves very empty!
We are by no means moaners but this place is 4* at most. Also, there is a huge divide in the customer service of the workers. Some of whom look almost put out when you ask for something.
The entertainment staff and bar staff however, definitely earn their money. Working all hours of the day and night always with a smile on their faces.
I want to write about the few good things for everyone but I really urge you to look elsewhere. It also feels like the people who have said this place is 5/5 haven’t truly experienced a real 5* resort!

Sorry Secrets but you really let us down with this one. Thank god the weather was good.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
The resort itself is beautiful. I loved the way everything was separated and set apart.

The food is ok, typical for an AI resort.

The staff is kind of rude truthfully, it’s almost like they don’t care you’re there. I’m not use to that because other AI they are extremely nice and we’ve been hitting AI now for 20 years.

They were ants in my room constantly.

It felt like secrets papagayo is behind times. They just aren’t at the same level is Dominican or Cancun or Cabo.

The beach is ok, it was cool for a minute with the volcanic sand color and bay calmness. The problem is the vendors are all over the place because it’s a public beach. Not just that but these jokers hang out in the resort, they’re  friends with staff and makes you feel uncomfortable. My wife couldn’t even relax because she felt like one dude was staring at her. They also had a set up along the beach where they handle their business and high tide washes it away. I always go in the ocean and I didn’t this trip.

Way too many things to list, 75% cons. There is way better competition out there to come back.
Change 5 star to a 3 and I’m being generous.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
Están bloqueando la entrada à la playa. Tiene qué habilitar un camino para el acceso público. No es posible que pongan a la gente a caminar tanto.
The hotel blocks the public entrance to the public beach. It is the right of any person in Costa Rica to have access to the beach. People have to leave cars outside and walk through the hotel to gain access and they are discouraged by the hotel personnel to do so.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: The staff is wonderful and everyone is so accomidating. Our room looking out at the bay was comfortable and clean. Great wildlife and beautiful grounds/landscaping. Enjoyed the spa.  Negatives were the food and the sales pitch to spend tens of thousands on a vacation package with them. We were happy to listen for 90 mins with the bribe for a credit at the spa, but it seems predatory and not worth the investment. Our first all inclusive stay and we're on the fence if we would do that again.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
Went off season in May. Stayed there for one night. WiFi was down. Pool wasn’t really cleaned, lots of leaves and foliage. We were one of three families there. However, it is very cost effective. Additionally, lots of wildlife to view there. Several mango trees in the back. We saw 2 families of monkeys, including a baby monkey, and lots of iguanas. Easy access to the beach.

It’s not a 4 or 5 star, but the staff was friendly and very reasonable price. For families on a budget, it’s great. Also, saw more wildlife here than my mystical hanging bridges so there’s value there.

I also think this place must be much more happening during the peak season.

20-25 mins to the airport from here. They offer a shuttle service to the airport too.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: My husband and I just came back from an 5 nights stay at Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica, and honestly, everything about it was amazing and completely stress-free.|Costa Rica is such a beautiful country. The people are incredibly friendly, the weather on the Pacific side is perfect, and the national parks are absolutely stunning.|We booked our transfers with NextTripCR.com, and everything went really smoothly from start to finish. On top of that, we also did two tours with them, and honestly… wow.|Everything was well organized, easy, and stress-free. The whole experience was excellent and honestly exceeded our expectations.|The resort itself is in a great location and really well kept. The staff made a big difference for us — always kind, helpful, and genuinely attentive without ever feeling forced.|The food was another highlight. Every restaurant we tried was really good, way better than what we expected from an all-inclusive resort.|The entertainment team also stood out. They kept things fun, relaxed, and well organized.|The pool area was great too. We never had trouble finding chairs.|Our room was spacious, comfortable, and always very clean, which made it easy to fully relax.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Loved the large comfy room and bed. Enjoyed all the many opportunities from hiking the hills to running the stairs, yoga, aqua fitness and kayaking. Food amazing at all their restaurants. Fun things to do as well, bracelets making, painting and so much more. Evening shows were brilliant.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: cherry is best BEST she’s friendly and helps us with our adventures. highly recommend !

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: So much fun!! Dayla is very professional as well as fun

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Secrets Papagayo is nice property, but the drinks and food were not good.  Everything here costs $100 American dollars.  Everything starting with Excursions, Gift shops and Walmart.  The heat is 95 degrees every day and night so be prepared.  They have a van to take you to different parts of the resort which is great if you like roller coaster drives/steep hills.  The rooms were outdated for the money you spend. I paid for an ocean view and only could see half of the ocean. The beaches are beautiful but no service from the hotel there (Public Beach).   Secrets have been brought by Hilton so it's not the same type of hotel I experienced in Jamaica/Secrets Ocho Rios in 2018.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Great activities - I really enjoyed the bracelet making class with Dalay. She was so patient and we had a great time!

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: We have had an amazing experience so far. The food is great and the workers are friendly. Cherry has been a lovely tour guide and helping us with our outings.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: I came here to do a couples photo session on the beach down the hotel. Just wanted to share some photos, the beautiful white sand and magically blue water is just so so beautiful!! 🤍

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Benji y Jampier en el bar Seaside Grill, los mejores! Hicieron de nuestra estancia y momento junto a la piscina principal muy agradable, son muy simpáticos y amigables! 💯|Pura vida vida! 💯🙌🏼

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: It’s a beautiful place but the main pool needs some serious renovations and a functional filtering system. The food was not impressive. A lot of the food offered was the same food in the buffet. I wouldn’t come back to this hotel.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Secrets Papagayos was the best place to kick start our honeymoon! Our private jungle bungalow was the perfect room setup, and the room service and cleaning was always timely. The staff were super friendly and made us feel welcome always. The location was secluded and offered a private beach, and shuttles for easy transport. The atmosphere was laid back and the variety of food was excellent. Would highly recommend if you prefer a more casual, relaxing resort, not commercialized!

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: The resort is in really rough shape.  Not at all elegant.  Aesthetically it needs massive renovation.  The pool cement is in need of repair as is pretty much the whole property with exception to the rooms…they were nice.  The pool water was incredibly cloudy every day. Music blaring to midnight that you can hear clearly in the rooms. Pro side:  food was pretty good and the staff is incredible.  Will not return. This was our third Secrets stay and last.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Very nice place and the reason for 4 and not 5 is that it needs a little work. However, the people!||Awesome staff and seriously, Kenny was like family at the end of our week. If you come here, you’ll meet him and he will treat you right. ||John West

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Wir haben in dem Hotel einen wunderschönen Urlaub verbracht und können dieses Hotel nur empfehlen. Wir hatten einen Preferred Club Bungalow Suite mit Ocean View und hatten einen tollen Blick auf die Bucht. Der Sonnenuntergang war herrlich und morgens haben wir hier den ersten Kaffee auf der Terrasse genossen. Man hört viele Tierstimmen. Vögel, Affen... Einfach zauberhaft. Das Essen war großartig und frisch zubereitet. Mein Lieblingslokal war das Seaside Restaurant, wo wir jeden Tag gegessen haben. Den Hummer muss man probiert haben! Ein ganz besonderes Dankeschön geht hier an die Kellner José und Wilson, die uns immer äußerst zuvorkommend behandelt haben und unseren Aufenthalt zu etwas Besonderem gemacht haben. Auch Amando und Cherry waren immer äußerst liebenswürdig. Vielen Dank für dieses schöne Erlebnis.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: I wanted to like it a bit more, but there were 2 things that didn't go well. The pool is beautiful, but finding available seating around the pool is impossible. You'd have to go there before breakfast and claim your spot or they'll be gone. Also the food was just okay. I really would have expected more authentic Costa Rican options as well. Other than that, the staff is wonderful, the rooms are great, and the property is beautiful. You can expect to take their bus around the property, as there's not many walking paths to be found.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: For 2k a night you would expect a large room and great food options. However, the room we were given was very small. It was just a bed and a toilet in a closet sized room. Not even kidding. On top of that, the shower had a feature where you could see into it from the bed, no privacy film or wall to cover it. They had given us a room on the very top of a hill, no golf cart provided and no sidewalks. They had a bus service, but often, it took a while for the bus to get to the top so we would walk and have to quickly move into the grass when the bus would come up the path because the road could only fit one bus. No focus on guest safety. They had some good breakfast options but dinner was kind of a hit or miss. They had hammocks which we observed when we arrived. After dinner, we tried to lay on the hammocks, but the staff had completely removed them. The hammocks remained put away during our entire stay. The only good thing was the beach, very beautiful beach they are perched upon. Overall, for 2k a night there are a lot better options hotel wise.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Beautiful!

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: A mi esposo y a mí nos encantó el hotel. La atención por parte de la recepción fue muy buena y ágil, por parte de Alexander tijerino y Joseph, los cuales fueron muy atentos y amables, tanto el checkin como el checkout fue muy rápido, nos hicieron sentir muy cómodos y como en casa. Queremos destacar los increíbles desayunos y almuerzos que tuvimos en el Restarurante Aqua, el capitán Víctor, Freizel, divsi y la chef Maria, fueron personas muy amables, simpáticos y atentos. En el restaurante Seasidegrill la atención y amabilidad  fue muy buena por parte de Ana, Cristian, Andrey, José y Erick. En el restaurante portofino muy buena la comida y la atención de Efraín fue muy buena. En el cococafe la atención y amabilidad de Alexandra fue excelente. Nuestra habitación siempre estaba muy limpia, así que el servicio  de limpieza fue excelente . En conclusión pasamos unas vacaciones increíbles. A modo de sugerencia creo que los carritos que trasladan  a los huéspedes deberían de ser eléctricos con el fin de reducir el ruido y contaminación que generan los de combustible.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
My husband and I honeymooned here & it was amazing! We loved the entertainment associates Anderson, Danny, & Cherry! They were so kind and friendly to us everyday and they always had a helping hand when needed. Danny even got in the pool and played volleyball with us.

This place is a dream. The views, vibes, shows, events, & access to the black sand beach is awesome. We did a Jet Ski excursion through the resort & snorkeled in the coral reef to see sea turtles and we saw a pufferfish 🐡 The Van drivers are all so kind and respectful. We stayed in the 400s and the walk to the main area was a little far so we used the transportation vans a lot. You can play pickleball, volleyball, ping pong, pool, & more here. We highly recommend vacationing here!!

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Hermoso lugar, hermosa gente, los empleados del lugar siempre atentos y amables, un lugar para volver siempre.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Hermoso todo. La atención y a morosidad con la que nos trataron

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Hotel overall was great and the staff was amazing!! The rooms and some of the pool equipment could use some updating but overall would recommend  for a great beach retreat in Costa Rica. The free activities on the resort are a bonus. The snorkeling is right off the beach at the resort and was one of the better I have done saw several sea turtles and countless fish of all varieties. The gulf is beautiful, calm, and warm and the beach is black sand which is very cool if you have never gotten to experience it.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
Wonderful resort for a one-time visit. I’m glad I experienced it, though I’d explore other areas next time and the food didn’t consistently impress. I was lucky with a room close to the main pool and restaurants, which made getting around easy. The staff are hardworking and kind. The entertainment team was a highlight—fun, engaging, and creative, especially the arts activities. Anderson and Dalay stood out, along with Danny and Edward.

Service was strong across the board. Pool bartenders made great mocktails and smoothies, and Randy was especially helpful with evening activities. As a solo traveler, I appreciated staff who took time to chat—Anderson and the Himitsu team were exceptional. Himitsu had the best overall dining experience, though teppanyaki sauces leaned very sweet. Portions without sauce are a better choice if you prefer savory.

Common areas are well designed with both social and quiet spaces. No pressure from UVC, which was a welcome change, and Andreina was consistently helpful without being pushy.

Dining overall was decent but limited. The steakhouse felt too hot (open air), though lunch there was good. Ceviche was excellent; tuna was disappointing. Portofino was average with slower service. The coffee shop was convenient but inconsistent. Rooms were clean with good water pressure, though I noticed some ants.

Wildlife around the resort was a plus—iguanas, coatis, and even a monkey sighting. Excursions are worthwhile but often over an hour away; both major providers offer solid options.

Not sure I'll head back to Costa Rica again b/c everything is so far apart, but if I did, I would fly into another part of the country to explore the Arenal volcano and other adventures. Given the price point here (over $1000/night on average), I'd hoped for more foodwise but as far as modern upgrades, cafe, etc. but definitely not complaining. It was still a fine stay with great people all around.

Solo female travelers: use caution booking private beach excursions. I was put in a very uncomfortable position midway across the water. All turned out fine but wouldn't want others experiencing what I did.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: We just spent a week here and LOVED everything about it. The staff was amazing and very attentive. We were with a very large group and anytime anyone had a request the staff went above and beyond to make it happen. Big shout out to Rony for making amazing cocktails, Cherry and Anderson for bringing the fun, and smiles everyday. Thank you to the lovely woman working in Coco's! The quality of food was excellent, every meal was made with pride. I am a pescatarian and there were so many options, they also modified menu items to meet my dietary needs. Our housekeepers were AMAZING! I felt like I was on a cruise, we  would come back to our room to a special treat everyday. I had read previous complaints about the WIFI, we had great service. There was one night when a storm rolled through and we lost service for a few hours, but they got it up and running the next morning. The excursion people on the beach provided amazing adventures!  HIGHLY recommend.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Great vacation resort! The staff and accommodations were excellent.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Bien apprécié notre séjour |Victorio et son équipe au restaurant Aqua de la section tranquille nous a très bien servis même les deux dernières journées il se souvenait de notre nom||Bonne nourriture sur le site ||Seul bémol pas beaucoup de chaise à la piscine tranquille donc prévoyez arriver très Tôt ||Mordu de plage n’y comptez pas

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: This is our initial experience with an all-inclusive hotel, and we've found that the concept does not align with our preferences. Nevertheless, we commend the staff for their exceptional friendliness and helpfulness.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Other than about three bugs that were in the room, it was beautiful and we loved the area.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: El personal del hotel es excelente, muy atentos y serviciales

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Secrets is great. For the price, it better be…

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Excelente! Outstanding! Uno de mis lugares preferidos. Un verdadero paraíso! Naturaleza, buen servicio, buena comida. Lindas instalaciones. Muchas actividades para hacer en el área. Volcanes, monos, pesca, cataratas o cascadas, caballos, botes y mucho más! El show de las noches de alta categoría y el show de fuego espectacular! Lo recomiendo 100%

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Had such a great experience.  All the staff were amazing and kind.  Never lifted a finger.  Shout out to Donald at the pool.  Amazing guy.  Food was good.  Hibachi was worth it but it was a lot of food.  Shuttles were quick.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
Wow, we just got back home today and I can't say enough good things about our experience. We've done a few all inclusive resorts in various countries and this one is at the top of the list now.

The service & staff are impeccable. The location is quiet and quaint. The bungalow style rooms, tucked into the side of the mountain make it feel like no one else in around.

We booked transportation thru Amstar at the resort and it was flawless. We went on the Happy Coco Catamaran sunset cruise out of playa del Coco and did a private excursion thru Crazy Frank's tours (he hangs on the beach). All of which were fabulous and well worth the money spent to see this amazing country. We saw lots of wildlife on the resort.

The food was amazing 😍 our favorite was the Italian but the buffet was honestly great too, with lots of variety and options. Always seemed very fresh. On our last night, they closed several of the restaurants for a private event without prior notice which made getting dinner challenging. Lots of people were frustrated with long waits. It would have been helpful to know ahead of time so we could have made other plans off resort or something.

All in all - our best all inclusive experience and Costa Rica is just an amazing place too!

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
What an absolutely stunning performance by 4 Elements! From start to finish, the energy, creativity, and passion on display were next level. The choreography was incredible—so sharp, dynamic, and perfectly executed. Every moment felt intentional and captivating.

Huge shoutout to Julio for truly holding it down all night. He was the undeniable MVP—Mr. 365. His versatility was on full display, seamlessly delivering not just as a dancer, but also playing a major role in the choreography. His presence elevated the entire show.

This was more than just a performance—it was an experience. 4 Elements set the bar high, and this show is one people will be talking about for a long time.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Such a disappointment. We went for our honeymoon but weren't made to feel special at all. I dreamed of this day and we checked in like a normal vacation, actually we had to call twice to get the minibar filled because it was empty when we checked in. Also, the pool kept draining and making a loud noise at night that kept me awake. We had to call every day to get it refilled, they didnt take it upon themselves to check it after we made them aware of the issue. Once we turned down their meeting to sell us stuff they wanted nothing more to do with us. I don't know if I've seen too many movies but for our honeymoon I was expecting a sign on the door or flowers or even just a card, but nothing. We felt so disappointed, it's an experience we'll never get back or ever have again and we were let down.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Very nice resort with very friendly staff.  One of the highlights was the evening shows by the main pool.  Great team of performers. They performed some amazing fires shows.  Really admired their skills and movements.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Great experience...quality service and lots todo

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Muy buen servicio. Los restaurantes. Uy buenos

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Das Resort hat unsere Erwartungen weit übertroffen. Alles sehr gepflegt und gut organisiert. Es war einfach ein tolles Erlebnis.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Fantastic resort.  Incredible service.  Sufficient food options and all the food was great.  Highly highly recommend!!

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: While the property was beautiful and the service and staff were great I was not thoroughly impressed.  For a 5 star restaurant the food was bland and unenjoyable, the drinks were not strong in fact they seemed watered down, and the actual property being on a hill and needing to take shuttles to the main pools was very inconvenient. And worst of all, everyone I traveled with got very sick upon return. It could have been the water or food but that should never happen on a resort. I would not recommend this resort to those visiting the Papagayo region.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
Shoutout to Rony for making the best drinks! Every night he was incredibly polite, friendly, and brought such a great attitude that made the experience even better.

Our stay at the resort was amazing from start to finish. The staff was wonderful, the food was delicious, and the entire property was very clean and well maintained. It truly felt like everyone went out of their way to make sure guests had a great time.

A special thank you to Jennifer at the spa as well—definitely one of my favorite parts of the trip! Her service made the experience relaxing and memorable.

Overall, we couldn’t have asked for a better stay. Great people, great food, and a beautiful, clean resort. I would absolutely recommend this place and would love to come back! 🌴✨

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Beautiful resort. Staff are great. Food too. Kind of isolated though and very hilly.  You have to shuttle to go anywhere around the resort.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
If you like peace and quiet, this is the right Secrets to be at. Much more laid back than the Mexican and DR locations.

However, for UVC members, this is not worth the 2:1 nights exchange when comparing food and amenities.

One bonus: the kayaking and snorkeling are included with the stay.

A shout out to ALL the staff here for their exceptional hospitality, felt like a VIP with every interaction

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Fantastic place, the food amenities and staff are all top of the line we can't wait to go back! We never had to wait for transport more than 5 minutes, and the bungalows felt like they were a part of the hill. Totally recommend secrets!

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
We had been dreaming about going to Costa Rica for years, so we decided to splurge on what was supposed to be a once-in-a-lifetime honeymoon and my 30th birthday trip. We chose Secrets because it was marketed as the more “upscale,” 5-star option, and unfortunately, our experience was very underwhelming.

We were told special honeymoon amenities would be arranged for us, but we never received anything that was promised. It was disappointing considering how much this trip meant to us.

Sleep was also a struggle. The couple above us sounded like elephants walking around late into the night (until 2am) and then again at 5am. For a resort that promotes luxury and relaxation, rest should be a given.

The pool situation was frustrating. There were multiple signs stating that reserving chairs early wasn’t allowed, yet the policy was clearly not enforced. Unless you got up at the crack of dawn, there were barely any spots available.

We also booked an excursion through the resort to hike, see sloths, and sample coffee and chocolate. Before booking, I specifically asked how long the drive would be because I know some excursions can involve very long travel times. I was told it was about 20 minutes from the resort. It was actually an hour and a half each way. Unfortunately, I ended up getting food poisoning from the hibachi restaurant the night before, which hit while we were on the way to the excursion. I spent the entire 8-hour trip sick in the van, unable to participate in anything. That was $400 completely wasted.

Another inconvenience was that you have to take a van to get from point A to point B throughout the resort, which means constantly waiting for transportation instead of freely walking around.

The one true 5-star experience was the spa. I booked a massage and facial for my birthday, and it was absolutely wonderful. The spa staff were professional, relaxing, and it was easily the highlight of the stay.

Costa Rica itself is beautiful, and we felt very safe. We would absolutely go back to the country — just not to this resort. For the $5,000 price tag and the expectations set by calling this a “5-star” honeymoon destination, it felt like a huge letdown. I would recommend doing thorough research before booking.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Really enjoyed our week at Secrets Papagayo.  Had a beautiful preferred ocean view bungalow.  Good food, excellent entertainment.

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text:
Rooms: great view however problems with sink, toilet, TV
and a/c.  Reported to staff and looked after.
Service: great.
Location: not wheelchair accessible, very hilly,

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
review_text: Ma conjointe et moi revenons d’un séjour de 11 jours au Secrets Papagayo. Ce fut une expérience exceptionnelle et sans pépins. ||D’abord le Costa Rica est une destination exceptionnelle alliant un peuple merveilleux, une température idéale sur la côte du Pacifique et des parcs nationaux de grande beauté.||Le Secrets Papagayo est un très beau complexe, très bien situé. Le personnel est très attentionné, compétent et d’une grande gentillesse.||La nourriture était délicieuse dans tous les restaurants et nettement au dessus de nos attentes pour un complexe dans le Sud.||L'équipe d'animation était géniale. Les activités étaient intéressantes et bien organisées.||La piscine était très bien. Il y avait amplement de chaises en plus de 8 cabanes dont nous avons pu bénéficier.||Notre chambre était grande, fonctionnelle et très propre.||Nous avons également pu jouer régulièrement au Pickleball ( 2 courts).||Les 3 excursions faites avec Amstar étaient toutes excellentes et WOW.||Nous recommandons vivement ce resort pour adultes.
