name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Great service. Great food! This was my 2nd Casado of the trip. Favorite part was carrot and the other salad thing. Along with the purée

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Lovely place! Super affordable to enjoy food and drinks, we visited a few times and tried most things on the menu! 10/10

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Great little spot!

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Fuimos con buenas expectativas por los comentarios y ha sido realmente decepcionante. Los platos son tipo combinado, tienen como las combinaciones  principales listas en la barra, por ej. menestra cocida congelada, ensalada, arroz cocido, plátano frito, etc. Cocinan lo principal al centro (por ej. El pescado) y el resto son montoncitoa de estas cosas que no están muy ricas ni bien cocinadas. Por ej. en el casado no destacaba ningún sabor especial y el pescado estaba bien cocinado y rico pero alrededor diferentes cosas sin mucho sentido. Platos combinados de batalla, no recomendable

name: Soda Víquez
review_text:
Delicious food, great prices and very friendly bilingual staff.
It’s an open air restaurant. No AC, no music but the food was excellent.

name: Soda Víquez
review_text:
If you’re in La Fortuna, this soda is an absolute must-visit. It’s one of those simple, authentic spots that completely wins you over with its quality and flavor.

We ordered the Casado with fish, and it was everything you’d hope for—fresh, perfectly cooked, and full of rich, satisfying flavors. You can really tell the ingredients are high quality, and the whole meal felt comforting and delicious.

But the real highlight? The drinks. They were outstanding. The tropical tamarind drink, in particular, was unforgettable—refreshing, vibrant, and unlike anything we’ve ever tasted before. It alone is worth stopping by for.

The place has that classic local soda charm, making the experience feel even more genuine and enjoyable. Plus, if you’re driving, you can easily park along the side of the road for free, which makes it super convenient.

Highly recommend going out of your way to try this spot—you won’t regret it.

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: The best authentic soda place I could find here in La Fortuna. Fresh and delicious food. Must try.

name: Soda Víquez
review_text:
En voyage à la Fortunat, nous avons mangé plusieurs fois dans ce petit restaurant exceptionnel
Hier soir, nous y sommes retournés et malheureusement notre commande a été oubliée nous avons dû patienter longtemps
Toutefois, l’erreur fut corrigé
Et quelle surprise, lorsque nous avons souhaité payer notre addition le patron nous avait invité et nous a offert l’addition
Vraiment, nous avons trouvé ce geste très beau et nous les remercions
Nous reviendrons avec plaisir dans ce restaurant, qui sert une cuisine locale, exceptionnel
Merci beaucoup pour tout

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: this place has the best casados ever, i came back twice and had my last meal in la fortuna here- it's so cheap too!!

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Petit soda très sympa ! Le service est parfait et les plats délicieux ! Je recommande à 100%, merci pour la petite attention sucré en fin de repas !

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: If you want a quick and cheap meal, this is your place. So good.

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Fish is wonderful

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Sehr leckeres Essen, faire Preise und nette Bedienung

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: The best soda in La fortuna! They have a great variety, the casado and the steak was extremely good, we ate here 3 times 😅❤️ they serve water upon arriving, freshly made juices for 1000 colones (personal recommendation: tamarind) and the service is also 10/10. We felt welcome there and would come back. Also, probably  the lowest prices in the area

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: We went here for the first time based on a recommendation from one of the local shop owners. This place is wonderful!! The workers were so nice and friendly. The service was fast and the food was delicious. We highly recommend this for anyone wanting authentic Costa Rican food

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Excellente nourriture , repas frais et savoureux je recommande fortement

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Amazing nachos, quick service!

name: Soda Víquez
review_text:
This was my favorite restaurant in La Fortuna. I highly recommend stopping by here for Costa Rican cuisine. I had dinner here twice and really liked the food I ordered.

I ordered the Churrasco and Chicken Sandwich which were both very good. My family members ordered the fish Casado and really enjoyed it. If you want a good casado/costa rican meal, I recommend going here.

Additionally, for a very touristy area, Soda Viquez has very reasonable prices.

Parking can be a little difficult, there's only street parking so you may need to drive around a little. Otherwise it was a really good experience and I'd recommend this place to anyone stopping by La Fortuna!

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Por las valoraciones lo esperaba mejor. Pedí unos tacos y la tortilla me la pusieron completamente rota, en trozos, no había manera de armar el taco, y la carne extremadamente seca y dura.

name: Soda Víquez
review_text: Our family of five stood in quite a long line to get in, and everyone seemed to be having a good time in the restaurant. Once we got in the service was good and we got to order fairly quickly. The food itself took a while to arrive even though it was prepared cafeteria style. Unfortunately, the food itself was mediocre at best, except for fried fish, which was very well cooked. However the rest of the plate and the beef was poorly executed, and very sloppy, and all food items sort of ran into each other. The mango juice itself was also only ok, but too sweet and not tangy enough to give it balance. I wish I could have left a better review because we were really looking forward to eating here. We have eaten a lot of casado in Costa Rica, but this was not a great representation of the typical costa rican dish.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: We’ve only visited for thermal and hot springs which experience was out of the world. Free valet parking with food included when you purchase day pass with culinary experience. It was worth the price. Will come back again should time permit.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: We went for the day so didn’t get a room but ended up having by a lovely lunch and a drink in the pool bar. The pools are wonderful and all the water is genuinely routed from the hot springs. It feel amazing and service was great too. As usual be prepared to pay the price as the food and drinks are on the higher end. But great way to relax and spend a couple hours.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Beautiful, well worth the money for the day pass.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
Perfecta estancia. Una experiencia inigualable y maravillosa.

Nota: Las habitaciones orchid del módulo 200 mucho mejor que las del módulo 400. Tuve que cambiar al querer alargar la estancia y el cambio fue a peor, en cuanto a la habitación.

El servicio es incomparable! Son todos un amor, muy profesionales y atentos.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: This place blew the other resort that we stayed at out of the water! Even though it’s expensive, we felt it was a very good value given the exclusive hot springs access and included shuttle service, included breakfast, and included valet. The service was excellent and the Arenal area is beautiful.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: I bought a day pass for $115 and spent about 2 hours there.And the fact that I need to hold onto 1 towel and only exchange it at one same place is downgrading the experience a lot. And you need the physical towel card to exchange for a towel and losing a towel costs 20 US dollar. Why not just record the information on the wristband?

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
Tabacón Thermal Resort & Spa is simply extraordinary — but what truly elevates it above every other resort I've stayed at is the staff.

From the moment we arrived, every single team member went out of their way to make us feel welcome. They remembered our names, anticipated our needs, and genuinely seemed to care about making our stay special. In a world where hospitality can sometimes feel transactional, the warmth here felt completely authentic.

Of course, the setting doesn't hurt either — soaking in natural volcanic hot springs with the Arenal Volcano looming in the backdrop, surrounded by lush rainforest, is something straight out of a dream. But it's the people who made it unforgettable.

If you're looking for a resort in Costa Rica where you'll be treated like family while surrounded by one of the most stunning natural landscapes on earth, look no further. We're already planning our return trip. Pura vida! 🌿

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
Our stay at Tabacón was absolutely incredible. The service was amazing from start to finish — every staff member was friendly, attentive, and made us feel truly welcome.

The grounds are beautiful and perfectly maintained, surrounded by nature everywhere you look.

The hot springs were the highlight of the trip and easily the best we’ve ever experienced. Relaxing in the thermal rivers and pools felt like paradise.

The food was also delicious, with great quality and presentation at every meal.

We were also surprised and impressed that they prepare your room for the night each evening, which added such a thoughtful touch to the experience.

Yes, it’s an expensive place, but honestly it was completely worth it for the experience, atmosphere, and level of service. A truly unforgettable stay in Costa Rica.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Amazing place to stay. Convenient if you want to experience the Hot Springs  and a luxury stay. The staff was so great concierge service amazing the wildlife we got to see while we were there was awesome. Rooms are so comfortable and you can experience the rain forest. Truly a relaxing time. The spa and yoga class were amazing! Nothing like a massage and yoga in the middle of the rainforest as it’s raining

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Great boutique style high end hotel with beautiful rooms and amenities. The staff was among the best we’ve ever had, very attentive and always looking after the customers. The hot springs we do relaxing and the massages we got at the spa were super relaxing.  While not cheap, this place is a great place to call home during your visit to La Fortuna.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: If you are looking for a beautiful location, incredible facilities and staff plus a relaxing stay, I can highly recommend this location.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Personal con excelente servicio y atención. Lugar limpio y cómodo. Aguas termales lo máximo. Habitaciones completas y cómodas.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: We always love visiting Tabacon. The grounds are absolutely gorgeous, the restaurants are fantastic, and the service is top tier. The staff of Tabacon and the quality of service they provide is really what sets this resort apart from the others.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Thank you for a taste of paradise in Costa Rica. Your hotel is beautiful and your staff is outstanding. Appropriately, attentive and professional everything from the room to the grounds, the food and, of course, the thermal baths were amazing. Your hotel exceeded my expectations. I have no complaints whatsoever and I highly recommend this hotel to many visitors.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Tabacon hot springs is worth the price. It literally feels like you are in the jungle swimming through waterfalls and hot springs.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Unethical security guards who refused to assist us by a simple request to connect us to internet after we desperately needed an uber and had no service.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Absolutely amazing resort with impeccable concierge service. The shuttle was always available within a few minutes of waiting to take us to the hot springs. The check in and check out process were both seamless (and came with warm toilettes and a refreshing citrus drink). The room had complimentary sweets and bottled spring water and was absolutely spotless. Would love to stay again.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: לא היינו במלון רק בנחל אבל תכלס חבל כי הכניסה היא 115 דולר לאדם ואם ישנים בריזורט זה בחינם אז עדיף כן לישון בכל מקרה מהמם וכיף יש פינות כאלה פרטיות שאפשר להכנס למים בכל מיני נקודות והמים חמים ממש נעימים כמו אונסן ביפן

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Simply perfect and one of the most beautiful hotels I have ever visited. It is mesmerising, and the hot springs are the best we visited in Costa Rica. The views are magnificent, the layout is nicely done, there are several big pools, the food we ordered at the restaurant was delicious, the people who welcomed us were very sweet and helpful. It is my second time visiting, and while it is true that the price has doubled in 5 years (rooms went from $350 to $550 per night and day-pass went from $45 to $115 per person), a day-pass to the hot springs is still absolutely worth it and will be the most relaxing thing you could do for yourself in Costa Rica.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Un lugar para desconectar y relajarse. Muy limpio, ordenado y servicio al cliente excelente

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: The luxurious hot spring area is next to none.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Everything was amazing. Just fyi - the hot springs aren’t on property. You have to take a 2-3 min shuttle. We didn’t know this until we arrived,

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
The hot springs at Tabacón absolutely exceeded our expectations. There are dozens of pools to choose from, but we found ourselves spending most of our time in the Shangri-La Gardens, which are reserved for hotel guests 18+ only. It was such an incredibly relaxing environment — easy to get a day bed, peaceful atmosphere, and truly top-notch service throughout our stay.

We spent hours relaxing there enjoying snacks like chips & guac and hummus, along with delicious drinks (including fun drinks served in a pineapple and fresh coconut water straight from a coconut). One of the coolest parts was seeing spider monkeys in the trees and even a few toucans nearby while soaking in the springs.

Of the two restaurants, Ave was probably our favorite. The complimentary chips and bean dip were honestly to die for, and the drinks were excellent. Huge shoutout to Alejandro for the amazing service!

Tucanes was incredible for breakfast and they really put on an amazing spread. We also had dinner there one night and Rodrigo provided wonderful service. The desserts were top notch; highly recommend the matcha tiramisu and gelato sampler.

Our room was very comfortable with a great bed, and the entire property smelled amazing. We loved seeing parrots and toucans wandering around the grounds.

The highlight of the trip was definitely the hot springs and the exceptional service. The food was good overall, though a bit overpriced (which is somewhat expected at a luxury resort). Overall, we had an amazing experience and would absolutely return.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Extraordinaria experiencia!, el hotel espectacular!, estuvimos horas bañándonos en las aguas termales. El staff muy amable!, quiero destacar a Donovan quien tuvo la gran gentileza de devolverme mi teléfono celular el cual había olvidado en una bata que dejé en el área de piscinas!. El desayuno increible y la comida en el restaurant Tucan estuvo espectacular!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: El mejor lugar para pasar unas lindas vacaciones en Costa Rica, lleno de naturaleza, incluso nos tocó ver tucanes y perezosos en el restaurant todo en vida salvaje. El personal es demasiado amable, comprensible y siempre buscó solucionar todas nuestras dudas. En todo momento realmente su personal es muy cálido y amable Bety la recepcionista, una ocasión nos encontró la cena cuando todo los restaurantes ya se encontraban cerrados y nos salvó de irnos con apetito a dormir, le agradecemos infinitamente sus atenciones. La tranquilidad de las aguas termales la seguridad, la comida, todo el personal es demasiado amable y el lugar es bastante cómodo y tranquilo.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Thanks but no thanks

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Definitely, recommend staying at Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa even if it’s for one night. I loved staying at this resort the service and experience was fantastic. Valet parking as soon as you arrived to the reception desk and bags taken to the rooms for you. If you want to treat yourself or as a couple I recommend doing the spa try arriving 30 minutes before your reservation so that you can enjoy their private relaxation area, which is exclusive for our spa guests and where you can find a thermo-mineral water Jacuzzi, lockers, fruits, smoothies, among other amenities. They have two restaurants on site at the hotel and one at the thermal springs area. I definitely recommend doing a reservation for the dinners because they do get busy right away. If you are not a guest at Tabacón I did hear about people doing a day pass for the thermal springs. Shuttle to the thermal springs and back to the hotel came around every 5 minutes. We did stay only for one night but we were able to enjoy all access to the resort. Breakfast was free and provided with a large buffet area for guests definitely go early before 9am it gets very busy very fast.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
I had a wonderful solo weekend at Tabacón Thermal Resort & Spa. I was looking for a peaceful and relaxing getaway, and it absolutely delivered. My room was spotless, the grounds were beautifully maintained, and every staff member I encountered provided warm, attentive service.

The thermal springs were incredible, and I spent most of my time in Shangri-La, where I was fortunate enough to have a cabana—such a perfect place to unwind and enjoy the natural beauty around me.

The highlight of my trip was the Volcanic Clay Caress spa treatment. Adrianna was absolutely wonderful and made the experience truly exceptional. I left feeling refreshed, renewed, and already wanting to come back. Highly recommend for anyone seeking luxury, relaxation, and outstanding hospitality.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Had a great experience staying here. The rooms were nice, the food off of the 2nd more expensive bar menu was very good, the buffet was awesome, the massages at this hotel were excellent, and the hotsprings are around 100* which is nice.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Nice luxurious experience with natural hot springs

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: The hotel, grounds, hot springs, restaurant, service are all amazing! I may of just had the best dinner ever.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: We loved our room, the hot springs,the food and drinks, and the staff were very helpful. Some rooms have a great view Arenal volcano.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: One of the true thermal pool/river in the area. The others are just hot tubs. The river is 100F. The grounds and service are outstanding.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
We stayed at Tabacón Hotel and while the setting is undeniably beautiful, the overall experience did not meet expectations for the price or for an SLH property.

This is an updated review, replacing my previous one, after completing our trip in Costa Rica and staying in several hotels across different price levels, which gave us a clearer comparison of service standards in the country.

The property is stunning, set in the middle of the jungle with a truly immersive natural environment. The hot springs are beautifully designed and are clearly the highlight of the hotel. The rooms are modern, spacious, very clean, and comfortable, and we stayed in a Rainforest Room which was particularly pleasant.

However, the main issue is the service level, which feels inconsistent and not aligned with the positioning of the hotel. There is a clear lack of attention to detail and anticipation of guests’ needs.

Throughout our stay, many areas felt understaffed and overwhelmed. Check-in was disorganised, breakfast was often crowded and hectic, and service in the restaurants was slow. Instead of a calm luxury experience, the hotel sometimes feels closer to a high-volume resort operating under pressure.

Even the hot springs, while beautiful, can feel busy and not always well managed in terms of service and guest flow.

Another important point is the pricing of food and drinks, which is very high compared to other hotels in Costa Rica of similar or even higher standards. This reinforces the feeling of paying premium prices without receiving a consistently premium service experience.

In contrast, other SLH properties we stayed at during our trip offered a much more personalised, attentive, and polished level of service.

In summary, Tabacón is visually impressive and worth visiting for its hot springs and unique jungle setting, but the service quality and overall value for money fall short of expectations.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
This person made my stay very bad, wouldn’t recommend the stuff in the hotel at all.
Go to the spring or Royal corin .

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: We had a day pass with our kids and grandkids. What a magical place. Dinner was also delicious.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
We had a great experience at the hot springs.  We got the day pass after booking online and Daniel at the front desk was very helpful and friendly throughout the entire process.

The resort is amazing, the ambience and vibes are unparalleled.

We noticed 2 major downsides:
1. Drinks are WAY overpriced. 17$ for pina colada and it had pretty much ZERO alcohol in it. Do not order cocktails here they are a ripoff!

2. Water was supposed to get increasingly hot as we moved upstream but we did not really notice much difference. All pools were pretty much the same temperature

Overall a good experience but slightly overpriced

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
Très bel hôtel dans un cadre naturel exceptionnel au Costa Rica. L’emplacement est idéal, notamment grâce à l’accès aux sources d’eau chaude à proximité, avec navette et espace réservé aux clients — un vrai plus pour profiter pleinement du site.

La piscine de l’hôtel est agréable, mais manque clairement de transats, ce qui peut être frustrant aux heures de pointe.

L’accueil à la réception est efficace, sans être particulièrement chaleureux ou mémorable. En revanche, gros point négatif sur le service de voiturier obligatoire : il faut facilement prévoir 15 minutes pour récupérer sa voiture, ce qui peut devenir contraignant si l’on est pressé.

Le petit déjeuner est excellent, sous forme de buffet, avec un personnel efficace et sympathique — un très bon début de journée.

Nous étions logés dans la zone des chambres “adult only” (zone 7) : les chambres sont superbes, spacieuses, avec de très belles salles de bain, balcons et terrasses. Rien à redire sur le confort et la qualité des installations.

En revanche, l’insonorisation laisse à désirer : proximité de la route, portes peu isolantes, et climatisation des chambres voisines très bruyante la nuit.

En résumé, un très bel hôtel avec de superbes prestations, mais quelques points à améliorer côté logistique et nuisances sonores.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Really enjoyed the hot springs there

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Las habitaciones son muy bonitas y bien pensadas para una estancia cómoda. Las instalaciones de las aguas termales son impresionantes, limpias y preciosas. |Pero lo mejor es la atención tanto de recepción, como de todo el personal. |Queremos hacer una mención especial a Jeimy, que nos ofreció una clase de mixología fuera de horario y estuvo fantástica. Nos lo pasamos fenomenal. Ha sido la mejor!!!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
Helt fantastisk Resort
smuk beliggenhed og udsigt til vulkanen.
Suite med egen pool er vildt lækre

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
We came for a visit to Tabacon and while at the pool we were helped by Salvador who was behind the bar. He was one of our favorite parts of our stay. He’s kind and handled a rather large amount of customers soo well that it enticed me to leave a review. You guys are lucky to have him!

(The picture is of the Tuna Tostada… get em!)

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Volcano views in tropical paradise.  5 Stars is not enough.  The service, staff, accommodations, food, and grounds were all amazing.  If you are coming to the La Fortuna/Arenal area stay here, period.  Also includes complimentary access to the incredible Tabacon Hot Springs.  Many places in Costa Rica are not worth the price, Tabacon definitely is.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
Tabacon is expensive, but it was amazing and definitely worth it, book!
We stayed in the Volcano View Suite for three nights - the room and its terrace were spacious and extremely comfortable, with breathtaking views over the valley and to the volcano. Loved the double shower and walk in closet too, and the tub on the terrace was unreal. It goes without saying that the springs were amazing, as was the food at the pool bar and pina coladas in a pineapple. The standout was by far the service though - blew us away. Take note they have an adults-only building that you might want to consider given the resort is popular with young families, so adjoining rooms can be noisy in the non-adult section.
No bad points really, but worth noting that the breakfast is perhaps a bit average for $1,000+ a night, and the spa could be designed better given the location. We weren’t a fan of the guest walkways right next to the outdoor gazebo. They should be built more privately along the river.
Unrelated to the hotel, but highly encourage to avoid visiting during Easter if you want to go into Fortuna - the traffic is insane.
We will definitely be back!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Experiencia de termas de lujo. El complejo está preparado al más mínimo detalle. Desde nuestro punto de vista, es caro, pero es una experiencia única que vivirás.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: מלון מומלץ ביותר

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Just returned from a magical stay at Tabacon. The location, landscape and springs are phenomenal. One of the most beautiful properties on earth I would say. I hope to come back again one day. Pura Vida!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Great hotel with great service.  Direct access to hot springs is priceless, made only better by the solid food and drink offerings spring-side.  Easy to navigate, easy to access, easy to enjoy all the amenities.  Very close to volcano.  Will come back.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: We did the day pass here which was $105. We ordered drinks and food at the pool bar, which was fun and tasty. We did activities until about 1:30, then came here from 3-10pm. It’s a beautiful retreat with your choice of busy and quiet pools. The temperature varies from warm to warmer - probably from high 80s to high 90s - so don’t expect a cold plunge or a hot tub. The prices for cocktails and appetizers was surprisingly reasonable. Well worth it for a splurge!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: One of the best real hot springs in Costa Rica. Place feels like if you were in a jungle, a lot of pools and privacy. It’s a bit pricey but you pay for a premium place and service.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Priscilla Molina fue muy agradable y atiende a los consumidores muy bien.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
​Staying here for 5 nights was an incredible experience, especially with the seamless access to the hot springs. The shuttle available throughout the day is a major perk—you can literally head over in just your robe!

The hotel grounds are impeccably maintained, and the service is top-notch. Our room was always spotless, and we appreciated the consistent towel changes, fresh robes, and the nightly turndown service. The restaurant food and overall service were also very good.

​However, there are two areas for improvement:
- ​Drying Facilities: In a rainy climate with so many water-based tours, a towel warmer or drying rack in the room is a major missing piece. It’s tough to dry out shoes and clothes, and not everything warrants a full laundry service.

- ​Breakfast Variety: While the quality is good, the selection lacked variety. After the second morning, it felt very repetitive, which becomes noticeable during a longer 5-night stay.

​Despite those minor points, it is an excellent place to stay and highly recommended for the total experience.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Number 1 Hotsprings resort in Costa Rica

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Súper recomendado, ya sea que te hospedes o vayas por el día con el day pass. He probado ambas modalidades y la atención es igual de buena en las dos; el personal te hace sentir especial desde que llegas con detalles de bienvenida muy cálidos. Las instalaciones de las termas están siempre bien mantenidas y las habitaciones muy cómodas. Es una apuesta segura si buscas relajación y un trato premium.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Very nice place

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
I had wanted to stay at this place for years unfortunately now the place is famous for food poisoning !!! Watch out for food poisoning!!!

It is  hard to explain how terrible this place is. First of all while we were there the electricity was out for 11 hrs. That means no phone, no internet, no refrigerators, no water at all!! My son was food poisoned by the food there  —bc obviously  the food is spoiled they have no electricity sometimes—- but instead if apologizing both managers I talked to tagged me lectures and treated me with contempt. I only asked to leave one day early bc my son was so sick (remember  their spoiled food had made him sick) but they denied my request as long as they could. The cherry on the top is how the invaded my privacy when I saw the contempt the management treated me with the first night  …I asked them if they had an additional restruant …I asked the manger on the hotel phone not to contact me again bc my son was so sick I couldn’t deal with her negativity and take care of him too… so she proceeded to text me on my personal cell continuing her negative lecture towards me.  I mean I have luxury traveled around the world and things have happened some times but this hotels level of hostility towards guests, unclean food, unprofessionalism, and inkimdness was a mess that I have never seen before having traveled to over 40 countries!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
Treat yourself to a stay at this fabulous resort near La Fortuna! From the moment you arrive you are welcomed and pampered. First a fresh, cool towel. Then a refreshing lemonade drink. Once you're in your room, they stop by with a plate of delicious treats.

Our room was beautiful. The staff was very friendly and helpful. The food at both onsite restaurants was delicious. The onsite pool and hot tub was convenient and refreshing.

The incredible hot springs was a short ride away on the shuttle. They were everything I imagined and more! Lots of different spots to soak in, many with waterfalls.

Lockers and fresh towels are provided. Food and drink service is available from the comfy cabanas. Wear water shoes to move across the rocks in the hot springs. Our time here was the highlight of our trip and I look forward to returning!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Food service was unusually slow, both at the hotel and pool bar and restaurant, even by pura vida standards. But it was an amazing experience overall. I was surprised the kids could not get enough. And we had an epic view of the volcano from our room.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Spent a day in heaven here. The facilities and menu are exceptional.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Un vrai paradis les sources sont exceptionnelles, le service de restauration aussi wow

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: O hotel está a 12 km da vila, de carro.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: My family and I had an amazing time at Tabacon. Felipe and Brandon were so kind at valet and gave us amazing service. We enjoyed the pools and relaxing atmosphere. Our family will absolutely be back and can’t wait to spend more time here!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
My husband & I spent four beautiful days at Tabacon Resort, February 26 - March 2, 2026, and loved so much about the property!  First, the staff were incredible.  And Steven, at the front desk who checked us in on the first day, greeted us every day and actually remembered our names and the room we were staying in!
And there was such an amazing staff in the restaurant that we were so fortunate to serve us every morning for breakfast.  Keilor was the kindest, sweetest and most attentive waiter!  After one visit, he knew each following morning how my husband wanted his coffee and the tea that I loved.  He had the most beautiful smile and we were so sad on our final day of departure to leave.  He even gave us a big hug and wished us well for the rest of our journey!  Hugo, the restaurant manager, was very attentive and was very involved and attentive throughout the restaurant and you could tell that he and his staff equally respect each other.  And the hostesses who seated us each morning were also so lovely!  Josette, Jocelyn & Grethel were all so welcoming and helped us each morning with a few extra Spanish lessons, making us laugh and smile!  And then Esteban, one of the evening bartenders, was also so awesome and provided us exceptional service on the two evenings we sat at the bar and had a light dinner and drinks.  Great guy!  All the staff are such a huge asset to the resort and the mangers should be very proud of the service provided.
Next, the property was so well-maintained and so beautiful, setting right in the rain forest.  The thermal hot springs area was so expansive with so many places to tuck away for a private retreat while reading, resting or enjoying food and drinks.  Sitting in the warm water was so rejuvenating and felt so amazing.  There is a 2 minute shuttle that will take you directly to the hot springs area from the main hotel or you can easily walk there.
And the rooms were very well appointed, very clean and simple but with stately decor.  Super comfortable beds and a large bathroom with double sinks which I am always happy about!  Also loved that there was a desk, table and chairs to rest while in the room.
It is located about a 15 minute drive to the town of La Fortuna and they will provide a ride to and from the hotel for a very reasonable.  It was very quiet and we always felt very safe.
We would love to come back there someday and very, very highly recommend the resort to anyone who is considering staying in the La Fortuna area!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text:
I vacationed here with my wife and our family of 12. This is an amazing resort, impeccably maintained, and some of the best service at any resort I've ever received.

Pros:

1. Excellent, EXCELLENT, service. I cannot stress how good every staff member was. From Francisco the omelette maker at the breakfast, to the bartenders, to the bell boys. They've mastered the hospitality side and they clearly have very high expectations.

2. The resort is beautiful and it feels like you are literally living in the jungle. You are surrounded by mature vegetation, which adds to the secluded feel of being in nature. The rooms were very nice as well.

3. The hype around the hot springs is real. The springs are naturally heated by the geothermal underground volcanic activity, which adds to how neat it is. As a hotel guest, you get private access to Shangri La, which is the very top of the springs.  Day pass visitors are not permitted in this area, which is a huge plus because...

Cons:

1. It is not well advertised, but the hot springs are NOT on the hotel property. We all learned this when we checked in, so we felt a little disappointed. You have to take a short shuttle to the hot springs, which after spending a week there, we found it to be no big deal. The biggest complaint was that the hot springs portion of the resort, which also has pools and a restaurant, are offered to the public in the form of day passes. You will see quite a few Instagrammers clogging up the hot springs just for the pics, which obviously make some very great photos, but it doesn't really make the hotel guest experience better. Also, the pool was PACKED with kids...sitting at the pool bar...and screaming like crazy. Just know that the image you have of serenity isn't always guaranteed if you plan to go to the pool at the Hot Springs side of the resort. Just go to the actual hot springs if you are going to make the trek. Way better, way cleaner, less crazy.

2. Only other real complaint is that the hot water in the room is fed from the hot springs. The negative here is the smell, as we had a constant faint hint of what smelled like sulfur, but can't confirm that it WAS sulfur. The cold water is fine and safe to drink, per the staff, but we drank filtered water. Pro tip - fill up your water bottles at the gym from their filtered watering station or bring them to breakfast or bar and they will gladly fill them up with cold ice water.

3. The pool on the hotel side closes at 6PM, which kinda sucks if you want to just chill by the pool and not journey up to Shangri La.

All in all, this was a great place to stay and our whole family enjoyed it. I would recommend this resort to anyone. You won't regret it. Great location for all nearby activities.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Amazing luxury hotel. Great rooms. Modern and equipped. The service stands out. Top notch. Incredible breakfasts and access to the thermal spa experience. Close enough to town and activities (all about 10-15 minute drive). Highly recommend.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Fantastic resort. Hot Springs are amazing, with a reserved spot for resort guests and 18+. All the food we tried was incredibly flavorful and fresh. Service was over the top.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Beautiful property, stunning suite, amazing thermal baths. The staff were very helpful and the service at breakfast was outstanding.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Best hot springs in Costa Rica. Hotel is beautiful. Appreciated Betty at the front desk and Ruth from Concierge making our trip extra special. I can’t wait to come back!

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: Lugar maravilloso, experiencia unica. El servicio ha sido muy profesional y excepcional. Nuestra comida en el Restaurant Ave fue expectacular, Mac fue muy familiar y profesional en su atención en el restaurant. De manera general es un lugar muy hermoso y todos sus trabajadores son excelentes. Lo recomendamos al 100% y con seguridad volveremos. Es un lugar encantador y unico, al igual que los costarricenses.

name: Tabacón Thermal Resort and Spa
review_text: We had the day pass and frankly the experience was a bit underwhelming compared to the price. Don’t get me wrong, it’s a nice facility, but we were just expecting more of a vibe, music, some drinks, for the $115 price. For reference, you can experience the same hot springs for free right outside, it’s just a bit messy as it’s open to public and there aren’t dedicated places to put your towel and belongings.

We really enjoyed Latino dancing they did on Tuesday night. A couple taught from 7-8 then open dance. I guess they change up which dance they teach each week. That week they taught cha cha like a line dance. They had great music for open dance for salsa, merengue, and bachata. My husband and I had a blast!

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: Great food

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: Excellent on all accounts for our brunch—outdoor seating is lovely, we had great service (Daniel), and the vegan options plus beverage selection were also very good.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: Ryan was our waiter and he was super friendly and helpful. We had a great breakfast. Eggs Benedict were really delicious, I ordered the chipotle hollandaise, I wish it was a little spicier, but overall everything was really good.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: La comida está deliciosa, el mejor desayuno que hemos probado en jaco, el servicio de nuestro mesero Brian fue espectacular fue muy atento y amable. Recomiendo mucho este lugar, queremos regresar otra vez!

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: One of the top places to stop in Jaco! Service was top tier, servers were very attentive especially our friend Roddy:)

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: Loved the vibe here! The fish tacos were amazing, and Roddy took such great care of us. Highly recommend!

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text:
We had a great experience! Roddy offered us great service and food was excellent!
So bad there was no live music ! The web site statement about « live music everynight » is a little misleading since there is no live music on Sunday.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text:
La verdad, la experiencia en este lugar fue bastante decepcionante. El ambiente estaba bien, nada fuera de lo común, y los meseros fueron correctos y atentos. Sin embargo, la comida fue simplemente muy mala.

Los tacos estaban demasiado ácidos y además llegaron fríos, lo cual arruinó completamente el sabor. Las papas fritas estaban blandas y sin gracia, como si llevaran rato hechas. Y la ensalada… sinceramente, desagradable: se notaba que no era fresca y tenía un sabor poco apetecible.

En resumen, aunque el servicio y el ambiente fueron aceptables, la comida deja muchísimo que desear. No volvería por eso.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: Delicious food and cocktails. Highly reccomend.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: Roddy is the man. He was our server during a night where the power went out and he kept the party going smoothly without loosing a single table. Great drink recommendations and the food was outstanding. Hats off the the kitchen staff who was hustling through a packed house and no lights on the entire block, the food kept coming and everything was delicioso. 10/10 would recommend coming here for breakfast or dinner. Chill patio vibe with live music. Everything about this place is awesome.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: Local muy agradable con música en directo.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: The Green Room is one of our favorites in Jaco. The food is always fresh, flavorful, and made with care not just thrown together. The latest meal we had there was the mahi tacos and tuna tostadas, both were on point. Our waiter Roddy was super friendly and helpful. We’ll definitely be back soon.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: We came during brunch and it was great. Good vibes. Good music. Want to come back for dinner while we are here.

We plan on going back to purchase some art and loved meeting David who not only handles the artwork but is an incredible artist himself. Hubby bought me a pair of beautiful earrings that David made. Looking forward to going back to enjoy their live entertainment.

review_text: La nourriture était impeccable, mais le service était vraiment ce qui a fait la différence. Roddy a pris soin de nous et nous a fait vivre une expérience incroyable. Merci!

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text: Me gustó mucho el atmosférico con plantas y más plantas. Hay un bar y muchas pinturas adentro, el baño es muy bonito. Hemos comido opciones veganas que eran muy ricos y muy más.

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Cool spot for a bite & drinks!!
The Green Room in Costa Rica is such a fun, laid-back spot. Simple but delicious food choices, reasonable prices, and a great vibe overall. You can sit outside in the open air or inside by the bar—both are super comfortable and relaxed.

The food and drinks were really good, and the experience was unforgettable… there was a giant iguana casually cruising around the property until it ran off from a cat 😂 If you scream, the waiter will come running (yes, tested lol).

Highly recommend stopping here when you’re visiting Jacó. Great food, great atmosphere, and a little Costa Rica wildlife excitement to go with it! 🌴🍹

name: Green Room Cafe Bar

name: Green Room Cafe Bar
review_text:
5 estrellas no son suficientes para describir la experiencia con Green Room, definitivamente yo le daría más.
Contratamos el servicio de catering de Green Room para un grupo de 39 personas, durante 5 días para desayuno y almuerzo y fue la mejor decisión. La comida, el sabor, la presentación, el servicio, absolutamente todo fue increíble, la atención de Raquel también siempre fue maravillosa.
También tuvimos la oportunidad de visitar su restaurante y es uno de los mejores lugares a los que asistí en Jacó, tiene una vibra súper bonita y es como entrar en una atmósfera diferente. Ir a su restaurante es una oportunidad que no deberías perderte si vas a Jacó :)

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Cumplio las expectativas al 100%. El hotel fantastico, sus aguas termales todo un lujo, la comida riquissima, el spa muy bien cuidado y el personal muy amable y atento.
