name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Just left La Fortuna and I can’t say enough great things about this place! The property is stunning, secure, and in a perfect location to explore. Every single staff member from check-in to the restaurant to the groundskeepers were the most pleasant people that I have possibly ever encountered. Countless nearby coffee shops, natural hot springs, tours, and easy driving distance to Lake Arenal. Patiently waiting for the day I return!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: I have travelled 100K a year at times as an executive and vacationed all over the world.  I have to put the Royal Carin at the top of the heap. In particular, their staff and policies for client comfort and service are world class.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: They treat you like royalty in ever way possible. They really do believe in La Vida Pura. The thermal hot springs are heated by a volcano. It did not get any better. The jacuzzi is 100 degrees and bubbly. It's a 10 out of 10 for me. And it's only the first day‼️

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Great service at this hotel. They are always friendly & helpful. Breakfast was our favorite part of the stay. We looked forward to the breakfast every single morning! The hot springs are also very relaxing, and there weren’t many people around. The air in the room seemed to be pretty dry at night. Myself & my husband both coughed throughout the nights.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: A vista do hotel é linda, mas o hotel considera ser 5 estrelas por conta da localização e parcialmente as instalações físicas, esquecem que o que torna um hotel 5 estrelas é essencialmente o serviço. Tivemos alguns problemas primários de serviço, como não ter o quarto limpo sendo que saímos às 8h e retornamos depois das 15h, ou o acesso ao estacionamento completamente bloqueado por um ônibus por um tempo extenso, que nos resultou em problemas no passeio da manhã. Então considero que é um hotel adequado, mas não condizente com o preço cobrado.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: A vista do hotel é linda, mas o hotel considera ser 5 estrelas por conta da localização e parcialmente as instalações físicas, esquecem que o que torna um hotel 5 estrelas é essencialmente o serviço. Tivemos alguns problemas primários de serviço, como não ter o quarto limpo sendo que saímos às 8h e retornamos depois das 15h, ou o acesso ao estacionamento completamente bloqueado por um ônibus por um tempo extenso, que nos resultou em problemas no passeio da manhã. Então considero que é um hotel adequado, mas não condizente com o preço cobrado.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We spent a great relaxing week at Royal Corin Resort just outside of the town La Fortuna. From beginning to end we felt welcomed and well cared for by the very hospitable and capable staff of this quite resort. The facilities were spotlessly clean. The thermal water did wonders to our aging bodies, by the end I was walking up and down the stairs with ease. The view of the volcano upon entering our room was mesmerizing. Sometimes we saw iguanas sunning outside on  top of the palm trees. There are plenty of opportunities to do all kinds of activities nearby  on your own or by the help of the concierge. We would definitely stay here again.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We were happily surprised by the tranquil atmosphere and environment. The room was cozy, clean, with great views of the Arenal  Volcano. Great location close to local attractions. The hotel staff will assist you with booking and transportation arrangements. We were surrounded by beautiful gardens and awakened by serene birds singing. The thermal pools  were beautifully kept and relaxing. The staff was superb, courteous, and extremely professional. The food and service at the restaurant were excellent. We had a relaxing and pleasant vacation. Highly recommended this resort.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Review for Royal Corin

It’s been over a year since I celebrated my 30th birthday here at the Royal Corin and I’m still thinking about it to this day. The staff there made me feel so special with everyone wishing me a happy birthday at any chance they got and decorating my room for my birthday. The hotel itself was exceptional with stunning views of the volcano and an option to sit and lounge by a lovely pool with a pool bar. They also  had thermal pools of varying temperatures that you could sit in and soak. They have a really vibey rooftop bar which is an excellent spot to lounge and have some drinks. This hotel will always live in my mind as being one of the best places I’ve ever stayed at. I highly recommend this spot for a few nights if you’re visiting the La Fortuna area!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: I enjoyed my stay at the Royal Corin Spa. It has a great view of the Arenal Volcano and the staff are very friendly and helpful. They can arrange tours of many activities and sights. The rooms a comfortable and spacious. There is free parking and the hotel has a restaurant and lounge. There are multiple hot spa pools and jacuzzis.   I gave it a 4 rating due to the price. I stayed for 2 night and it was about $950 USD. There are many other places in the area and while I enjoyed my stay if i returned I think I would look for someplace less expensive. The other reason for the rating is that the hotel is on a highway and is not a walkable location. If you want to have dinner beside the hotel restaurnat or walk around in the evening it will require a drive or Uber ride to La Fortuna.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Loved this adult only resort.
From the minute we arrived we were welcomed with friendly staff.
Checking in was great,with a refreshing drink.
Every one of the staff were very friendly and helpful,
Breakfast was really good, the chef happily shared a recipe with me.The ceviche at the pool bar was excellent.
Rooms very comfortable ,pool was fantastic, especially after long days of walking.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Loved this Adult only hotel.|From the minute we arrived we were greeted by very friendly staff.(  EVERY STAFF MEMBER WAS LOVLEY)|Check in was great.|Room was very comfortable,|The breakfast was delish and the chef happily shared a recipe with me.|Best cerviche at the pool bar ever.|Loved the pools, ,WAS SAD TO LEAVE.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We loved it sooo much that we stayed for 3 nights more than planned! It is a very good five star hotel. We enjoyed the restaurants, both for dinner and amazing breakfast, the termal water pools and tranquility in the spacious and tranquil room.  Sleep quality was perfect, cleaning is good too. Location is closer to volcan Arenal and Mistico park and Sky Adventures, then to the village center, which makes it easier to get to the points of interest. Atmosphere was really friendly and lovely, the evenings were just magic, and the service is the best I've ever seen. 10 stars to the hotel staff, would love to come back!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Very good service , great hotel VIP the staff were very friendly and excellent customer service , I will come back next year

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: El lugar está muy correcto, limpio, el personal siempre atento y muy amable. El personal es el punto fuerte del lugar. La comida el punto más bajo, la justificación del alto precio la daban con el tamaño minúsculo de las porciones pero no con la calidad que se espera.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: My husband and I loved our stay! The staff are all very friendly and attentive. One of them offered us ponchos for our day tour. The breakfast is very good, fresh and has a lot of variety! We enjoyed the hot springs, very beautiful and great way to relax after a long day exploring/hiking. Everything was clean. My only suggestion would be to update the TVs that seem from 1950s.. very very outdated for the price you’re paying for your stay.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: This hotel was clean, comfortable, and had a really great breakfast selection. The thermal waters on site were also amazing. The only thing that was tough was finding it on a dark and rainy night!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
We highly recommend this adult-only resort if you’re looking for a more upscale yet laid back feel. Check in was smooth with cool towels and a welcome drink, and they held our bags for us. We arrived very early and they let us use the property fully until our room was ready. They found us at the pool well before check-in time to hand us our keys and had all our luggage in the room for us already. This was unexpected and one of many examples where the staff went above and beyond. The staff remembered our names and the girl that checked us in asked us about our adventures each day - truly exceptional service.

The sauna and various hot spring options (both pools and jacuzzis) were so perfect for relaxing and recovering in between or after hiking, zip lining, and ATV adventures. One pool was cool which was perfect to alternate to. Comfortable, shaded chairs and shaded table options. We loved the swim up bar and they had a great happy hour from 4:00-6:00 each day. We had chicken nachos for a snack at the swim up bar one day that were good.

Comfortable and clean rooms with nice showers. The free breakfast was really nice (buffet style with omelette stations and many different juices, with servers coming for coffee and water). WiFi and A/C worked well in the property.

We would absolutely stay here again!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: This place was  overall great and we were happy with our stay! Dorian took great care of us, showing us around the property and providing recommendations. The quality of the included breakfast was excellent with great fruits, traditional dishes, and omelettes. We thought dinner was acceptable but not great - we only tried it once. The spa was LOVELY. I had a high quality massage. The hot springs were wonderful, they felt super private and in no way left us wanting to visit the public hot springs. The location can’t be beat if you’re exploring La Fortuna!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Estancia de 7 días con familia ||Desde nuestra llegada, nos encontramos con algunos inconvenientes que afectaron la experiencia que esperábamos. Al entrar a nuestra habitación, notamos que las sábanas estaban manchadas de sangre, situación que nos resultó muy desagradable y tuvimos que retirar la ropa de cama inmediatamente. La mancha era evidente y claramente visible, lo cual consideramos un aspecto básico que debería haberse evitado con una revisión más minuciosa.||Durante nuestra primera noche, habitación 304  intentamos usar la secadora de cabello y descubrimos que estaba dañada. Tras reportarlo, agradecemos que nos proporcionaran una unidad nueva rápidamente. Sin embargo, creemos que este tipo de detalles se deben prever para evitar inconvenientes a los huéspedes.||En el primer día se nos acercaron a la mesa comentándonos que el desayuno no estaba incluido, cosa que tampoco era cierta y en donde tuvimos que acercarnos a la recepción para aclararlo, al final que si estaba y solo fue un mal entendido (increíble).||Al segundo día, recibimos las amenidades en nuestra mesa después de desayunar, cuando originalmente deberían estar en la habitación a nuestra llegada. Esto hizo que fuera imposible disfrutarlas adecuadamente. Aunque solicitamos llevarlas al cuarto, pensamos que una verdadera bienvenida debería sorprender y anticipar las necesidades del huésped. Dos días después sucedió algo similar con unas tablas de carnes que, al contener lácteos, tampoco pudimos consumir cómodamente. Esta falta de anticipación refleja una oportunidad importante para mejorar el servicio.||Por último, queremos señalar que las losetas de la alberca están en mal estado, con zonas quebradas donde lamentablemente sufrimos una cortadura en el pie. Tuvimos que atender la herida por nuestra cuenta, lo cual consideramos inaceptable para un lugar de su categoría.||En resumen, sentimos que hay una necesidad importante de supervisión y mejora en la anticipación del servicio, aspectos que resultan fundamentales dado el prestigio y costo de su establecimiento. Agradeceríamos que estos puntos sean atendidos para elevar la calidad de la experiencia que ofrecen a sus huéspedes.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We were greeted with kindness and treated lovely for our 3 days at the Royal Corin. We wished we had booked more days here and less at our next destination, but you live and learn. The grounds and views are stunning and The breakfast buffet was excellent with so much to choose from and I had an amazing Massage with Rachel. My only complaint was that the TV was too small lol.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Hotel maravilloso, localizado a unos 5 minutos en coche de la fortuna. Tiene piscinas termales qué son una gozada, y en la principal tiene un bar.
Mención aparte para la comida el desayuno y la cena. Todo lo que probamos estaba bueno y bien cocinado.
El personal muy atento y amable.
Hotel recomendable.
Si puedes coger habitación con vistas al volcán.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Stayed here for three nights, and I have mixed feelings about the experience.

The positives: The hotel is located a bit outside of La Fortuna town—far enough to feel quiet, yet still close enough to easily catch a taxi. The rooms are spacious, clean, and comfortable, and every room offers a stunning view of the volcano, which is definitely the standout feature. There are also seven thermal pools that guests can enjoy until late in the evening.

That said, the hotel is situated right next to a road, so some rooms pick up noticeable traffic noise from the balcony, which can take away from the overall experience.

The negatives: The food was underwhelming, even at the restaurant on the fifth floor. Breakfast was particularly disappointing—the buffet had very limited options, and I think an à la carte menu would have been a better choice. While some staff members were polite, helpful, and friendly, others came across as somewhat standoffish and disengaged.

Overall, I didn’t feel that the stay justified the high nightly price.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We had a great time at The Royal Corin!  The rooms are very spacious and the staff was attentive and kind.  The pool lounge chairs were uncomfortable but the day we were leaving we saw them bringing in cushions for all of them so that hopefully will remedy that situation.  It would also be nice for there to be one more pool that is not so hot for when the weather is hot and humid (the lowest temp pool is 82 degrees).  It is close to town and has beautiful views of the volcano.  There are also some amazing birds in the trees!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Beautiful location.  Looking out the window and seeing wild parrots and Toucans was a real treat. The view of the volcano was spectacular.  The hot spring pools felt wonderful at night. I would stay here again!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
This is a 3.5 star hotel at best. The rooms and bathrooms are so outdated and they were dirty. Lots of hair in bathroom.
The pool bar food and service is subpar. Would not recommend if you expect a true 5
star experience.

UPDATE… pic of hairball found in my bath towel. So gross.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Excelente servicio, una vista increíble y una gran atención del personal!!!!|Regresamos muy satisfechos a México

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Great hotel, great service, great vidw, with Very poor food

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Overall a great experience. The rooms, staff, and amenities were great. The main restaurants are what really bring the place down - stay here for the atmosphere/amenities and location, not the food. I recommend getting an Uber to La Fortuna town for food. The restaurants  here are overpriced  and the food was just average to below average (especially the steaks). The daily breakfast that's included was good. The best food we had was actually from the pool bar. Drinks were well made, and we really enjoyed happy hour at the poolside bar. We enjoy cigars, so we were pleasantly surprised by the very nice smoking patio

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Pros:  hot springs, there are 3 pools, 4 hot tubs and 1 sauna.  We didn't feel crowded at all hours.  It is an adult only property.
Cons:  hotel ground is too small, there is no space to walk around.  One of the pool is cold water, but it's too small to swim in.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Everything about this place is bad.  Bad service, Bad location next to the road, bad smell in the room, horrible gas smell from their own clean up crew.  They said we could do an early check-in and then made us wait for 2 hours.   plus to make matters worse we pre paid a massage for 2 people for $480 and we cancelled it a couple of days before.  They said they would refund it the same day. I just called them and they said it will take 20-30 days. Again, bad service.  Stay far away from this place.  I have been in the travel business for 40+ years and I have never witnessed anything like it.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Wat een luxe afsluiting van een super vakantie in Costa Rica had moeten zijn, liep uit op een enorme teleurstelling. De kamers zijn luxe, het personeel zeer aangenaam, maar de leiding ontbrak (manager Juanita Vega) schitterde door afwezigheid, dus met onze klachten (geen wifi, koud eten -wat vanuit de kelder met de gasten lift naar het restaurant op de 5e verdieping vervoerd moet worden, en daarbij van zeer matige kwaliteit). Personeel dat in de publieke (gasten-) ruimtes zat te eten, kortom zaken die niet passen bij een 5* hotel! Een persoonlijke mail  aan deze dame wordt genegeerd vandaar dit commentaar met aanbeveling dit hotel te mijden!! Er zijn vast betere te vinden, die vooral prijs/kwaliteit beter in verhouding zijn.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We absolutely loved this hotel! Great service, beautiful rooms and loved the all of different temperature pools. The complimentary breakfast was delicious. It’s a quick drive or uber ride to downtown La Fortuna. Would stay again!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: AMAZING!!!  We live in CR and have traveled extensively throughout the country.  This is the most impressive resort we’ve ever experienced here!!  The service was absolutely next level above and beyond.  And EVERYONE contributed to that experience.  SO romantic!!  It was a rainy valentines weekend so we didn’t even leave the resort once.  The spas meander throughout the premise so it’s easy to find your own private nook.  And the adults only really makes a difference.  We can’t wait to return!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Beautiful location and outlook for a hotel with great hot spring pools and jacuzzis in a real jungle setting under a stunning volcano! The rooms are lovely and spacious with big balconies that you can sit out on and enjoy the view.

The included buffet breakfast was great each day with lots of savoury options, breads, pastries and fruits (delicious pineapple!).

Our experience at the Lava restaurant was the low point of our stay and why I have had to knock a star off the rating. Both times we dined at the restaurant, components of the dish which were stated on the menu were missing from our servings. No one checked on us throughout our meal time so we highlighted this when paying the bill and were offered a free dessert which we didn't want and would have preferred perhaps a discount instead. We also noted that we were the only table dining that did not receive the complimentary bread and butter appetiser.

I also tried to order 3 different white and rosé wines on 4 different occasions over our 5 night stay and told they only had Malbec in stock. Pretty disappointing considering it was already a small selection on the menus and there are big wine displays in the lobby bar.

We decided to get Uber's into La Fortuna the remaining 3 nights for dinner and drinks where we had a much better experience - lots of vegetarian options, drinks, and averaged around $5/ 10 minutes each way.

The other disappointment of our stay was noisy drilling and men at work on the poolside for 3 out of our 5 days. They were drilling and polishing slabs next to the pool all day long for 3 days, creating a lot of construction noise and dust in the air. We felt this was very poorly planned to be carried out in peak season and on 3 consecutive days which affected the majority of our stay (could this not have been scheduled over a number of weeks if necessary to minimise disruption to guests stay?).

Overall it was a great stay thanks to the beautiful views and hot springs but brought down a tad by the factors mentioned.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Excellent staff and service, always willing to help and so friendly. Lovely hotel would stay again

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: La comida es deliciosa

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: This is our first stay at the Royal Corin, but we would  stay here again in a heartbeat.  It’s a quick 10-15 minute Uber ride into LaFortuna, where there are no shortage of excellent restaurants.  The 2 restaurants on-site are top-notch and also an excellent option during one’s stay.  The breakfast buffet is extensive and what’s not to love about the food and intimacy at The Lava Restaurant, overlooking the gorgeous hot thermal pool.  The proximity of this property to all the tours is very close (10-15 minutes). The staff are very friendly, all speak English with a high level of proficiency.  Highly recommended!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Excelente hotel! El personal super amable y los precios dentro razonables

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Staff and resort was beautiful! It was raining basically our whole stay but we didn’t even care because of how nice the pools, spa and restaurants were! Close to downtown La fortuna as well so we explored the restaurants in town and went to the waterfall which was amazing! Dorian at the front was very helpful and welcoming as was the whole entire staff!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Great hotel with clean, spacious rooms, amazing showers with body jets & friendly staff!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The value for the price is simply not there. This is not a 5 star hotel , not even close more like a 3.5 at best compared to other destinations. A few positives: overall service was good, we had an issue with our room and they helped us out and staff is friendly, even if they don’t go out of their way, our room was outdated but spacious and clean we had the JR Suite , the grounds were nice and it’s in close proximity to the town, which is a must for dinner as you would not want to eat at hotel restaurant more than once, we did enjoy the massage and spa— now the negatives: very very very noisy from the street , had to switch rooms because of this issue and it was still loud with all the doors and windows closed, if you are a light sleeper this would not be the resort for you, amenities are very outdated , lots of unsafe cracks and broken tiles in the hot springs, expect to bring water shoes just to walk into the pool, broken fixtures, tiny tv in room, food is just ‘ok’ very expensive compared to the value, overall atmosphere is extremely boring no music, no activities or energy , it attracts geriatrics, sauna didn’t work all week, bottom line not what you would expect from a premium price that this resort charges. Luckily there were lots of activities to do around town so we were not stuck there all day…

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
4 star hotel with 3 star service at a 5 star price. 🙃
The room is fine, had a suite which was really nice. 4/5.
Breakfast has everything you want. 4/5
Thermal bath - really nice pool (hot) area but there are even better in the area. Took us 2 days to get a sunbed, got tired of it so just took "reserved" ones after 2 hours.. 3/5.
Pool bar - menu 3/5 and service 2/5 (some exceptions).
Dinner at Lava - 3/5.
Activities - seem to have a cooperation with a good activity company so a lot on the menu, tried a few. 4/5.
Location is good just outside LA Fortuna, taxi cost around $20.
Front desk -3/5. Porter was 5/5 though.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: As a hot spring l💕ver, The Royal Corin hits the mark. It’s a very special place to heal and relax. There are so many pools to choose from with varied temps. The rooms were wonderful, fabulous spa showers and maintained daily with care. The staff warm and friendly. The volcano views from our 4th level floor sublime. You can reserve the gym and have it to yourself. The bar does get loud at happy hour, but otherwise it’s pretty quiet. Can’t wait to return. Pura Vida!!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: What a gem! The Royal Corin offers the perfect balance of intimacy and luxury. The staff is exceptional and provides a personal touch you don't find at larger resorts, yet the amenities never feel crowded. Highly recommend for a relaxing getaway. We’ll definitely be back!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
My husband and I stayed at the Royal Corin from Dec. 1-4, 2025.  Our travel agent suggested it.  We arrived at 6:30pm.  A representative from the front desk went over the hotel and it's amentities which was nice.
Our room was spacious and clean.  The staff are wonderful; helpful and friendly.  The cold pool and hot pools are nice. The main pool is hot with a swim-up bar, very popular.
We had dinner the first night at The Lava Bar.  Lovely setting, the food however, average.  I had the Red Snapper.  In Costa Rica they cook fish differently.  It had a sauce and was super salty.  I couldn't finish it.  My husband had the BBQ pork ribs which was just ok.  The total bill was $116.23 USD.  We ate at the pool bar/restaurant - Basalto Bar, 2 days it was very good. One night we went into La Fortuna and had a great dinner.  The town is worth a visit.
The breakfast buffet every  morning in the Emperador was very good.  We suggest you get the made-to-order omlettes if you want eggs.  They have a mix of Costa Rican and regular breakfast items; bacon, eggs, home fries, etc. They change up items on the buffet every day.  I would recommend The Royal Corin.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: This place is a hidden gem. Not as well known as Tabacon or Baldi’s but it’s worth it. It’s adults only and there’s plenty of privacy to enjoy hot springs and jacuzzi without sharing with others. The rooms are gorgeous with a view of the volcano. The only complaint was the long wait for check in but we came during a busy Christmas week season so it was to be expected. Highly recommend!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The room is subpar and the food at their restaurant is terrible.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: If you don't love this place, then you suck...

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
This was our first time in Costa Rica. We decided to stay in the La Fortuna area and found this resort. When we arrived, we were greeted by a very friendly staff with moist towels and a nice fruit drink. Lobby is beautiful and opens up to outside hot springs area.
When we arrived in our room, we were greeted with balloons and greenery celebrating our anniversary. Made us feel special. Room was very nice, had a fridge but no microwave. Plenty of room to put your clothes and walk around. Bed was comfortable. Very clean and view was very nice of the volcano. Table and chairs on balcony but only private on one side. Unfortunately, we were only able to see volcano one day due to low clouds.
Bathroom was spacious and so was shower. Spa type fixtures. Only issues with room are if you are a light sleeper, the loud road noise will keep you awake, needs better lighting, and you have to use the key to turn on the ac and the lights. Bathroom issues are if the sprayers in the shower are in the certain position, they will hit the door and the get the bathroom floor really wet, the handheld shower wand fixture does not move up and down so hard to place when you are not holding it, and the toilet takes a little to get used to.
Outside bar and hot springs area is very beautiful. Staff is very friendly and helpful. Can order food that can be eaten there or delivered to your room. Although they really need a better system to keep those poor people from running so much to get items. They were always out of towels and every time they needed something (like ice or liquor) they had to go inside. I really think the hotel needs to have a better system to keep up with inventory. They had to cancel happy hour one day because of this. Also, have a dedicated person to handle the towels instead of the bar staff. That is just crazy. In addition, be careful to check prices of drinks. Liquor that is not top shelf in the other places is considered to be at this hotel. Make sure to ask when you order, as they will offer it.
Downstairs Restaurant was very nice to have dinner and food was good, but portions were small for the price. If you can, go to La Fortuna, better options. Breakfast buffet was amazing and had plenty of different options to choose from. Part of stay.
Staff was friendly and helpful.
Did the twilight/nighttime tour through the hotel. This was amazing. It was with the company Canoa Adventure. Karen the tour guide and the driver Mau did an amazing job taking care of us. I would highly recommend if they are the company.
I have to give a shout out to Valentina. She was so helpful and amazing from answering my emails to just confirming and taking care of us. She totally went above to offer suggestions and even remembered who I was when we spoke the first time in person.
Also, Daniel (not sure if that was his name) at the entrance. He was always so friendly and made sure our transportation/tour found us when they arrived.
The hotel was wonderful, but it is the staff that makes this place. And above all IT IS ADULTS ONLY! So nice not to have kids running all over the places screaming. Good job implementing this!
We used Uber every day and never had an issue. Nice not to have to worry about having cash. Did not have an issue with communication either. Went to La Fortuna and they picked up at the hotel and returned to the hotel.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Wonderful experience! Would LOVE to to back! The breakfast was delicious each morning and the springs / jakuzzi pools were great. The whole placd was very clean and the bed was especially comfortable! Staff went above and beyond.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Stayed here a week. Top notch, perfect view of Arenal Volcano from room balcony, all the employees that work here are wonderful and hard working, very clean hotel, pool and hot tubs and restaurants and room service were GREAT!!! Oh......and the included breakfast is SUPERB!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Wow wow wow - what a wonderful stay at the Royal Corin!
They honestly have the BEST staff, and the service was always 5-STARS!!!!
I loved everything: the hotel, the rooms, the breakfast, their kindness and hospitality, truly everything was amazing!
If you’re looking for a comfortable and relaxing place, come here!
Thank you to the front desk staff and everyone who made our stay experience extra special 💕💖
Tip:
1-book a room on the upper levels to have the best view of the volcano
2-there’s a fridge in the room, so if you miss breakfast one morning, they ca pack a lunch for you!
3-use Uber at your own discretion as it’s illegal and Uber drivers may leave you on the side of the road to avoid getting caught.
4-if using Ubers, leave earlier and have a taxi number on you in case of emergency. Taxis only accept cash.
Have a blast!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Do not go to the restaurant. The restaurant was terrible.  One of the worst experiences I’ve had in recent memory.  Sat down at 8, ordered 8:10, drinks by 8:30, apps at 9:15, dinner at 10:15.  If that sounds slow it’s cause it was amazingly slow.  Would not recommend this place to my worst enemy.  Also the manager Javier left halfway through their service.  If your restaurant is so booked maybe don’t take a reservation made that day? Or maybe stay through a busy night of service to help?

TLDR: the restaurant is awful

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: I had the most incredible stay at The Royal Corin. From the moment I arrived, Valentina, Javier, and Jocy were warm, friendly, and genuinely welcoming and went above and beyond throughout my stay. What truly touched me was how special Valentina made my birthday. Valentina surprised me with thoughtful gestures and made sure every detail was perfect. The rooms were spotless and beautifully maintained, the thermal water pool was relaxing and serene. I left feeling refreshed, celebrated, and so grateful for the amazing experience. I highly recommend The Royal Corin to anyone looking for exceptional service, comfort, and an unforgettable stay.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Con la comida me fue mal 3 dias seguidos

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Great staff, super friendly, food was pretty good, the beds were amazing which makes alll the difference.  Our stay was stress free and wonderful.  Spa was great, all the excursions they set up for us ran smoothly and were great.  I will stay here again if I’m in the area

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
We had an amazing experience at The Royal Corin in La Fortuna. From the moment we arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable, relaxing, and memorable. The hotel is beautiful, the thermal pools are incredible, and the entire property feels like a peaceful escape with a luxury touch.

I want to give a special shoutout to Valentina at the front desk. She was truly outstanding. Valentina was warm, welcoming, and incredibly helpful throughout our stay. She made check-in seamless, answered all our questions with patience, and gave us wonderful recommendations. Her kindness and professionalism set the tone for our entire visit. She is a star.

We will absolutely be returning and recommending The Royal Corin to friends and family. Thank you for a fantastic stay!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
This resort feels over-rated and significantly over-priced. While the property itself is clean and spacious, it falls short in many other areas. The AC in our room didn’t work, and it took speaking with three different staff members before anyone was finally sent to diagnose and fix the issue.

The food at the Volcano Restaurant was limited, overpriced, and overall unimpressive. One evening, we attempted to order from the pool menu but were told that only the two dine-in restaurants were available for ordering—pool menu items were offered only through room service, which made no sense. We proceeded with room service and ordered wings and nachos; both arrived cold. To make matters worse, the delivery person (Jonathan) insisted multiple times that we tip in cash only, despite us explaining that we would be adding the tip to the card.

The hot springs were extremely hot one evening, almost unbearable and the “jacuzzis” did not have functioning jets. The rocks in the hot springs were also very sharp; I actually stubbed my toe badly and had to ask the front desk for first aid supplies. They had almost nothing available, so I ended up going into town to buy bacitracin myself. Several of the pools could use a thorough cleaning. At one point, the hotel taped a sign on the elevator near our room indicating it was for “room service only,” and the same delivery person rushed off the elevator and pointed to the sign repeatedly, as if we should have automatically known about their sudden elevator restrictions.

We also visited the spa; the amenities were average and the massage was fine, but once again we were followed up with to confirm the tip amount despite it being clearly written.

One genuine positive worth mentioning: Doran, an employee on-site, was amazing. He was friendly, attentive, and consistently went out of his way to greet us by name and ensure everything was going well. His hospitality truly stood out.

After just three nights, we were more than ready to leave and head to the Guanacaste area. Overall, the experience was disappointing. We visited Baldi Springs across the street and had a far better time there. As a travel agent and frequent traveler, I would not return to this resort nor recommend it to clients—there are many other options in the area that offer much better value for the price.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Love this resort.. lots of quiet secluded pools..a fantastic spa area with additional pools and sauna..a swim up bar and views of the arenal volcano from all balconies

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Our stay at The Royal Corin was absolutely incredible! From the moment we arrived, we were captivated by the stunning view of the Arenal Volcano and the beautifully maintained grounds. The atmosphere is serene and relaxing—perfect for a getaway.  The thermal pools and jacuzzies, each with different temperatures, were a highlight. They offered the perfect way to unwind after a day of exploring. The location is ideal—close to town yet peaceful, and very accessible for excursions in the area.  Our room was spacious, spotless, and extremely comfortable. Every detail was thoughtfully arranged to ensure a luxurious experience.
What truly made our stay exceptional was the staff. Everyone we encountered was warm and welcoming, but a special shoutout goes to Justin, who consistently went above and beyond to make sure we were taken care of.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Staff is friendly, service great, a pleasure to stay there. The spa and hot springs are amazing.

review_text: OMG this hotel they have everything good service good food good people and the price is good for me .the pools I really like the view for volcano is unbelievable.:) I liked.:) and especially very quiet.the beds the room very clean .

Only complaint is that the rooms are a bit outdated. The TV is silly old analogue.

review_text:
We had a wonderful stay at The Royal Corin. The hotel offers a stunning view of the Arenal Volcano, with beautifully maintained grounds and a relaxing atmosphere. Its location close to town is also very convenient for exploring.

The staff were extremely friendly and welcoming, especially the front desk team. They showed great thoughtfulness by noticing my mother’s birthday from her passport and preparing a sweet surprise for her. This small yet meaningful gesture made our stay truly memorable.

Overall, The Royal Corin is a charming hotel with excellent service, beautiful surroundings, and those thoughtful touches that set it apart. A stay here is truly worth experiencing!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
The Royal Corin is beautiful and the service was amazing. From the moment we arrived the staff went above and beyond. We were traveling with another couple and within 12 hours of us arriving they remembered us, that we were traveling together and preferences. The food was very good we loved every we tried. They were very accommodating one of our party is allergic to gluten and they ensured everything was prepared appropriately.
The only thing to note is that everything shuts down at 10 pm. We did not mind we stopped and got alcohol on our way in so we sat on our balcony if we wanted a night cap. Because we were there in low season they actually shut down the bars at 8 a couple of the nights.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Una experiencia inolvidable, la intención de absolutamente todo el personal fue excelente. Siempre recibidas con saludos cálidos, la cena del día de la madre sin palabras! Y en general la comida estaba exquisita definitivamente es una experiencia que me encantaría repetir!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Wow magical place

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Top Hotel in Fortuna, liegt zwar an der Hauptstraße aber ist trotzdem ruhig. Schöner Pool inklusive Bar, 4 Hot Springs, Dampfsauna, tolles Panorama-Restaurant in der obersten Etage.
Das Frühstück ist überragend und auch abwechslungsreich, Bedienung am Tisch bietet ohne Aufforderung Kaffeespezialitäten an. Sehr zuvorkommender Service, ausschließlich freundliche Angestellte. Es herrscht in diesem 5-Sterne-Hotel eine sehr angenehme Atmosphäre. Einziges Manko, Gym klein und mit Geräten etwas „überladen“.
Insgesamt klare Empfehlung für dieses Hotel. Gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Luxury and classy. Security and staff are amazing. Breakfast is top tier. Hot springs are wonderful with actual hot 104 jacuzzi. Perfect view of the volcano and excellent bird watching. Place is relaxing!!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
If I could give 6 stars I would! My fiance & I  stayed at the Royal Corin. We used Megan Hagarty from Costa Rica Vacations to book our entire trip! She handled everything from the hotel stays, to the excursions, to transportation.
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa exceeded our expectations! Staff, make you feel like royalty from the moment you walk In the door.
1st, we ate at the Bar restaurant Basalto. I got the Deluxe Patacon! OMG!! Crazy amazing! Then we got services at the Loto Spa. They have several natural hot springs heated by the Arenal Volcano, but that’s not even the best part!!! The services we got were like heaven! I got the body scrub/wrap by Carla! My fiance got a hot stone message. We are here celebrating his birthday. When we got to the room, there was a balloon & a towel cake on the bed & during dinner, they brought complimentary chocolate covered strawberries!
We very much enjoyed our complimentary breakfast everyday. Ridiculous amount of choices! & everything was 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟.
PS! If you decide to use Megan from CRV, mention my name & we both get a credit!
Highly highly highly recommend The Royal Corin!

Carlos, Laura, Michal, Ryan, Justin, and Valentina,  the others also, Amazing staff, all of them I wish I could put all them down. From the food to the rooms, great place to visit. We will be most certainly coming back! I truly wish we had this kind of service in America. not going to happen. GOD bless all of you and keep doing what you’re doing! Truly spoiled us.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
We spent the second half of our honeymoon here in early June 2025. We had an amazing experience (other than lots of rain) including the breakfast 👌, the local town, the comfortable room, the sense of quietness and security and so much more.

We agreed it's definitely a good move that we split up our 10 day stay with another resort a few hours away, as this resort is luxurious, quiet and slow paced. Great for some but since it's thermal pool based - and was raining - it was nice to have our rental car to venture out into town that was like 5/10 minutes away for dinner, ice cream and shopping.

We loved the pools, the staff was great (especially Johnathan) and the buffet was surprisingly excellent too! We even found it hilarious that a giant iguana made a home in a palm outside of our room the ENTIRE trip even in the monsoons. We named him henry 🤩

We recommend if you're in la fortuna: stopping by the local grocery store for a fresh coconut/water, doing the hanging bridges tour, volcano tour and also chocolate/coffee making tour. We also did a day at tabacon up the street and it was AWESOME!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: My partner and I stayed a the Royal Corin recently.  We had such an amazing time! The rooms were very nice. The grounds were incredible. The food was very good! Sébastien and Bryan were very accommodating and made our stay comfortable.  We will definitely return! I highly recommend staying here.

review_text: wow just wow. gorgeous hotel. a million pools to choose from, staff are all angels, breakfast was huge and a new variety everyday. the massage in the spa was spectacular. was our little paradise to come home to after exploring fortuna all day no notes

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Our stay at this luxury hotel near Arenal Volcano was nothing short of magical. From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warmth and genuine hospitality that made us feel instantly at ease. The highlight was definitely the spectacular view of Arenal right from the balcony of our room — waking up to that sight each morning was truly unforgettable.

The property itself is beautifully maintained, with lush gardens and several serene hot springs that made for the perfect way to unwind after a day of exploring. Every detail felt thoughtfully curated to create a relaxing, upscale experience.

While the breakfast buffet options were somewhat limited for vegans, the staff went above and beyond — the chef kindly prepared a special plant-based plate just for us, and it was absolutely delicious. That extra effort made all the difference and really reflected the level of care and service offered here.

If you’re looking for a peaceful retreat with breathtaking scenery and top-notch hospitality, this place is a dream come true.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Volcano view room is worth it! Food and drink on site are pricey but convenient. Amazing staff.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: This place is beautiful! The service is top notch and the location couldn’t be more perfect. Our balcony had the perfect view of the volcano and the food is 5 star! If you are looking for a place with no kids, perfect views, amazing pools,  and exceptional service… this is the place for you!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Extraordinario servicio y ambiente, en SPA espectacular.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Fantastic stay at the royal corin! Worth every penny from the clean rooms to the amazing staff service to the breakfast variety.

The pros:
1. Breakfast-included food options were delicious. You will not go hungry as there are plenty of options that are varied as well as tasty. Staff is very attentive.
2. Hot springs pools were clean and inviting.
3. Concierge and check in process easy and fast.
4. Views! Perfect location overlooking the arenal volcano.

The cons:
One con which was just odd. The mud wrap spa treatment my family of 4 received was great but we seemed to have gotten slight variations in the treatment. For example one of us received a full back massage while others didn’t. It was just odd! Still 5/5 experience and the staff is lovely.

Would highly recommend and stay again.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Un encanto incomparable. Realmente un hotel magnífico, realmente una bienvenida incomparable. Todos los restaurantes son de primera calidad. Gracias por recibirnos tan bien. un lugar inolvidable

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Beautiful resort just outside of Fortuna.  Service was great and the hotel was quaint, yet large enough. Four levels of rooms with hot springs pools (yes the entire main swimming  pool was 102 degrees), but also had a cooler 82 degree pool and several spa’s, steam room, etc.

Rooms were nice and modern, especially being in Costa Rica.  This hotel seemed to be one of the nicer ones  in the area, if not the nicest.  The 5th floor included a very beautiful restaurant where we had a night cap daily.  The food was delicious and the drinks were great.  Even made a great martini, White Russian, and espresso martini.  Great drink menu, but limited whiskey/bourbon selection as you might expect. Nice selection of wines too, but again you’re not in NYC.

Other notes…
Quick Uber ride to town La Fortuna  7-10 minutes. Yes, they have Uber.
Can see the Arenal volcano right from your balcony.  No smoking on your balcony, but have a nice outdoor smoking lounge area.  Valet parking, welcoming drink, man made waterfalls, swim up bar, wait staff service at your pool chair but you need to get your towel (1 per person) at the front desk which was a little odd. Many excursions in the area with the shuttle picking you up right at main entrance. We very much enjoyed our stay and would highly recommend

Highly recommended staying here if traveling  around the Fortuna Costa Rica area.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Disfrutar al máximo de vacaciones o negocios.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The rooms are clean, comfy and the balcony overlooking the pool with a view of the volcano is spectacular. We really enjoyed all of the different pools/hot tubs and the swim up bar was a great way to enjoy a drink in the pool. The Lava restaurant (top floor) was excellent and one of the best meals we had in CR. Service was excellent as well. What’s also great is that you can order off that menu from the pool area if you want a more relaxed experience. I highly recommend the spa - we did a couples massage and it was perfect. Last, a special shout out to Valentina at the front desk - not only was she very welcoming upon arrival, but also she knew us by name and recognized that we were leaving on checkout day before breakfast so she made sure we had a breakfast to-go which is above and beyond. Wonderful stay all around, and I highly recommend staying at the Royal Corin while in La Fortuna.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We loved everything about this resort. Very friendly staff. Clean. Comfortable. Beautiful pool, spa and sauna area. The breakfast buffet is outstanding! Only a 10 minute drive to La Fortuna. 100% recommend Royal Corin Thermal Water & Spa Resort.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Friendly staff, hot springs were great.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We had a great time here. The people that work there are very lovely. They have parking  which is great. The breakfast in the morning is sufficient and yummy, they could do slightly better with making sure the fruit stays away from nats because the breakfast area is all open air pretty much. I would say that it’s not the upper most rung of luxury for a 5 star hotel but it was perfect for what we needed while there. All rooms have AC and we had an incredible view of the volcano.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: I stayed here in December for my 40th birthday. The staff was exceptional and treated me so well. The resort is very beautiful, clean and relaxing. I visited the spa and had the most amazing deep tissue massage and relaxed using the saunas and spas afterwards. From the staff, the thermal pool and jacuzzis, to the room with amazing views and amazing vibe I highly recommend staying here. I also booked all my excursions through the front desk staff and had the best time! I will definitely be back to stay here again next time I visit the beautiful Costa Rica ❤️

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The Royal Corin exceeded our expectations! From wonderful service to the immaculately kept grounds it was the perfect quaint resort to spend a few days in La Fortuna. The thermal pools are wonderful and the staff is always helpful and kind!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The Royal Corins service alone is five stars. From the moment we arrived someone greeted us, helped us check in and while we were early they came to find us at the pool to let us know our room was ready. They make the point of knowing your name to make you feel even more welcome. It was my husbands birthday and they surprised us with several extremely thoughtful gestures. I can’t say enough wonderful things about the staff. The views of the volcano from our room were spectacular and the different thermal pool options were lovely. The breakfast was phenomenal with so many options as well. Would highly recommend staying here.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Le reservé a mis papás una estadía de dos noches por su aniversario.|Yo ya me he quedado en el hotel tres veces y nunca fallan.|Llamé a reservaciones y me atendió Gillian, me ayudó a darles una sorpresa.|Me ayudó a reservarles un Tour de caminata suave, y a darles una sorpresa de un spa. |Mis papás nunca se habían hecho un spa, y nunca habían estado en un hotel cinco estrellas.|El servicio que el Hotel Royal Corin brinda es de primer mundo, la comida siempre espectacular, la vista desde la habitación del balcón al volcán se lleva todos los créditos, y el servicio que el personal da desde el Guarda de seguridad en la entrada hasta la recepción fue magnífica.|El desayuno fue sumamente amplio y rico.|Mis papás quedaron totalmente encantados con el servicio recibido en el Hotel Royal Corin. Nunca habían experimentado ser tan chineados, tanto que ya pidieron quedarse ahí para su próximo aniversario.|Muchas gracias a todos por hacer esta sorpresa un 100/10.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
From the location to the atmosphere to the impeccable personal service - this resort is worth every single penny. That whole saying of "you get what you pay for" and this is the best place in the region if not entire country.

Super highly recommend for an experience like no other.

Activities? Hanging bridges and waterfall is a must but don't worry about the volcano hike - hotel view is much closer!

Much thanks to Jillyan for the email communication, Justin, the bartender lady at the swim-up bar - everybody really went out of their way to take care of every aspect of the stay!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Royal Corin was overall an amazing stay. All the staff were so friendly, helpful and caring. Throughout our long honeymoon stay we were offered complimentary treats which was very thoughtful. Booking excursions and spa treatments with the hotel was a breeze and so convenient. The rooms and facilities were clean and comfortable. Food was always delicious and reasonably priced. In terms of location the hotel is a close drive to the La Fortuna city center and is very accessible to other fun restaurants/shops. The main large thermal pools were wonderful and very relaxing to lounge in (even in the rain)!

The service at Royal Corin was exceptional. All of the staff were customer-focused and it truly felt like they wanted you to have a pleasant experience with everything at all times. During breakfast Jonathan would always check in with us and make sure we were taken care of. Wilber was the best bartender. He was kind, his service was stellar and we loved practicing our Spanish with him.

My only gripe with the hotel is that parts of it are a bit dated. Although in good condition, some of the tech in the rooms could be upgraded such as the TVs and shower system. The windows could use better sound proofing from the highway outside. The smaller thermal pools in the back could use a little more upkeep but they were still fine. Overall the high quality service and vibes made up for it and we will definitely be back. This hotel is a total gem!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The hotel is located right next to a busy road and in stead of listening to the sounds of the nature in the morning, you are listening to the sound of the cars passing by. The place is outdated as well. Looking like something that would’ve been in style 20 years ago. Staff is great but other than services the place is just sad. We made it all the way to Costa Rica and booked it based on all these high reviews and instead found ourselves in this commercialized resort on the main road.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: EXCELLENT place!!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Lovely property, good barbecue and service. They went an extra mile to decorate the room and dinner table for my friends birthday and also offered a complementary dessert. Only slight issue is the sales tax and service charge added to the bill but this practice seems common in la fortuna.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Highly recommend this place. Adults only. Spa and the hotel springs pool are out of this world.  The staff were on top of it! Only thing i didn't like were the cheap robes in the room.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Cuidado si eres agente de viajes, no comisionan todas las ventas

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The Royal Corin was everything it was led to believe. Elegant, comfortable, fantastic staff, well run. Very good food! Fantastic get away and well worth the ride from airport!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Absolutely love it here feels amazing to be here & loving the weather such a great vacation for us!!!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Amazing and comfortable.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The hotel and its staff are the best I've ever experienced! Bryan at the front desk is so helpful, and the hot spring pools are just right! We had a restful week there!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We had a wonderful stay here for 4 nights! The views of the volcano are absolutely amazing from the rooms. The service is excellent and all the staff is well informed and friendly. The morning breakfast is vast and delicious. The thermal springs are a perfect way to relax after doing all the adventure packed activities in the area. The resort is about 2-3 miles from town, which is the only reason it is 4/5 for location.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Extraordinary staff, restaurant, accommodations

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Wonderful stay - high quality amenities, clean, modern rooms, and attentive service. Food quality varied by meal and service could be a bit slow. Great breakfast! Easy 10-min taxi ride into town of La Fortuna, don’t plan to walk to much from here

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: My experience at the Royal Corin will never be surpassed. The staff in all respects went above and beyond in ways I could not adequately convey in a short review. I will forever be amazed by everything about this establishment and would give the Royal Corin 10 stars if I could. Beyond amazing. From sparkling clean and comfortable rooms, to beautifully decorated surroundings, to amazing views, to delectable foods, and to the most outstanding staff--every single person. I know any sane guest would agree with me. Thinking about booking? Don't delay. Oh, and how could I not mention the Thermal Pools...Phenomenal! (Please note: I have given other places 5 stars, but the Royal Corin is more than 5 stars. LOVE!)

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
We loved our stay at Royal Corin- the facilities, rooms and the hotel itself are beautiful. The staff are great too and the place is so clean. Good location too, just a 5 minute trip into La Fortuna with an uber ($4-6). The breakfast is amazing too- very good selection which is always fresh wi the a couple of changes each day. The omelette guy was brilliant. The food we did order from the restaurants was pretty good too.
Unfortunately there were a couple of negatives for me-
The room has very little sound proofing so you can hear the traffic from the road and when it’s raining there seems to be a gutter problem as you get a lot of noise from this.
The pool bar is lovely and I would have like to spend more time there but we were being charged approx $30 for a Pina Colada which is the most I’ve ever been charged for a cocktail. They say $12 on the menu yet I never paid less than $19 for a cocktail. Disappointing as I would spend more time in the hotel and restaurants if it was more reasonable.
The gym can be booked out by people that don’t use it. A guest had booked it out for 2 hours and never showed up.
Overall great stay but still expensive for what you get (£2000 for a week).

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Conveniently located for pickups by a local tour company.  We went on alot of excursions.  Otherwise we were relaxing at the hotel.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Amazing!! The best service I’ve ever had, with a stunning view of the Arenal Volcano, spectacular thermal pools, and a massage that made me feel ten years younger. I cannot recommend this hotel enough. Thank you for a wonderful stay!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Close to town. Food, service, and resort was amazing

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
This is the 1st hotel that says we cannot give you a reservation on our restaurant because you're not staying with us.
We've been lucky enough to travel the world and never, ever had someone say no because you stayed someplace else.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Just spend 8 days there and couldn't be more happier! The staff were super friendly and always geared me by name.  The pools were incredible! The views from the room are simply stunning! The breakfast buffet is top notch! Simply can not say anything bad about my experience there.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Fechei esse hotel porque já tinha as thermas dentro, e me arrependi de não ter ficado mais 1 dia para curtir só o hotel. La Fortuna tem tanta coisa pra fazer, que eu acabei ficando fora todos os dias, uma pena porque o hotel é muito bom. O serviço é excelente, meu quarto estava todo decorado porque ia ser meu aniversário, e no jantar também a mesa estava decorada. Comida boa e atendimento muito bom também no restaurante. A recepção sabia meu nome toda vez que eu passava por ali, e me ajudaram a fechar alguns tours que eu tinha interesse. O quarto bem confortável, chuveiro muito bom, e tudo limpinho.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Great hotel, excellent service, stuff is super polite and friendly, great breakfast, the hotel is not big and feels intimate, outdoor area is beautiful, very close to La Fortuna.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The attention to detail, the amount of service from the staff is outstanding. Highly recommend coming here.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Hotels are meant to be a relaxing reprieve, but with strict, abnormal regulations that impacted our experience, the springs and restaurants closing earlier than most in the area, and the lack of staff friendliness, we wouldn't choose this hotel again or recommend to anyone.

La Fortuna is a secluded area - you can't step outside the hotel doors and find restaurants, bars, or public areas to gather. Hotels are also on the smaller side - it's unlikely you'll be able to get multiple rooms at the same hotel.

Our 18 friends and family members stayed in (3) different La Fortuna hotels. We planned to make ours, The Royal Corin, the central meet-up for shuttle pick ups.

However, our loved ones were usually denied access into the hotel's lobby or Front Drive, due to a No Outside Guests policy. This made transportation for 18 people even more (unnecessarily) complicated than it already was. And we weren't causing trouble, or looking like people who would. My husband's sweet, Tica mom was denied multiple times.

This was actually the first time some of our loved ones met each other. The only time we were all together was at check-in. Despite this, the hotel treated us as a group, denying a late check-out to all but one of the rooms. They asked my mom about the status of our friend's room - which she had no idea about, and should never be expected to. The Royal Corin demanded our friends and family move all luggage to our honeymoon suite - which was also not ready to be seen (by my mother especially) and felt violating. With our friends staying not knowing our family members, and each group having different plans for the day, this added an unexpected level of stress.

Worst of all, the anniversary of our friend's mother's passing fell over our arrival date at The Royal Corin. It was an especially difficult day for him. We planned a private, lowkey night of dinner and reflecting on his memories of her.
By the time the lengthy check-in concluded (that never mentioned the guests policy), the restaurants were about to close, so we ordered room service to avoid inconveniencing the employees. However, our friend was told he wasn't allowed up to our room. When we came to retrieve him, we were told that even the guest in the room couldn't allow anyone up unless they were staying at the hotel.

Their only accommodation was for us to sit at the bar, where the bartender was obviously not happy about our presence (and I don't blame him - all of us are from the hospitality industry and know how terrible it is to get seated in the final minute). It made it uncomfortable for our friend to read the tribute he wrote for his mom, and he ended up never doing it. To top things off, our room service order was cold. When we asked the bartender to reheat the steak we ordered, he microwaved it and turned a medium-rare steak into a well-done one. Considering we paid thousands to stay a couple of nights, this was not what we anticipated.

After the first night, we ended up spending most of our time next door at El Silencio, where the springs felt more natural, we were allowed to swim until 11PM without issue, and could play cards together at our friend's bungalow.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
I went in August it was my first time in another country and the installations of the hotel they seemed to me so good the view at the volcano was amazing, the service are so incredible, in the room they made towel figures  and the room was  so clean.
The hotel has two restaurants and the food was delicious , I will back but in a lot years the hotel in general is nice and in reception has  many tours and the tour pick you up here also have many pools with termal water and normal water.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: This was our first time to Costa Rica, and we were amazed by the hospitality, service and attention to details here. Our last day we decided to get a couples massage, and I’d have to say if you come stay here and don’t enjoy the spa you are seriously missing out!! It is top notch! The location is convenient, the only drawback is the road noise. But that wasn’t enough to stop us from future stays here. PS our cleaning lady was the absolute best, we were greeted with these fun towel figures when we’d arrive back to our room.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Hotel staff is very friendly. Beautiful location. Great amenities.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Just wanted to write a review based on the fantastic service provided to us by Fabian B. He made my friends and I feel very welcome and very comfortable. He had a late check in he greeted us so well.

Mr. Fabian B you are amazing. 👍

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: This hotel ticked all boxes. We had a complain about our transport from the airport but thats quickly resolved. It goes to show management took customers view seriously. Waking up to the view of the mountain every morning is incredible. Got to swim in the spring water was unique. Body massage at the Loto spa (one of the best I hv been to) left u invigorating. Thumbs up to management for the well trained staff. They are happy, polite n helpful. Shout out to Vera Lina (sorry if it’s wrong pronunciation) Tatiana n Sebastian for whom went above n beyond during our stay ❤️

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Excellent service,  exceptional people.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Espectacular hotel, muy buen servicio, la limpieza es realmente buena y la alimentación de muy buen nivel

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The staff was awesome.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The Royal Corin was one of the best resorts we have stayed at. From the start, they were very communicative via email to confirm the reservation and make arrangements. Within a day of arrival, everyone knew our names and treated us like family. We made mention of celebrating a birthday, and the staff went over the top with making the week special. The resort was beautiful, hot springs were relaxing, and it was a very intimate feel. The breakfast was exceptional. The spa services were excellent, and location wise, everything in town was very close. We took advantage of the tours and private transportation, and it was effortless. We would recommend to everyone!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We had an incredible stay at this hotel, which made my birthday truly special.The staff were so friendly and helpful. We want to highlight  Valentina at reception, who was so sweet and Tatiana, who showed remarkable kindness .

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: One of the greatest places I’ve traveled to ! I will be back !

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: It was a great experience from booking to me leaving. Jillyan was a gem in reservation but helped throughout my whole experience. Sebastian and Justin in valet and Jonathan in the restaurant add extra value to the experience

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Our experience at The Royal Corin was absolutely FANTASTIC!  Before we even arrived, we already had the BEST service from the concierge, Jillyan!  She helped us book all of our excursions and set up a special birthday surprise for our daughter.

Every single staff member was so kind, professional, helpful, friendly, and all-around AWESOME!  We felt so spoiled and were treated so well the entire time.  They always asked how we slept, how our day was, what we did that day, and seemed genuinely interested in us and our experience.  I highly, highly, highly recommend this hotel if you want a beautiful property with perfect location, delicious breakfast, excellent service, relaxing and very pretty pools and jacuzzis (multiple of each), and caring and thoughtful staff.  A huge thank you to all of the staff for a wonderful experience before and during our stay!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Absolutely incredible experience! Such a relaxing and magical place. The staff were beyond amazing- so hospitable, kind, and helpful. The pool and hot springs were so delightful. Even better that it was kids-free. It was clean, comfortable and quiet. We can’t wait to return!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Beautiful resort! The staff went above and beyond. Loved the thermal water. And the spa was heavenly. It was a perfect location too, as we did several excursions.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Excellent resort, great service, great view!!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Soon arrival we were greeted by Valentina and Sebastian right away with smiles that felt very welcoming. Valentina was very informative, she let us know about our V.I.P status, all the  amenities the hotel had to offer. The hotel was breathtaking and very peaceful. All the excursions are close by so that was a plus. Food/ drinks taste so fresh and delicious. Breakfast is free 6am-10am This one gentlemen at the hot spring swim up bar I forgot his name (young , glasses ) he was superfluous helpful gave me some places to check out for the night life ! I absolutely loved it. Thank you all for the great Birthday Experience

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: My wife and I stayed here for a few days while in Fortuna. Upon arriving, though in the pouring rain, we were greeted by a worker who pulled out bags out of our car and transported to our room. Check in was easy. Our room was very tidy and clean upon arrival. The room had a great view of the volcano and the on site hot springs. We spent quite a bit of time in the springs enjoying the swim up bar. The breakfast that is included was AMAZING. The location of the hotel is very convenient to all other activities in the area.  Would highly recommend this hotel.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Disfrutamos de nuestra estancia allí. El personal era maravilloso, atento y sumamente profesional.

We really enjoyed our stay there. The staff is wonderful, attentive and highly professional. World Class.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: My wife and I went here for our first of two stops in Costa Rica. We booked through a travel agent and didn’t really look into the hotel too much before confirming. Upon arrival, every single staff member was extremely nice, helpful and overall great. We had a king room and the view was incredible. The food and drinks here are good if you don’t feel like traveling into town after your excursions, if you do want to travel out, they’ll get you a taxi at any moment. The spa was amazing and we both had an excellent massage, followed by a great time relaxing in the secluded area. I could not recommend this place enough if you are looking for a great hotel at a good price.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The resort is great customer service overall is excellent I can't take that away. But heads up, it doesn't include anything but the hotel and free breakfast. No drinks, lunch, or dinner. I think at that point, it is overpriced and over hyped. Nothing special to do just the pools. Bar and pools close at 10 pm. I don't know why the bar close so early and also room service also stops at 10 pm. is like they want to put you to bed early lol. This is more for older people that want to be quiet all the time. We spend most of our time in the town drinking eating and doing excursion. I feel like we paid so much money just to go sleep to be honest. Please do your research before booking.

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: We stayed 6 night at the Royal Corin for our Honeymoon and it was the most amazing week we could have asked for. The resort is so peaceful and private. The hot springs are so secluded and never crowded. It’s a very comfortable, beautiful resort with a spectacular view. The staff were awesome and made every minute feel luxurious. Fabian, Sebastian, and Jesslyn went above and beyond to make it an enjoyable week. There are so many activities available so close to the resort, we went on an amazing adventure every day. Also the swim up bar makes the best pina colada I’ve ever had!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Vale la pena, excelente servicio

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
Es un excelente lugar para ir nosotros fuimos con toda la familia y nuestra luna de miel
Está espectacular el lugar y las comidas son palabras

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: Amazing view. Amazing service. Would stay here again!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: I had the most amazing time at The Royal Corin and the staff was amazing ♥️

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text: The rooms are clean and comfortable with a beautiful view of the volcano. The staff is all very friendly. We had breakfast here every morning and for an included breakfast, it was really good. If you are a light sleeper, I recommend bringing a sound machine to drown out the donkey noises from next door.  We would absolutely stay here again!

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
review_text:
We were at the Royal Corin on June 1st thru June 4th and was an amazing experience.

Highlights for me:
* Hands down the friendliest staff I have ever had.  All employees were smiling, constantly asking if they could help, and going the extra mile!
* Woke up this morning wishing I could have their breakfast.  Most delicious breakfast every morning that I have ever experienced at a restaurant, not just a resort.  Everything was super fresh, different items every morning, and coffee was great!
* The views of volcano are at another level!
* The property is well maintained, and you can tell that cleanliness is one of their top priorities.

Thank you for an amazing experience and will be seeing you again in the future

name: The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
The Royal Corin Thermal Water Spa & Resort
